name: Adam Schiff
subject: Not your typical Senate campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
If there’s one thing you need to know about our Senate race, it’s that MAGA Republicans see no greater threat to their power than yours truly.
| Friend, if there’s one thing you need to know about our Senate race, it’s that **MAGA Republicans see no greater threat to their power than yours truly.**

Just look at how they’ve reacted in the last seven months since we announced this campaign:

As soon as Kevin McCarthy had scraped by in the Speaker election — with a bare minimum number of votes after his _fifteenth_ humiliating attempt — **he removed me as the top Democrat on the Intelligence Committee.**

McCarthy is so weak that his chief antagonists in the Speaker’s race — like Matt Gaetz and Anna Paulina Luna — have hijacked floor proceedings time and again to target me even further with political attacks.

**Introducing legislation to bar me from receiving classified information.

Censuring me in political retaliation for investigating and impeaching Donald Trump.

Even trying to fine me $16 million.**

And Trump himself continues to attack me too. Including calling me out by name in an exclusive sit-down interview with _Fox News,_ and _expressing his hope that I will not be elected to the Senate._

Why do they continue to make me the target of their attacks?

Because time and again, when Trump has violated the law and abused his power by...

\- Soliciting and using Russian help in the 2016 election
\- Leveraging his office and U.S. military aid to Ukraine to get Zelenskyy to smear Joe Biden
\- Inciting the deadly insurrection to stop the peaceful transfer of power on January 6

**...I’ve stood up again and again to say it isn’t okay. It’s criminal.**

Investigating foreign interference in our elections. Impeaching him for abusing his oath of office. Speaking the truth about what Trump knew and did on January 6.

**MAGA Republicans do not want to see Californians elect me to represent them in the Senate, because no one has stood up to Trump and his cronies as often and as effectively as I have. For years.**

They aren’t going to stop attacking me or our campaign. And very often I’m going to need your help to respond. That’s why I’m asking:

[Will you split $10 or any amount to the Voter Protection Project and my Senate campaign today to help us respond to Trump and MAGA Republicans’ attacks and keep up the fight for our democracy and an economy that works for all?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52492?t=6&akid=10368%2E878179%2E-zT8sS) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52493?t=7&akid=10368%2E878179%2E-zT8sS)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52494?t=8&akid=10368%2E878179%2E-zT8sS)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52495?t=9&akid=10368%2E878179%2E-zT8sS)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52496?t=10&akid=10368%2E878179%2E-zT8sS)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52492?t=11&akid=10368%2E878179%2E-zT8sS)
You are an essential member of our team, and with your support, we’re going to win this race, stop Trump in his tracks, and make the progress that the American people demand.
Thanks for everything,

— Adam
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=10368%2E878179%2E-zT8sS). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=10368%2E878179%2E-zT8sS).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=10368%2E878179%2E-zT8sS) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=10368%2E878179%2E-zT8sS). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=10368%2E878179%2E-zT8sS)
---

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Try as they might, MAGA isn’t leaving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Are you still an America First conservative? | Fellow American - Joe Biden, his corrupt Department of Justice, and Merrick Garland are back at targeting me.

[**_Do you know what this is about?_**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b15f02a09736478e9367ea2fe3884dc3&_e=_KRIfWfNynwxDYQ0_hGV44CvjC6qLMIt1iXAx6PbsWM9oAPDm-TL7t2WP9L32t9CG_jBo2ZPaTCAr43wEDPOs3DbcdHXXSLg-Dy3yDlCYqoNINAX7PAhA4IaiT4uxGRaBJ0vWWF5JThea7EhhfjLP5O1VvSZmhcYF-f4is1OUtIm5k9N7sWed7dfYh7fpy9WodhlG69zHMth-_yIfuMMJ_Fcvjl27_vauLKBWAvKIxfjWYj37J4S3tPdFCrXDS0uB40FPPU5hOJsu4Rwk0kybZ0eTZHIkC3yTOIj6eYhLl41HxSDJ0AL1V6mh1Nr0esk9bRPjxToe02N2_8Wb6y4xcIPvBQTZ9BLugBo5McuheBOlUpLlGb_f7FowCrRApKlhwMBq526ykZDfI0vl_T2hRTNGbfTMpvag21q-vrpnq5rnda2vuwADGgiFFglSr5z)
This witch hunt is because they know they can’t beat me. They think they can distract me from America First and a **_VERY SAD attempt at removing me from this election._**

**Fellow American, I need your support now, more than ever!**

[**ADD YOUR NAME IF YOU’RE WITH ME**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b15f02a09736478e9367ea2fe3884dc3&_e=_KRIfWfNynwxDYQ0_hGV44CvjC6qLMIt1iXAx6PbsWM9oAPDm-TL7t2WP9L32t9CG_jBo2ZPaTCAr43wEDPOs3DbcdHXXSLg-Dy3yDlCYqoNINAX7PAhA4IaiT4uxGRaBJ0vWWF5JThea7EhhfjLP5O1VvSZmhcYF-f4is1OUtIm5k9N7sWed7dfYh7fpy9WodhlG69zHMth-_yIfuMMJ_Fcvjl27_vauLKBWAvKIxfjWYj37J4S3tPdFCrXDS0uB40FPPU5hOJsu4Rwk0kybZ0eTZHIkC3yTOIj6eYhLl6P5UMiUAjJPfJrZX6lqO1y6l9kwu9-o3bwPidZkIjQOr_KTrcNURuZX16UfaqdOMsa7CbGrrmJnfbZCUnOJs_Db475jAwCPvpAMGl5PxohsSydRxVXqsyotVug5rQlN7TNbcisA6L4jfxSqoj-cYAS)
This is __unprecedented even after all I’ve been through already.__ I wonder how many more losses sleepy Joe and unmerited Merrick can take before they give up. Joe may not remember but I do, when:

First, they **illegally spied on my campaign and threw false and slanderous accusations about me and my family** \- nothing but hoaxes!

Then the FBI (following Biden’s Instructions) Agents raided Mar-a-Lago and **refused to let my lawyers oversee the search.**

Finally, **they impeached me TWICE** (I won both with a little thanks to some America First allies in the Senate!) and nothing ever came of it.

**I’M NOT BACKING DOWN UNTIL WE RETAKE THE SENATE AND WHITE HOUSE**

Biden and the cronies in the DOJ and Merrick Garland represent fraud of the highest degree. These meaningless indictments are scams. An attempt to distract me from one thing - representing the good people of this great country and Making America Great Again! [**Stand with me today and we will take back the Senate and White House!**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b15f02a09736478e9367ea2fe3884dc3&_e=_KRIfWfNynwxDYQ0_hGV44CvjC6qLMIt1iXAx6PbsWM9oAPDm-TL7t2WP9L32t9CG_jBo2ZPaTCAr43wEDPOs3DbcdHXXSLg-Dy3yDlCYqoNINAX7PAhA4IaiT4uxGRaBJ0vWWF5JThea7EhhfjLP5O1VvSZmhcYF-f4is1OUtIm5k9N7sWed7dfYh7fpy9WodhlG69zHMth-_yIfuMMJ_Fcvjl27_vauLKBWAvKIxfjWYj37J4S3tPdFCrXDS0uB40FPPU5hOJsu4Rwk0kybZ0eTZHIkC3yTOIj6eYhLl4baHoJDP1QU6vjUYNCRAqZncJP6nNTrSGRxxGj8c5Hx7XrYwLFcVL9TWq1XDaMxP_scczSJcAMv3BQaVvk4imrZmlYMQabnCDniHlozrBt4tnoPgPLyrnZNguqyc7xFEXhQ6mSIYWvjCMxM2_aCuzx)

**Your support is instrumental in achieving these ends, Fellow American.**

[**DON’T BACK DOWN –
ADD YOUR NAME TO SHOW YOU’RE WITH ME**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b15f02a09736478e9367ea2fe3884dc3&_e=_KRIfWfNynwxDYQ0_hGV44CvjC6qLMIt1iXAx6PbsWM9oAPDm-TL7t2WP9L32t9CG_jBo2ZPaTCAr43wEDPOs3DbcdHXXSLg-Dy3yDlCYqoNINAX7PAhA4IaiT4uxGRaBJ0vWWF5JThea7EhhfjLP5O1VvSZmhcYF-f4is1OUtIm5k9N7sWed7dfYh7fpy9WodhlG69zHMth-_yIfuMMJ_Fcvjl27_vauLKBWAvKIxfjWYj37J4S3tPdFCrXDS0uB40FPPU5hOJsu4Rwk0kybZ0eTZHIkC3yTOIj6eYhLl5iJhUzXn3Kcdfhj5BV2eSi-wZRCrl4xYTOruF9BHXTs4pcdK92iT2WYRuu6w-wMAvtFpHHHUztJZsLs47bz6xWAri2DM_TQ9BVSP-k0p7_sBF43SZFN_3CnDqytCW_JVMSmzL_e2UgG2SLeBsbLXto)

This isn’t the time to ignore **INJUSTICE.**
This attack on me is an attack on all of us. _They’re coming for**you** next._ We can’t let them surprise us with another baseless attack.

**Act quickly. Act now.**

Thanks,

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b15f02a09736478e9367ea2fe3884dc3&_e=_KRIfWfNynwxDYQ0_hGV44CvjC6qLMIt1iXAx6PbsWM9oAPDm-TL7t2WP9L32t9CG_jBo2ZPaTCAr43wEDPOs3DbcdHXXSLg-Dy3yDlCYqoNINAX7PAhA4IaiT4uxGRaBJ0vWWF5JThea7EhhfjLP5O1VvSZmhcYF-f4is1OUtIm5k9N7sWed7dfYh7fpy9WodhlG69zHMth-_yIfuMMJ_Fcvjl27_vauLKBWAvKIxfjWYj37J4S3tPdFCrXDS0uB40FPPU5hOJsu4Rwk0kybZ0eTZHIkC3yTOIj6eYhLl4bO9s4iWuKrv-1CvFMnZHxpU7FMwlx7NVVgntJhPOl1qJe46xsLiQMn3HNyMHXdkg1gqXJ4f0xFRuuM1xNlgwNhC4MdmdpKIbUTTzLF9vzKGG8rfyOztjH47lMQv4IDkcm-Ab7WmQGan1gcmxysX_5)
Donald J. Trump
45th President of the United States

[**SUPPORT MAGA BEFORE IT’S TOO LATE**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b15f02a09736478e9367ea2fe3884dc3&_e=_KRIfWfNynwxDYQ0_hGV44CvjC6qLMIt1iXAx6PbsWM9oAPDm-TL7t2WP9L32t9CG_jBo2ZPaTCAr43wEDPOs3DbcdHXXSLg-Dy3yDlCYqoNINAX7PAhA4IaiT4uxGRaBJ0vWWF5JThea7EhhfjLP5O1VvSZmhcYF-f4is1OUtIm5k9N7sWed7dfYh7fpy9WodhlG69zHMth-_yIfuMMJ_Fcvjl27_vauLKBWAvKIxfjWYj37J4S3tPdFCrXDS0uB40FPPU5hOJsu4Rwk0kybZ0eTZHIkC3yTOIj6eYhLl62YS535TgXx1CqrjONzNFHq7SyeP7YCw84LimJCxUiWymFz7tKM_l0GrmI-AZ8S5M0iiFKS0dDIOZktlWOWFK9wyYdvbgpL5OsMGSOLIz5BfVSjaYKA3PCzoZ3JWB_zVnWnl27UOxA-ThiojekrzoW)

body:
Hunter Biden has no marketable skills. No one in their right mind would pay him to do anything. | **“If Joe Biden took bribes—he should be impeached, removed, and thrown in jail.”
-Ted Cruz**

clean_body: This week's biggest news| | | It's time to turn up the volume... ...on our message, our vision, and Will's playlist! Will spent the weekend in Iowa talking to voters about what matters to them. He also continues to speak out against dangerous rhetoric from those in his own party and the failed agenda from Joe Biden. If you were busy all week, here's what you missed: Top Headlines: | Video: | Will also spoke with Kaitlan Collins on CNN this week about the top issues of the day and more. Check out a few of the clips . | Will's Playlist: | Merchandise: | | Get ready for fall with our newly added sweaters, polos, and more! | → If you haven't donated, → If you have given to the campaign, will you double your donation or make a new one today for any other amount? Thanks for being on the team!Team Hurd for America | |

subject: Stand with me today, the White House and Senate tomorrow!

body:
Are you still an America First conservative? | Fellow American - Joe Biden, his corrupt Department of Justice, and Merrick Garland are back at targeting me.

[**_Do you know what this is about?_**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=38dec230cdb444b0826f6bf80955182a&_e=4v33QqTdeIKjMMwLsfSthoNpjNPcqIA_UA8lxVDoDtjAcrlfbd0-5ceRfXVTyx7hVtBI0kbH3baGDBnTLH4-0cKG_BUx_QcooIhnAI70Kw1d1TjaibmVWJSFluR6KnL9WWhseIqd1UPsKbaAt1OfcrsVas8N1Zf_jzFI4A5lVn8cPBeZKz0jQw0-WEe83P4E_YdL_zkOLYnaiGO26W7eZXmOyDy9cekjyjKBxAdisEMEImJHvDDver-QVBR7AHzHUmZtSdGbwVO8fpFsNlFiyZ8WPwTnO5DBMuVCvM_QAJmvvEUtS2ipxZhIscZrrAogpdCWSg9CXNgH8jSWN_QUly9xoHyNwVFuMatLt4liYGsglB28pAR5Yg_B0NAx2y9vdlU0W5R1Mm5Flo21ubgoVDaQXA2EqfkGu0IZAAcNs5dHqHnj_nqkfPskl0pGiHWeuBTNFOTc_eFjQ5Tm7UNmyA%3D%3D)
This witch hunt is because they know they can’t beat me. They think they can distract me from America First and a **_VERY SAD attempt at removing me from this election._**

**Fellow American, I need your support now, more than ever!**

[**ADD YOUR NAME IF YOU’RE WITH ME**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=38dec230cdb444b0826f6bf80955182a&_e=4v33QqTdeIKjMMwLsfSthoNpjNPcqIA_UA8lxVDoDtjAcrlfbd0-5ceRfXVTyx7hVtBI0kbH3baGDBnTLH4-0cKG_BUx_QcooIhnAI70Kw1d1TjaibmVWJSFluR6KnL9WWhseIqd1UPsKbaAt1OfcrsVas8N1Zf_jzFI4A5lVn8cPBeZKz0jQw0-WEe83P4E_YdL_zkOLYnaiGO26W7eZXmOyDy9cekjyjKBxAdisEMEImJHvDDver-QVBR7AHzHUmZtSdGbwVO8fpFsNlFiyZ8WPwTnO5DBMuVCvM_QAJk23MyncoB6JS7zOOoRlEVoSTNb7Nc18y6RyAXTO35LU-o4eYHv0lem4JOdNioTFKvOmXsMM2w_LqtEYE23rAj6dfIYyE6OqLup8TQCt8Vh6t4-X196u31mxpZfhchLX2AM32s1X-xNKCwwmMKS48D6HX5CuCoUdlNsgyA6PXADJg%3D%3D)
This is __unprecedented even after all I’ve been through already.__ I wonder how many more losses sleepy Joe and unmerited Merrick can take before they give up. Joe may not remember but I do, when:

First, they **illegally spied on my campaign and threw false and slanderous accusations about me and my family** \- nothing but hoaxes!

Then the FBI (following Biden’s Instructions) Agents raided Mar-a-Lago and **refused to let my lawyers oversee the search.**

Finally, **they impeached me TWICE** (I won both with a little thanks to some America First allies in the Senate!) and nothing ever came of it.

**I’M NOT BACKING DOWN UNTIL WE RETAKE THE SENATE AND WHITE HOUSE**

Biden and the cronies in the DOJ and Merrick Garland represent fraud of the highest degree. These meaningless indictments are scams. An attempt to distract me from one thing - representing the good people of this great country and Making America Great Again! [**Stand with me today and we will take back the Senate and White House!**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=38dec230cdb444b0826f6bf80955182a&_e=4v33QqTdeIKjMMwLsfSthoNpjNPcqIA_UA8lxVDoDtjAcrlfbd0-5ceRfXVTyx7hVtBI0kbH3baGDBnTLH4-0cKG_BUx_QcooIhnAI70Kw1d1TjaibmVWJSFluR6KnL9WWhseIqd1UPsKbaAt1OfcrsVas8N1Zf_jzFI4A5lVn8cPBeZKz0jQw0-WEe83P4E_YdL_zkOLYnaiGO26W7eZXmOyDy9cekjyjKBxAdisEMEImJHvDDver-QVBR7AHzHUmZtSdGbwVO8fpFsNlFiyZ8WPwTnO5DBMuVCvM_QAJmydEoJzXqqOm-qqGHIlUPJBoM0DPoNNAKZ5Zf4Z2N1PElklPURlbXVyDIr8jO_CvsoNUw-RxTO0jgkKnAwIRASY8txMsnqXUo947PBJ-uIDk8-056LSWKpUGc19RkreH2AVXrHhQTc1kNpsYVRhv2ETh6XgTP54-sm_Y52rlluOg%3D%3D)

**Your support is instrumental in achieving these ends, Fellow American.**

[**DON’T BACK DOWN –
ADD YOUR NAME TO SHOW YOU’RE WITH ME**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=38dec230cdb444b0826f6bf80955182a&_e=4v33QqTdeIKjMMwLsfSthoNpjNPcqIA_UA8lxVDoDtjAcrlfbd0-5ceRfXVTyx7hVtBI0kbH3baGDBnTLH4-0cKG_BUx_QcooIhnAI70Kw1d1TjaibmVWJSFluR6KnL9WWhseIqd1UPsKbaAt1OfcrsVas8N1Zf_jzFI4A5lVn8cPBeZKz0jQw0-WEe83P4E_YdL_zkOLYnaiGO26W7eZXmOyDy9cekjyjKBxAdisEMEImJHvDDver-QVBR7AHzHUmZtSdGbwVO8fpFsNlFiyZ8WPwTnO5DBMuVCvM_QAJmRTxKuFO7jyY_FKZhjg2glPgyltNOyXigiOV8vL4BEqGNeDbwjWiKib_CVOZItF5QUUpxh1Suq8fd9mR7ikHE5pfsB60mzQx7SwBxQYIw9C21F5BluPc3Bn5DBteb1pgYkJoocZK5SiBH38ltJwI9m6g7BxQtptmxQOCdkH8VPhg%3D%3D)

This isn’t the time to ignore **INJUSTICE.**
This attack on me is an attack on all of us. _They’re coming for**you** next._ We can’t let them surprise us with another baseless attack.

**Act quickly. Act now.**

Thanks,

body:
Are you still an America First conservative? | Fellow American - Joe Biden, his corrupt Department of Justice, and Merrick Garland are back at targeting me.

[**_Do you know what this is about?_**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e1b1da59b09d4e20819c8667f578381d&_e=7OLyAcJojMRxeYE-BQxVeknFPqzjDLQgKuwrSBTzph5hhanRyEvJD1_OLFwXpWxrSag8E3uVVPYe76GPP3-bA4p-oYTCfdcVw1xQeupiVOeXC-HuRLEG0Hndo06FPRyENhjV--6pDl7xkY-rIsLfBElvfWP1Wu9Fs_vAbkqzWlrneK8ZcchvbNVmGZZ25fyHBiRA150RCoxb3SgYQxIrzBGzId654w6ubiq05IGwHhmb4HEJ00TXEAP5T9xNAiDE-SFc2CdMq6lG0HRKSajtuhamPtivFPxfBx0AwVWT4ozyNNNx35Qk6skNr0xZ2yMDn5CZU3-KoMCP5HSSGYOrRCf4F1kYJQvdLlYmqW-y_zi_ul13PxLFhUkxsVpiiouKH6T-tz48r3L7AYTFc1ybAItIKtadwNQCYo_FVG-YqAR1xPzAivgedNiS85H07OMa)
This witch hunt is because they know they can’t beat me. They think they can distract me from America First and a **_VERY SAD attempt at removing me from this election._**

**Fellow American, I need your support now, more than ever!**

[**ADD YOUR NAME IF YOU’RE WITH ME**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e1b1da59b09d4e20819c8667f578381d&_e=7OLyAcJojMRxeYE-BQxVeknFPqzjDLQgKuwrSBTzph5hhanRyEvJD1_OLFwXpWxrSag8E3uVVPYe76GPP3-bA4p-oYTCfdcVw1xQeupiVOeXC-HuRLEG0Hndo06FPRyENhjV--6pDl7xkY-rIsLfBElvfWP1Wu9Fs_vAbkqzWlrneK8ZcchvbNVmGZZ25fyHBiRA150RCoxb3SgYQxIrzBGzId654w6ubiq05IGwHhmb4HEJ00TXEAP5T9xNAiDE-SFc2CdMq6lG0HRKSajtuhamPtivFPxfBx0AwVWT4oypJcbaj5uldDwhe7PDORDVONc8OQ9W4LaxKMX7iJe22jyK9zOcY21d06ZRXkbVgjp1iDC5_yQLthV2b6yEmL9o4xjdKeFZ-188jyJW2gZGLuelv5vNzdCPZepUAAfo9arPcSjyKdkqq_cSMduK0jat)
This is __unprecedented even after all I’ve been through already.__ I wonder how many more losses sleepy Joe and unmerited Merrick can take before they give up. Joe may not remember but I do, when:

First, they **illegally spied on my campaign and threw false and slanderous accusations about me and my family** \- nothing but hoaxes!

Then the FBI (following Biden’s Instructions) Agents raided Mar-a-Lago and **refused to let my lawyers oversee the search.**

Finally, **they impeached me TWICE** (I won both with a little thanks to some America First allies in the Senate!) and nothing ever came of it.

**I’M NOT BACKING DOWN UNTIL WE RETAKE THE SENATE AND WHITE HOUSE**

Biden and the cronies in the DOJ and Merrick Garland represent fraud of the highest degree. These meaningless indictments are scams. An attempt to distract me from one thing - representing the good people of this great country and Making America Great Again! [**Stand with me today and we will take back the Senate and White House!**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e1b1da59b09d4e20819c8667f578381d&_e=7OLyAcJojMRxeYE-BQxVeknFPqzjDLQgKuwrSBTzph5hhanRyEvJD1_OLFwXpWxrSag8E3uVVPYe76GPP3-bA4p-oYTCfdcVw1xQeupiVOeXC-HuRLEG0Hndo06FPRyENhjV--6pDl7xkY-rIsLfBElvfWP1Wu9Fs_vAbkqzWlrneK8ZcchvbNVmGZZ25fyHBiRA150RCoxb3SgYQxIrzBGzId654w6ubiq05IGwHhmb4HEJ00TXEAP5T9xNAiDE-SFc2CdMq6lG0HRKSajtuhamPtivFPxfBx0AwVWT4owRtIFjGP2hcUb73Gbxf88_B6gYWGO5tLLOdzpJ4ebmnrqJy5WQgwnr7sV4QDHG8zmg-thukQf3EPkKKDoHVvzVVgRefKBtkKSti3SA6XeXxlw9uMxQqPm0cE8EMnogIFSwMIilVqJwt7fT4YzKkzia)

**Your support is instrumental in achieving these ends, Fellow American.**

[**DON’T BACK DOWN –
ADD YOUR NAME TO SHOW YOU’RE WITH ME**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e1b1da59b09d4e20819c8667f578381d&_e=7OLyAcJojMRxeYE-BQxVeknFPqzjDLQgKuwrSBTzph5hhanRyEvJD1_OLFwXpWxrSag8E3uVVPYe76GPP3-bA4p-oYTCfdcVw1xQeupiVOeXC-HuRLEG0Hndo06FPRyENhjV--6pDl7xkY-rIsLfBElvfWP1Wu9Fs_vAbkqzWlrneK8ZcchvbNVmGZZ25fyHBiRA150RCoxb3SgYQxIrzBGzId654w6ubiq05IGwHhmb4HEJ00TXEAP5T9xNAiDE-SFc2CdMq6lG0HRKSajtuhamPtivFPxfBx0AwVWT4oxEizIUkOESyF_nRYAd52VOKflbOKzR18k9KS3nYhFyBPj0apNmoyfXKjbQWQ68iloN62RyKP7ATPO05sC74AnI9twHNOYEAmQvgAO301Ez60725IZLukhWp0_ZLbgjCQDrpyTubvXkmXoYY7L_D15n)

This isn’t the time to ignore **INJUSTICE.**
This attack on me is an attack on all of us. _They’re coming for**you** next._ We can’t let them surprise us with another baseless attack.

**Act quickly. Act now.**

Thanks,

name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: This is about you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
This Thursday, September 14, in Washington, D.C., the Democratic National Committee (DNC) will meet to confirm the party’s rules or make changes which could amount to stuffing the primary election delegate ballot box.

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dnc_email_non_donors_1&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, This Thursday, September 14, in Washington, D.C., the Democratic National Committee (DNC) will meet to confirm the party’s rules or make changes which could amount to stuffing the primary election delegate ballot box. Here’s how it works: Let’s say a candidate gets 60% of the vote in a primary. In a fair election, they would get 60% of the delegates allocated. However, in 2020 the DNC created a new kind of delegate: the PLEO (Party Leaders and Elected Officials). Only these officials are eligible. They are to be allocated according to vote totals, but since no official will dare provoke the wrath of the DNC by pledging to an insurgent candidate like myself, it means that all of them will go to President Joe Biden. **What that means is that I could win 60% or even 70% of the vote, and still the nomination would go to Joe Biden.** [](http://www.kennedy24.com/this-is-about-you-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dnc_email_non_donors_1&n=2) | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dnc_email_non_donors_1&n=3 "Contribute to support a fair election process") [Contribute to support a fair election process](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dnc_email_non_donors_1&n=3)
---
This scheme is a way to stack the deck in favor of party insiders. The DNC is returning to the days of choosing the nominee in backroom political deals.**It is a blatant form of election rigging.**
They also have switched the first primary to South Carolina (where Biden did well in the 2020 primary) and taken it away from New Hampshire (where he lost badly). To enforce the switch, they are punishing any candidate who campaigns there by nullifying the NH vote and removing them from the ballot in Georgia, of all places.
I am taking this fight, on behalf of all voters, to the DNC. I have publicly called for real reform, where every vote counts. I have asked to meet with the DNC this week. No response yet.
**You can help me show the DNC that the voters want real democracy.** Make a donation of any amount today to be counted in the fight for free and fair elections. Similar to the fundraisers at your local church or elementary school, this isn't about the size of your donation. It's about 100% participation to prove to the elites that our voices are too many to silence. Even a gift of a dollar will add to our donor numbers and show the party operatives that we are the hard-working many -- and we will not be deleted by the corrupt, thieving few.
**Contribute to support my campaign’s effort to make every primary vote count.**
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dnc_email_non_donors_1&n=4 "Give $5 ->") [Give $5 ->](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dnc_email_non_donors_1&n=4)

Hunter Biden has no marketable skills. No one in their right mind would pay him to do anything. | **“If Joe Biden took bribes—he should be impeached, removed, and thrown in jail.”
-Ted Cruz**
Fellow American,

body:
Are you still an America First conservative? | Peter - Joe Biden, his corrupt Department of Justice, and Merrick Garland are back at targeting me.

[**_Do you know what this is about?_**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8d5a73b930b943b2bd9306dfc55e1e3a&_e=trXEDOVeNcteyA9JctPthAHjFC-5LQ2HQTgndIhbT7k72mzpujortVjs-wUqHar52vt0L2pDXWCpc66M8XhN2nGXrvjKlbU3BrocjypeZqPhxtatRMJu7GPOmVJhrq7m2ZamiXoYL2nitIbpCCfpLzLBEjePXsD_rFJasTnKSABI-1hki8I36sqnAk5KFApTIzGiq86M4dsInRpi-a48SUbwAbbewSI3UFJ17gUfLRuLppIJXLXSHPrcYiMyhOEA1EHmMuGhy1KWM1ZMS0NSJW9hRbKLAfQyicm02eqNEiYw0D3OpH2nOHSFeVGYkFMoBrKokJmHYZyPfN7zxt-kBvg5VCLDDfCoNLxmW1DCR0te8CGdZsl165h7gv-kB8BmHUrptQkfyQ-_bLZt3er7Qg7E32oQhvZ2X7CFz39JTmXuNEByygOqaWbmRgN0Vyi8T7KlVtmnfx68-HBAdxszIg%3D%3D)

subject: Ron DeSantis went nuclear after being hit with a heart-stopping ambush
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 11, 2023

Ron DeSantis went
nuclear after being hit with a heart-stopping ambush
Radical Leftists will do
anything to go after someone they view as a threat. That includes
attacking a prominent Republican presidential candidate.

And Ron DeSantis went nuclear
after being hit with a heart-stopping ambush.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Joe Biden is fuming after
being threatened by this lead Republican

The Biden
administration has shown that their job isn't to make friends.
They've proven that with one disastrous decision after another.
➞ Continue Reading

Kamala Harris just made a
bold prediction that will have your head spinning

Politicians should
have a certain degree of confidence. But what Harris did, is
borderline insane.
➞ Continue Reading

The hammer just dropped on
Hunter Biden in a truly stunning way

The son of President
Joe Biden just can't seem to keep himself out of trouble. But
this time he's really in a bind.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: Goldco
subject: Sean Hannity: "Thousands of Americans protecting their retirement savings..."
disclaimer_text: paid for by your retirement savings
body:
Biden’s a predictable disaster.

| | | “In times of uncertainty, we need to be vigilant about protecting what’s ours.
**That’s why I urge you ****to read this important message ...**” _-- _Sean Hannity
---
“In times of uncertainty, we need to be vigilant about protecting what’s ours.
**That’s why I urge you ****to read this important message ...**” _-- _Sean Hannity
---
|
---
| | Biden’s a predictable disaster. **Ask him to lead the country in a time of crisis ...** Not a word. **Ask him about the 40 year high inflation ...** Not a word. **Ask him why you’re paying more for gasoline ... ** Why it cost a fortune to heat and cool your home...
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22321%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5z4B8MKjHvpOG%2bXuLpz4Tg&sysid=1)
---
| | And why everything you buy at the store is more expensive... **NOT A WORD.** Instead, he’ll stand in front of a teleprompter and sell you on a repackaged “Build Back Broke” deal, **paid for by your retirement savings.** But wait! Biden says, **“under my plan, nobody earning less than $400,000 a year will pay an additional penny in new taxes.”** Yeah, is that right Joe? No new taxes? **Don’t believe it.** **He voted for a new 50% tax on Social Security** benefits in 1983... **He voted for 85% taxes on Social Security** benefits in 1994... **He voted for Estate Taxes** in 2000... **Now, he wants to raise over $3.3 TRILLION in NEW taxes. ** Who do you think will pay for that? **Are you prepared for higher inflation, higher costs, and less money for yourself ...** Or do you want to PROTECT YOUR HARD EARNED MONEY before it’s too late? If you have $50,000 or more in retirement savings... name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Joe Biden fell seriously ill when he heard what his enemies were about to do
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 11, 2023

Joe Biden fell
seriously ill when he heard what his enemies were about to do

President Biden just got
played. He has no idea what to do next.

And Joe Biden fell seriously ill
when he heard what his enemies were about to do next.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Ron DeSantis went nuclear
after being hit with a heart-stopping ambush

Radical Leftists will
do anything to go after someone they view as a threat. That
includes attacking a prominent Republican presidential candidate.
➞ Continue Reading

Joe Biden is fuming after
being threatened by this lead Republican

The Biden
administration has shown that their job isn't to make friends.
They've proven that with one disastrous decision after another.
➞ Continue Reading

Kamala Harris just made a
bold prediction that will have your head spinning

Politicians should
have a certain degree of confidence. But what Harris did, is
borderline insane.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

name: Troy E. Nehls
subject: Never Forget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
| | | Friend, Twenty-two years ago today, we witnessed pure evil. The horrific events of 9/11 shook America and the world to its core. But these terrorist acts ultimately united us as never before, affirming our patriotism and strengthening our resolve to protect and defend our great country.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/2c638c9378d4f7d2/4f4d3704fcb5eed4c3d6b838967d376c/35193)
---
This Patriot’s Day, let’s remember the courage and sacrifice of the countless men and women who bravely faced and overcame unfathomable challenges to aid their fellow Americans. Let’s pray for the friends and family members whose lives were forever changed by the loss of a loved one. And let’s once again strengthen our resolve to unite as “One Nation, Under God.” Sincerely, Troy E. Nehls
---

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Somber day of reflection
body:
| | | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMyNTQtN2ViOWZlNzk1YjEzNDhmY2EyNGQ3MDBmZjAyOGIwMDYiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LmZhY2Vib29rLmNvbS9waG90by5waHA_ZmJpZD0zMjYyMzY0Nzk5Mjg2NjImc2V0PXBiLjEwMDA3NjI2OTM2MDQ0NC4tMjIwNzUyMDAwMCZ0eXBlPTMmbWlkPTQ2NTE1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/m2L5dk06eNAZrYUCDfxX6g)
---
---
Today marks 22 years since the horrific terrorist attack carried out against our nation on September 11, 2001 by radical Islamists.

We saw the face of true evil on that fateful day. It will forever live in infamy. However, just as Americans took care of each other in the aftermath of the attack, there is always hope.

Matthew 5:4 says, _“Blessed are those who mourn, for they will be comforted.”_ (NIV) As we observe Patriot Day 2023, an annual day of somber reflection, let us remember all of the precious lives lost in New York City, at the Pentagon, and in Shanksville, Pennsylvania. Let us honor the heroes who bravely rushed toward the chaos and danger to save others. And let us pray for all of the loved ones of those killed whose lives were forever changed.

God Bless America,

Jenny Beth
---

[Memorial services](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLtyqzAQhp9GdPLoCqJQcRo6nzYls5EWs7FAHqHg4e0zkDbN7j9f818-7uMdKNH6-A8L-jrlEUKlHUfRcym50qNqop8QFeoGvWx7Y7QRxjSzj1NQETvXtWg72WIbzOTAWusArQuxIa-E0qKXUvTWCH0LUffWdVZ1zkiYgBmBkWout69Ma51xSkfesdxCXprk51pfG9P_mBqYGtZDnvxSgakBUuKfueTvx7ydEN_nOx2ZGkR_HvfL-ZHLkweqB6-ZL1Ce_GoH60o7lg3Kwd9UZ77gkgtB4rjjWrem-Ph6U0q0tR0z4rEApStb_XuqnwAAAP__ISNplg) are planned throughout New York City today to honor those who died in the terrorist attacks of Sept. 11, 2001.

## Morocco Hit by Worst Earthquake in 60 Years
Survivors of Morocco's worst earthquake in 60 years struggled to find food, shelter, and water on Sunday as the [death toll reached 2,100,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1zhCAYhH8Ndjh8eUhBkcbu0qZ03oOXkwTlAqiTf58xddrdYp99Pu7zHWKK2_MdVrQt5BlciwfOzFDOqZCz6LwNiAJlh5bfjFJSMaW6xT4eQoF2RrHgAfU4aO9GxQ0YHSA8ZBetYEIywzkzg2Kyd16aYdSD0KPiEIAohj62XPrPHLe2YEg_-cDSu7x2yS6tvSqRb0RMREznefYF94alXv2V5JI8EROEEh0QMRWsbsdS6bJvjda9HPHIpdI1l-xcpt87fCE9Y1voNUMFY4x6BE8vUHp9ZkRMXbH-dcaUYr1pothzhZj-mNr_in4DAAD__0QHZ_Y) with another 2,400 injured. The 6.8 magnitude earthquake hit late Friday, [followed by a 3.9 magnitude aftershock](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFy6yAQAL9G6uThAIEoKF7jzq9NqTnBnUWMjIKxNfn7jFOn3NlmZz8u8wVTTvfrf9zINy4zhpZeNAs3AAxSzbKPnokkqZ48GKe10kLrfvXMbJULQNGw1kFENUpro2EAK6aw9MlLIZVwAMKNWqhTiMqNkx2lnTQgY6cFxdRKPX2WdG8rcf4uL6qnULY--7W1_dGpf508d_KM-52Ox1u9obYUMnXyvJVaQijDXg6q_MwDYW3r1xNvNGxYK94orAM6aYONcjILGwKhLdMCwQEuznCEvvq4Hynn9DC20-K6Ycq_Ge3vKz8BAAD__4qOYz0) on Sunday. Many residents of Marrakech were sleeping on the streets for fear of more aftershocks. The worst of the damage was in isolated mountain areas. Morocco hasn't asked for international aid, but many countries [have offered assistance](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu6yAUxvGnwRsWHA7GDAx38Za7drQIHMe02KSYxOrbV8nc7ZN-y6f_x2W--JTTfvvvN3JtKbMPLT1pFpZLyUHN0EW3EAGpjpwcLKJCgditjsiMEgcMUep4HZSBkWigRQlSxqLukgMBSlgphdUoVB-isno0GsyI0i-eoaCYWqn9Z0l7W2nJP-VJtQ9l67JbW7sfTP1jMDGYzvPs92vY6TxezmB6zReUmiODKacn8WsuNwbTVmoJoXDyta3fD_9F_M2Pe_SNDl7D7qVA0NhVF-9nyjkdg2EobptP-X2g_d3jNwAA__8JIGHH). The country has accepted an offer of help from Spain, but it's unclear what other aid it will accept. The U.S. says it's ready to provide "significant assistance."
## UAW Set to Strike by Thursday Night
The United Auto Workers are four days away [from a major strike](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu8yAUBeCnsTcsuODYDAz_ki3_2tG6huuYBkMEJKhvX7lTh25H-s5wdD5uyw198PH-Hw8ydUsL2urftHDNhGAgF-id2YiAZE9GXLRSUnGl-t2MSsywznYTep2dAqBpJCmd1ug4ku29AQ6SayG4HhWXg3VSj_M0wjQrgRt2ipPzNeXhM_lYd9rCV3pTHmw6-mD2Wp-lk_86uHZwba0NcbWRWjm9g-v6Kj5SKb8iO_ks71jZI6bGXthYqdk_iOGrJmbT8cToqbAtZcfuFCljYEeqKReWbUTB5QRjn417Nh-CL5epU_x-oA8_w-rfP30HAAD__5oDa_A) against General Motors, Ford, and Stellantis if an agreement isn't reached by midnight on Thursday, a move that could greatly impact the economy. The UAW is asking for [a 46% raise over four years](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGu4yAQRb_G7ogYGIMpKLZJl223tCYwJGywiYBNtH__lFe_7l6d5uj8uWwXyiUft9-0sx-pbhRGfvEmnQAQSm9qjj4xK9YzezAOUaNEnO9eG2B0wMt6ddeIhpAiJ6tISwnEac5eSaWlA5BuQalPIWq3rHZRdkWgRBNKjnnUdvpb8zHunMr_-uJ2CnWfi7-P8eyT_jWp86TO9Dz43T_oc9rIofBn_RtVvGt7cOvixgc3KmKvo7Yu-uBS6Bi5i1RbFH20_GAhA4I1wGBRaQMLkHIhGLemJQYbl7n5-HznUnI3dkJ52ymXb6fxc6KvAAAA___W92d3) and a 32-hour work week, among other benefits. The carmakers have countered with raises between 10%-15% but say the other demands are too expensive. Many auto analysts say they expect the union to strike. This would halt car production and cost the Big 3 automakers at least $5 billion, while raising new car prices for consumers.
## Aging Djokovic, Teenaged Gauff Win at U.S. Open
Novak Djokovic, 36, [won his 24th Grand Slam tennis title](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LHyoyAQgPGnwQ4Hlo1KYXENXa690iGyxk0QHOF08vY3ufpff81vvj_36e45cnr-9huNdcmTnyufNCkrtZZgJmjCuBABmYZG3VlEgwqxWUcy4dH1SIiDR1js3KFeZjv3VunFWN_wCAqMslore0Nl2jkYexv6G_QDar94gYoC13y0r8yprrTETz7paOe8NXFca92LML8EOAHuuq6Wyp6-UYCrlBIXAa7UfHwEuEmA4yDAmcH0xmolwKV8-rcMr_zOJ8_yQb4WGXxijnKjcFKgU16c5Bcq_xaZd0oSsK5y8698yMo1UnOMYb84Ri5dL1A9N8_xv7H-vOxfAAAA__99M2xG) at the U.S. Open Sunday, beating Daniil Medvedev to take the all-time record for most major singles titles from Serena Williams. On the women's side, 19-year-old Coco Gauff [won her first major title](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj71u9CAQAJ8GOk6wYH4Kiq9xd1-b0iJ4sTfCxrK5O-Xto0udeqQZzcd9uieqtC__04axlzal3OmJkwxCKQF6Aj7HggioOUZlgzHaSGP4GnNx0oNzxlptXQg6uZR91uHTFz_MgVMECVoGpWQYjNS3POsweDeA80alkpiROFNv5-2r0d5XLPW7PfG85bbxGtfej4vpfwxGBmOnDd-AwWi1AjNIBmNuuYklPUoRL9rF4xLtwF28uwxGfsb5eFGtdFnHjFy2RPVX3v9-_QkAAP__3tRR_Q) by defeating Aryna Sabalenka, who is set to become tennis' top-ranked women's player. Gauff lost the first set and still won, which hasn't happened in over 20 years. Djokovic and Gauff will both take home [$3 million for winning](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2O6yAQRp8Gd2PxFzsULm7jLrfd0iIwJBNjsIA4yj79Kltv-UmfdI7O12W5WIqUbv_thlMLebGu0YELNyAESLXIzk8BUaLqcBKD0VpprnV3n5xzo1EoUA8j1yMPVlxRGGsHy6_DEDqaJJeKGyG4OWmueueVOZ3HkxzPWthgmeboqeXSPzKldscQ3_nA0ru8dXG6t7ZXpv4xOTM5-zVhe-Wy9r7Y0FZKt_o5Mjl_MEzOhslZ8M9W50EJo5mcnxXyjgn2Qt8IW074hhelhAU2TBVafpZkN0wNUj7sCv6R13yQg6OCt4kowob-QI8HBCq1QUWXk4c9Woddmfz-ohipDiPT_LZZir_67e-aPwEAAP__Kgd3ng) the tournament out of a total prize pool of $44 million.

clean_body: Survivors of Morocco’s worst earthquake in 60 years struggled to find food, shelter, and water on Sunday as the death toll reached 2,100, with another 2,400 injured. | | | | | | MONday, SEPT. 11, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today is the 22nd anniversary of one of the darkest days in American history. are planned throughout New York City today to honor those who died in the terrorist attacks of Sept. 11, 2001. If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, | Morocco Hit by Worst Earthquake in 60 Years Survivors of Morocco's worst earthquake in 60 years struggled to find food, shelter, and water on Sunday as the with another 2,400 injured. The 6.8 magnitude earthquake hit late Friday, on Sunday. Many residents of Marrakech were sleeping on the streets for fear of more aftershocks. The worst of the damage was in isolated mountain areas. Morocco hasn't asked for international aid, but many countries . The country has accepted an offer of help from Spain, but it's unclear what other aid it will accept. The U.S. says it's ready to provide "significant assistance." UAW Set to Strike by Thursday Night The United Auto Workers are four days away against General Motors, Ford, and Stellantis if an agreement isn't reached by midnight on Thursday, a move that could greatly impact the economy. The UAW is asking for and a 32-hour work week, among other benefits. The carmakers have countered with raises between 10%-15% but say the other demands are too expensive. Many auto analysts say they expect the union to strike. This would halt car production and cost the Big 3 automakers at least $5 billion, while raising new car prices for consumers. Aging Djokovic, Teenaged Gauff Win at U.S. Open Novak Djokovic, 36, at the U.S. Open Sunday, beating Daniil Medvedev to take the all-time record for most major singles titles from Serena Williams. On the women's side, 19-year-old Coco Gauff by defeating Aryna Sabalenka, who is set to become tennis' top-ranked women's player. Gauff lost the first set and still won, which hasn't happened in over 20 years. Djokovic and Gauff will both take home the tournament out of a total prize pool of $44 million. The lawsuit seeks to remove Trump from the presidential ballot; Trump's lawyers argued the suit was based on a controversial reading of the Constitution's "insurrection" clause, making it a federal case. () ➤President Trump's former chief of staff, Mark Meadows, also attempted to move a state-level lawsuit to federal court (alleged election subversion in Georgia), but his request was denied by a federal judge. () ➤Former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi will run for re-election to her House seat in 2024, despite being 83 years old. "Our city needs us to advance San Francisco values," the octogenarian candidate said. () ➤ Virginia Gov. body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ Haley on the 22nd Anniversary of September 11 Nikki Haley released the following statement on the 22nd anniversary of the attacks on the World Trade Center. “Twenty-two years ago, the soul of America was shaken in a way we had never felt before. Terrorists came into America and murdered thousands of our citizens on our soil. We will never forget the precious lives lost and the heroes who emerged—the firefighters who rushed into the towers, the airline passengers who gave their lives to save others, and so many who showed their courage on that terrible day. “Today, we have a new generation of young Americans who did not live through the horrors of 9/11. It’s our job to remind them that real evil exists in this world. The strength of America will prevail when we remember we are not immune from countries that want to destroy us. “In spite of the horrors of 9/11, what followed was the best of the American spirit. Americans rallied and united. Men and women, including my husband Michael, enlisted to defend our freedom and defeat evil. We saw a strong and proud America that refused to cower. “Some say our nation is too divided and will never come together like it did in the days following 9/11. I refuse to believe that. Terrorists came into America and murdered thousands of our citizens on our soil. We will never forget the precious lives lost and the heroes who emerged—the firefighters who rushed into the towers, the airline passengers who gave their lives to save others, and so many who showed their courage on that terrible day. “Today, we have a new generation of young Americans who did not live through the horrors of 9/11. It’s our job to remind them that real evil exists in this world. The strength of America will prevail when we remember we are not immune from countries that want to destroy us. “In spite of the horrors of 9/11, what followed was the best of the American spirit. Americans rallied and united. Men and women, including my husband Michael, enlisted to defend our freedom and defeat evil. We saw a strong and proud America that refused to cower. “Some say our nation is too divided and will never come together like it did in the days following 9/11. I refuse to believe that. The American spirit is alive and well—we just need to tap into that spirit and remember how even on our worst day we are blessed to live in America.” Paid for by Nikki Haley for President. www.nikkihaley.com By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided from each of Nikki Haley for President, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, Team Stand For America, SFA Fund, Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Unity without tragedy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
https://www.facebook.com/drboblorinser [https://www.facebook.com/drboblorinser]
Friend,
Today, I write to you with a heavy heart, reflecting on the events of September 11, 2001, which forever changed the landscape of the United States.
The US needs to find unity without tragedy
https://www.facebook.com/drboblorinser [https://www.facebook.com/drboblorinser]
FOLLOW ME [https://www.facebook.com/drboblorinser]
I remember the heartache, anger, and sorrow watching the evening news with my children on Sept. 11, 2001, knowing their world would never be the same. But I’m also reminded of the unity and strength that emerged in the aftermath of 9/11.
Americans stood together, undeterred by our differences, bound by our shared grief, and driven by an unwavering resolve to heal and rebuild. We demonstrated the power of unity, compassion, and resilience that define us as Americans.
Today, we have strayed from that unity. Our nation, so resilient in times of crisis, appears more divided than ever. Political affiliations, ideological differences, and social conflicts have created rifts that threaten the fabric of our great nation.
Looking back at my career as a diplomat in Pakistan, South Korea, Afghanistan, Morocco, and Iraq, I remember the unity of those of us serving with compassion, dedication, and patriotism. Regardless of our differences, we were truly one nation, indivisible. I miss that.
Today, we must reaffirm that we do not need national tragedy to unite us. We can draw from our shared history, values, and dreams to bridge these divides. We can foster conversations that are inclusive and respectful, even amidst disagreement.
We can celebrate our diversity, knowing it strengthens rather than weakens us.
As your congressional candidate in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula, I am committed to driving this change. I strive to cultivate an environment of mutual respect, understanding, and unity because that’s what America deserves.
Let us remember 9/11 not just as a day of immense loss but as a reminder of our capacity for unity and resilience.
In unity,
Bob Lorinser
https://www.facebook.com/drboblorinser [https://www.facebook.com/drboblorinser]

name: Chair Ben Wikler, Wisconsin Democrats
subject: Republicans are attempting to impeach Justice Janet Protasiewicz in Wisconsin:
body:
This is our last stand for democracy.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7b314fbb-a325-44f2-a98d-c6bc70149086/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Hi, Peter. It’s Ben Wikler, Chair of the Democratic Party of Wisconsin. I asked Blue Amp Action if we could reach out about the democracy emergency happening right now in Wisconsin We’ll be honest. When we won the most important election of 2023 and flipped our Supreme Court progressive, we knew Republicans wouldn’t stop there. Now, Wisconsin Republicans are attempting to impeach, convict, and remove newly-elected Justice Janet Protasiewicz from the Supreme Court. [We’re going to ask you to split a $10 donation between the WisDems and Blue Amp Action but let me first tell you why.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7d9554e8-4a28-4518-bdf1-5e649a188ffd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T85f236ca-e7b2-4791-bfa6-d292ea0f7ba9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| In 2020, Wisconsin came the closest of any state to overturning presidential election results. A single vote on the Court stopped Republicans from overturning President Biden’s victory in Wisconsin and handing the whole election to Trump. In 2024, Republicans could try again—and without Justice Protasiewicz on the bench, their next effort to thwart democracy could be successful. The risk is too high—we must stop this threat now before it goes any further. This impeachment threat is a desperate, unconstitutional, unprecedented, and obscene power grab attacking Wisconsin voters, the courts, and our democracy. If Republicans pull this off, we know they’ll attempt to do the same in states like yours. If we want to stop this desperate attack, set an example that Democrats will protect the will of voters, and hold off Republicans’ undemocratic power grab for 2024, then we need to win this fight in Wisconsin now. There is no other option. This is our last stand for democracy. [That’s I’m asking you to chip in a $10 split donation between WisDems and Blue Amp Action to help us win this fight and protect our democracy. Are you in? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6b71f828-1c22-4113-9c06-22a8435a49bd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te39cd85c-50f4-4757-8691-b41974cb1a74/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thank you for your support, Peter. Ben Wikler, Chair of WisDems
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

subject: How Biden's Digital Dollar Destroys Freedom
body:
The 'Digital Dollar' is now a reality.

|
---
# **Financial Freedom in America**
# **will soon be gone!**

**The 'Digital Dollar' is now a reality.** On November 15th, 2022, the Federal Reserve announced they are now testing the **'digital dollar'.** They'll be joined by major banks like Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo. **And you should be scared!** The 'digital dollar' puts all your money in the hands of the government. They'll be able to....
* **Know what's in your accounts and what you buy**
* **Limit what you purchase and the causes you support**
* **Take everything away with the click of a button**

[There is a way to preserve your freedom and protect your wealth.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2fe3cb1028b74a22a24decd1de93ef5f&_e=FsRBemvME2uH3troK0lluDzO2FGgNXhckGDDyXLeI5jSfVsJbE4OjH5j1Jg_PQPSWy4DBpmFlnRGL1fzSIVYAiuVBJrqN4FRHTYMIsm4HKlOV60CshbO4LBwYIMkYEbuVlkPSFzZbzK5pYV6w_CVG2BUxkrxX3HUUGPM911QZYor9gMV62Y9JLP-kuYmhWKnz4mcTUovge5mdz0ckuvFCKU9qEuGCk7LaSk2Xb9txXssdmDAdmeKCpIud1pD4EzplIq0pvceq4V2Nd7GJEjEdWz_iuu2GbMXrXNK-KYvPHGEGJXad3lo6JiVHrek3egtdpohZe9cvchst2sEenx8Lkd0sAkwLcddDqXQRXfZmZFty5A1P58eL1rQs8gaoJVPQFNKNi6w3MJAtkxdLIxImH99m3qGpOPp2c4ubB39n60ZxLo0-Y_XlRCfNl8u68geUjASrOx5zKc-6Ajd62egdhlJPljvGeQVCSSuW0zg3ttxUUJkal1Q57l7hU1RHB9u) Thousands of Americans have already used this **Legal IRS-Proof loophole to move their retirement accounts (IRA,401k,TSP, etc.)** into certain real assets that protect against Biden's 'digital dollar'. body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from the Kiggans for Congress, click here Dear Peter, 22 years ago today, I was sitting in the cockpit of an H-3 on base at NAS Oceana when I heard the news of the World Trade Center terrorist attack. I saw the base prepare for war over the course of a few hours. We all remember exactly where we were and who we were with when the World Trade Center fell. We remember the next plane, hitting closer to home, at the Pentagon. We remember the people who courageously fought the terrorists on United Flight 93. As well as all of the firefighters, police, and first responders who ran toward the burning buildings to rescue the fallen. These horrific attacks shook the foundation of our biggest buildings, but could not shake the foundation of America. I remember driving home from the base later that day and seeing almost every house flying an American flag off their porch. We were united behind our country which was under attack. We need people to remember how it felt to be an American 22 years ago today and make that unity a priority going forward. Never Forget. – Congresswoman Jen Kiggans To ensure you are receiving emails from Kiggans for Congress with minimum to no interruption, please add mailto:info@contact.jenforcongress.com info@contact.jenforcongress.com to your safe sender list, for instructions on how to add a contact, please click https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=0e79a3142514c00d6c95eb0678bf6f502886ed7fbe7a195c42c129c81be504c0b035195da242ef6ef5f7f78018cf42751afbe7db4e1380283e04b08f34a585ff here . name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: Death Certificates
body:
With Jordan B Peterson | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/jbp?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

How will they fudge the numbers? How will they justify again locking businesses down, locking our kids out of school, and imposing tyrannical policies again? Three years ago, I sounded the alarm that government was making doctors count death certificates differently. It was an honor to sit down with renowned clinical psychologist and media figure Jordan B. Peterson to explain how.

[Click the thumbnail below](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=19663cb5ec&e=9828080a05) to watch this critical [ten minute segment](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=7b6678e7dc&e=9828080a05) from the longer podcast I had with him:
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=f5213e2762&e=9828080a05)
---
| This was an interview I did earlier, but it begs the question: will they use the same tactics this time around - especially as the rhetoric ramps up around another COVID pandemic?

Dr. Jordan B. Peterson and I walked through my life in family medicine, all before having my reputation in attacked for purely political reasons. Six investigations across nearly five years and numerous allegations without cohesion, proof, or relation have amounted to nothing. [It's why we're now suing](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=9f0af04df7&e=9828080a05) Keith Ellison and the Board of Medical Practice - for depriving me of my free speech rights.

If it can happen to me, it can happen to you too. You won't want to miss [this critical segment](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=13e989ef33&e=9828080a05) about what I witnessed and what they may very well try again.

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor
---
|
---

[Stop the sale now! ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1977206?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** Fracking can _**trigger earthquakes**_ and its wastewater can contain _**radioactive waste!**_ Not to mention the resulting air pollution and foul odors can cause _**nausea, dizziness, and respiratory illnesses.**_ These are the very real threats that communities in North Dakota, Kansas, New Mexico, and Nevada will face if we don’t stop this lease sale, Friend! The Department of Interior is leasing our public lands to the highest corporate bidder at an ALARMING rate. Every sale we stop helps protect our communities and the beautiful American landscapes we cherish. But **our window to stop this next sale is CLOSING FAST \-- [will you help CANCEL this lease sale of public lands in North Dakota, Kansas, New Mexico, and Nevada before it’s too late? ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1977207?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** ***Your Signature is Missing, Friend*** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1977208?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Take a second to picture the destruction that will take place if we fail to stop this sale. A clear morning on peaceful public grasslands -- suddenly interrupted by _**SCREECHING METAL!**_ High-pressure _**SAND and WATER BLASTED**_ into the ground. Animals scurrying away in terror, sulfurous stench clouding the air.
But there’s good news: Friends of the Earth members like you have helped save acres and acres of public lands before -- that means **your immediate action can help STOP this sale.** [**We need at least 3,392 more signatures by 11:59pm TONIGHT to hit our signature goal and push the DOI to CANCEL this lease sale. Add your name now! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1977209?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1977210?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Nicole Ghio
Fossil fuels program manager,
Friends of the Earth**

name: Robertson For Congress
subject: Mark's Monday Memo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robertson for Congress](https://r20
body:
| | | |
---
# Patriot Day Message
---
Where were you on 9/11? If you're like me, you can remember exactly where you were and what you were doing on September 11, 2001. It was a life-changing day for me.
I was at a conference for financial planners in Salt Lake City. Lesly called me and told me to turn on the TV. Along with all Americans, I was shocked to see what was happening in New York City, Pennsylvania, and Washington DC.
I left the conference immediately and headed home. As you recall, all flights were grounded, so I quickly rented a car for the one-way trip back to Las Vegas. Driving home and not seeing airplane vapor trails in the sky was an eerie feeling. My thoughts were about the safety of my family and what the future might bring.
My oldest son, Steven, had just turned 16 and was starting his junior year in High School. A few years later, he left a full scholarship at Brigham Young University to join the Army. He volunteered to learn Arabic knowing he would be sent to Iraq.
---
| |
---|---
Although I had been out of the Army for twelve years, I rejoined so that I could serve with my son. Shortly afterward, Steven and I both deployed to Iraq. It was an honor for me to serve on the field of battle with my own son. It was terrifying for Lesly. For the entire year we were gone, she flew a flag with two blue stars outside our house.

Fortunately, Steven and I returned home with only minor physical injuries. Steven still carries some disturbing memories of the things he saw and experienced. Many Soldiers and First Responders gave their lives during and after 9/11.

For a while, we were united as Americans. Neighbors looked out for each other while family members were deployed. The political parties paused their bickering. News programs reported the facts without bias. We came together as a nation to protect and serve each other. It was a tragic event, but our unity as a country was heartwarming.

I'm proud to be an American. I love our country and all the good we do in the world. I hope and pray that it will not take another tragedy for us to come together once again as a Nation. Instead of exaggerating our differences, let us look for the many things which unite us. Things like family, freedom, opportunity, and the privilege and blessing of being citizens of the greatest country in the history of the world.

I pray that we will live in such a way that God will continue to bless America - the land that we love.
Your Questions--Mark's Answers
Mark Robertson answers your questions with direct and honest answers. Here are two questions Mark was asked recently:
Q: What would you do about the border? -A.R. A. We must stop the illegal flow of drugs, guns, and gangs into our community. I support completing physical barriers to prevent people from crossing illegally. We must remove all incentives for people to enter our country illegally by ending the practice of giving health, education, and welfare benefits to those here illegally. We must end the practice of releasing people into the United States who have broken our laws. We must enforce and strengthen current laws. We are $33 trillion in debt. Our Social Security and Medicare programs are going broke. We do not have the money to care for our own citizens let alone people who break our laws to get here. That being said, I am pro-immigration.
Q. What would you do to fix our broken immigration system? -A.R. A. I am pro-immigration, but we, the American people, should decide who can come into our country. It shouldn't be people who break our laws to get here. We need young skilled workers who contribute to our economy. In 1940, there were 42 workers for every retiree; today there are only 3 workers per retiree. On average, 10,000 baby boomers retire every day. We need young workers who pay taxes and don't burden our welfare system. We should make it impossible to enter illegally and easy for people with needed skills to immigrate. Our current immigration system is broken. I will work hard to fix it.
Please share this message with friends and neighbors. Have questions for me? Simply reply to this email to ask me a question.
---

body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 11, 2023

Trump prosecutors
make a huge mistake they will forever regret
The Trump indictment case in
Georgia is well underway. And we already have the first major
mistake.

Because Trump prosecutors are
going to forever regret this error they made in court.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Joe Biden fell seriously
ill when he heard what his enemies were about to do

President Biden just
got played. He has no idea what to do next.
➞ Continue Reading

Ron DeSantis went nuclear
after being hit with a heart-stopping ambush

Radical Leftists will
do anything to go after someone they view as a threat. That
includes attacking a prominent Republican presidential candidate.
➞ Continue Reading

Joe Biden is fuming after
being threatened by this lead Republican

The Biden
administration has shown that their job isn't to make friends.
They've proven that with one disastrous decision after another.

➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across

name: Seth Dillon, Babylon Bee
subject: Do you know if you’re a man or a woman?
body:
Our one-of-a-kind guide will do the trick!
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zihaiggnjk21mlkljijjvbnkaj3ce1unh1rmlle0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tr0mlqj4sj0slo68pli6sp6dclkc1rm4sthmqr72obleioj6d1n61gnccjlcsrjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1rm8phlcsqr6ptim5j30s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hhm9ob1c5hm4p36c8iv0)

---
|
---
Friend, If you’ve been living under a rock for the last few years, you probably think there are only **TWO** genders. Boy oh boy, would you be _WRONG_. But, don’t fear, The Babylon Bee is here! **[I’ll send you one of the first copies of The Babylon Bee Guide to Gender — to learn about the progressively insane slide into more and more genders that has spiraled out of control in America — when you secure your Premium Membership to The Babylon Bee today.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z08ppolqs3hc0fgsvnqeleissga28bi7fj3hjstg_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5gm6oj4cph2bs)**
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zp03sf02f0s23kjgg1m7miulbtikuqkc4bpscqvo_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5gm6oj4cph2bs)
---
[Secure Your Copy of the Guide to Gender >>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zbquq7b2va46epi6ecsp2uk33i4114bl410mspk0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5gm6oj4cph2bs)
---
While our _Guide to Gender_ won’t be released until this fall, I wanted to offer you the opportunity to secure one before they’re available for sale. _As you can see for yourself, the beautiful and colorful cover will capture your attention — and your heart._ _The Babylon Bee’s Guide to Gender_ will take you on a journey to the two “original gangsta” genders — man and woman — then introduce you to the limitless cornucopia of gender identities you could choose. Like many Americans, you likely don’t even know if you’re a man or a woman. It is just so hard to define what a woman is, that we’re here to educate you. You’re welcome! **[Join today as a Premium Subscriber for just $9 a month and I’ll send you our Guide to Gender as soon as it’s off the press in the coming months.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zi93p983ijsvis6u0dgb6n54r0j32tbhkcdofc8o_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5gm6oj4cph2bs)**
---
[Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zbb66v7p92qg1mski77sovk0fsjvnavee54k0gso_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5gm6oj4cph2bs)
---
The incredibly useful — and always correct — Wikipedia states that “Most cultures use a gender binary, in which gender is divided into two categories” and, “When a baby is born, society allocated the child to one gender or the other.” **But, given Wikipedia likely doesn’t want to be canceled, they don’t stop at that old-fashioned and outdated definition._Thank goodness for that. _** In fact, Wikipedia lists more than _80 possible gender identities_ , including non-binary, transgender, cis, genderfluid, polygender, and so many more. I can assure you though that your “gender education” needs a far more advanced, researched, and thorough introduction than what a simple little website can provide. **Our one-of-a-kind guide will do the trick! ** **[Your Premium Membership to The Babylon Bee will include ad-free browsing, 20% off store purchases, access to the Bee’s headline forum, and more. For a limited time, when you become a subscriber, I’ll also send you a copy of The Babylon Bee Guide to Gender as a thank you.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zumbnkpk2b6r7fr6bjlcmbuh0csicok697q3gok0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5gm6oj4cph2bs)**
---
[Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zjctun51fm522er76qcjc35gm5au48bdokfud1po_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5gm6oj4cph2bs)
---
**A limited number of copies will be available, so don’t miss your chance to get this incredible work of art that you can both read and proudly display on your coffee table.** Cheers! Seth Dillon

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: In remembrance.
body:
Team,

Although 22 years have passed since the September 11th attacks, today will always remain a day of profound national sorrow.

The evil that struck our nation that morning tried to extinguish everything we hold dear — our freedoms; our tolerance of different ways of life; our fight for equality for all people, regardless of gender, ethnicity or belief. They failed.

I'm holding in my heart the families and loved ones of the nearly 3,000 victims, as well as all of the Americans we've lost in the War on Terror. They will never be forgotten.

With you,

— Marcy

name: Liz
subject: Remembering September 11, 2001
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIZ FOR NY
body:
| |
---
On September 11, 2001, I remember looking up at a perfect blue sky on my walk to work. I didn’t know then that for the rest of my life a perfect blue sky would feel ominous. My route often took me past the Armory, which was unremarkable that morning. By the time I arrived at my office, the world had shifted. The man who would shortly become my father-in-law had gone to work in the World Trade Center that morning. He had been there in 1993 when it was bombed, so in the early confusion he didn’t hesitate to leave. I was fortunate that day. I did not lose someone very close to me, but I know many who did. At work, through a window, I watched as the first tower fell. Many of my coworkers couldn’t get home, so I brought them back to my apartment where we watched news coverage and tried to make sense of what had happened to our city. Days later, when we all started to go back to work, I intentionally passed the Armory every day so I could look at the fliers of the missing. I wanted to see and mourn those we’d lost – to look at their pictures and think about their families and loved ones. When my mother died less than a year later, someone told me that with some time and distance, the sickness and sadness at the end will fade and the good memories will come back. I hope everyone who lost someone on September 11 or in the years following has had that experience and can find joy, comfort, and peace in remembering. May their memories be blessings. Every September 11, I think about the bravery and selflessness of so many in New York City that day: firefighters, police, EMTs and just regular New Yorkers who ran in to help others get out. I don’t turn on the television. Instead, I revisit the Armory in my mind. Wishing you peace on this solemn day, Liz
