name: Michael B. Moore for South Carolina
subject: "On Message" From Michael B. Moore
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104585/images/Logo_white_rectangle.jpg]
On Message
from Michael B. Moore
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter]
Welcome to our campaign newsletter.
We're happy you're here.
We'll use this space to keep you updated on all the latest stories, events and opportunities related to Michael's run for South Carolina's 1st congressional district.
Stay tuned — we'll be in your inbox every Monday.
See you on the trail.
Join our movement [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter]
In the news
https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/25/dems-house-majority-the-south-00107401 [https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/25/dems-house-majority-the-south-00107401]
POLITICO [https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/25/dems-house-majority-the-south-00107401]
The national media is paying more and more attention to our race every day. Last week, POLITICO [https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/25/dems-house-majority-the-south-00107401] reported that Democrats "are entertaining a once-unlikely prospect: retaking the House majority by winning in the South."
The story specifically highlighted the SC-01 racial gerrymandering case that will soon come before the Supreme Court [https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2023/7/17/2181780/-My-swing-district-has-its-date-before-the-Supreme-Court] .
Per POLITICO: "It's impossible to know how many seats could become competitive, but the party is hoping a handful may come into play and that new maps could even threaten the likes of ... Nancy Mace."
https://rollcall.com/2023/07/25/many-redistricting-redos-pending-but-24-election-outlook-unclear/ [https://rollcall.com/2023/07/25/many-redistricting-redos-pending-but-24-election-outlook-unclear/]
Roll Call [https://rollcall.com/2023/07/25/many-redistricting-redos-pending-but-24-election-outlook-unclear/]
Roll Call [https://rollcall.com/2023/07/25/many-redistricting-redos-pending-but-24-election-outlook-unclear/] ran a story explaining how new congressional maps "could be drawn in time to change the electoral landscape in 2024, when Democrats need a net gain of just five seats to take control of the House."
According to Roll Call, the SC-01 Supreme Court case "may also impact the federal redistricting litigation in Florida, which involves similar racial gerrymandering claims."
https://charlestoncitypaper.com/2023/07/21/our-view-high-court-should-force-remapping-effort/ [https://charlestoncitypaper.com/2023/07/21/our-view-high-court-should-force-remapping-effort/]
Charleston City Paper [https://charlestoncitypaper.com/2023/07/21/our-view-high-court-should-force-remapping-effort/]
And back home in the Lowcountry, the Charleston City Paper [https://charlestoncitypaper.com/2023/07/21/our-view-high-court-should-force-remapping-effort/] published an editorial calling on the Supreme Court to redraw the lines of SC-01 — so that the map "reflects the true electoral nature of our lower coast, not a district that the GOP bleached by moving thousands of Black voters to other districts."
On the picket line
https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2023/7/25/2183281/-Why-won-t-Nancy-Mace-stand-up-for-these-striking-Waffle-House-workers [https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2023/7/25/2183281/-Why-won-t-Nancy-Mace-stand-up-for-these-striking-Waffle-House-workers]
Union of Southern Service Workers [https://ussw.org/]
Michael expressed solidarity with the workers of the Waffle House on Garners Ferry Road in Columbia, South Carolina, who began a three-day strike [https://twitter.com/RaiseUptheSouth/status/1677737443145949184] on this month after delivering to management their petition to organize.
As a business executive with nearly four decades of private sector experience — including several years as a leader in South Carolina's food industry — Michael knows firsthand that employees throughout any organization deserve fair pay and safe working conditions.
https://holycitysinner.com/2023/07/22/moore-shows-support-for-striking-waffle-house-workers/ [https://holycitysinner.com/2023/07/22/moore-shows-support-for-striking-waffle-house-workers/]
Holy City Sinner [https://holycitysinner.com/2023/07/22/moore-shows-support-for-striking-waffle-house-workers/]
Michael steadfastly stands behind the striking Waffle House staff as they seek sensible concessions from management and strive for a better quality of life for restaurant workers in South Carolina.
He also urged Nancy Mace — who often mentions her past experience as a Waffle House waitress [https://twitter.com/NancyMace/status/1451926458994151427?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw%7Ctwcamp%5Etweetembed%7Ctwterm%5E1451926458994151427%7Ctwgr%5Eb80d1ca7caee292360b8edb17aecebf62c52def8%7Ctwcon%5Es1_&ref_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.dailykos.com%2Fstories%2F2023%2F7%2F25%2F2183281%2F-Why-won-t-Nancy-Mace-stand-up-for-these-striking-Waffle-House-workers] on the campaign trail — to similarly endorse the demands of those on strike.
In the arena
https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/27/nancy-mace-child-care-republicans-00108486 [https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/27/nancy-mace-child-care-republicans-00108486]
Rep. Nancy Mace [https://twitter.com/RepNancyMace/status/1684928879235072000?s=20]
Nancy Mace attended a POLITICO event [https://www.politico.com/news/2023/07/27/nancy-mace-child-care-republicans-00108486] last week, where she warned that Republicans need to refocus on "child care, maternal care, prenatal care [and] abortion" if they want to keep control of the House.
It was more cheap talk from Mace, who — time and again — has flip-flopped on the issues that matter most to women and working families.
https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2023/jul/15/nancy-mace-abortion-vote-hypocrisy-republicans?emci=9f4780c9-692d-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid= [https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2023/jul/15/nancy-mace-abortion-vote-hypocrisy-republicans?emci=9f4780c9-692d-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=]
The Guardian [https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2023/jul/15/nancy-mace-abortion-vote-hypocrisy-republicans]
Here are the facts:
*
In
2019,
Nancy
Mace
voted
for
a
six-week
abortion
ban
[https://www.scstatehouse.gov/votehistory.php?KEY=16575]
in
the
South
Carolina
legislature.
*
In
2021,
she
voted
against
the
expansion
of
the
child
tax
credit
[https://mace.house.gov/media/press-releases/mace-so-called-american-rescue-plan-was-never-about-covid-19-relief]
in
the
American
Rescue
Plan.
*
In
January,
she
co-sponsored
H.R.
7
[https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2023/7/5/2179435/-My-opponent-is-co-sponsoring-another-extreme-bill]
,
which
would
make
health
coverage
that
includes
reproductive
care
ineligible
for
federal
funding.
*
In
July,
she
voted
for
an
NDAA
amendment
that
makes
it
harder
for
servicewomen
to
access
health
care
[https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2023/7/17/2181768/-Nancy-Mace-called-it-an-asshole-move-Then-she-voted-for-it]
—
a
policy
she
herself
called
an
"asshole
move."
Nothing about Nancy Mace's record is pro-children or pro-women. She should stop pretending otherwise.
On social media
https://twitter.com/michael_b_moore [https://twitter.com/michael_b_moore]
Michael surpassed 6,600 Twitter followers [https://twitter.com/michael_b_moore] this week! Can you help us reach 7,500 followers before the end of the month?
And if you aren't already, make sure to keep up with our campaign on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/MichaelBMooreforCongress] , Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/mbm_sc01/] , Threads [https://www.threads.net/@mbm_sc01] , LinkedIn [https://www.linkedin.com/company/moore4sc/about/] and TikTok. [https://www.tiktok.com/@michaelbmoore4sc]
From the trail
https://join.legionm.com/robert-smalls-defiant/ [https://join.legionm.com/robert-smalls-defiant/]
Michael had a fun weekend at San Diego Comic-Con, where he helped some talented artists promote a forthcoming graphic novel [https://join.legionm.com/robert-smalls-defiant/] about his great-great-grandfather: Civil War hero and Recontruction-era Congressman Robert Smalls.
https://screenrant.com/defiant-the-story-of-robert-smalls-sdcc-interview/ [https://screenrant.com/defiant-the-story-of-robert-smalls-sdcc-interview/]
At a time when Republican politicians like Ron DeSantis are seeking to rewrite our nation's history [https://www.msnbc.com/the-reidout/reidout-blog/ron-desantis-florida-slavery-curriculum-rcna96052] — exploiting partisan divides at the expense of our children's education — Michael believes it's more important than ever for leaders to embrace the totality of America's legacy.
https://blackgirlnerds.com/the-creative-team-behind-defiant-the-robert-smalls-story/ [https://blackgirlnerds.com/the-creative-team-behind-defiant-the-robert-smalls-story/]
Part of that important work is elevating the stories of lesser-known patriots like Robert Smalls, who — in the face of unfathomable hardship — never stopped working to make America a more perfect Union [https://www.nps.gov/people/robert-smalls.htm] .
Michael is proud to be seeking the same House seat that his great-great-grandfather held nearly 140 years ago.
On our team
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter]
There's so much work to do, and we're only just getting started.
Join us in our fight to flip this swing district.
Together — indivisible — we'll build a brighter future for South Carolina.
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter] Volunteer [https://www.michaelbmoore.com/volunteer]

subject: MISSING NFL Quarterback Sparks Fears Over Health
body:

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I want to know your thoughts
body:
I’m reaching out today about an important issue that's close to my heart

|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2thqj7pm4s0ml0kn8klseel7giiakri95r5vp9o_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5gm1pj4s5h2bs)
---
| Dear Fellow Patriot,

I hope this message finds you well. I'm reaching out today about an important issue that's close to my heart and, I believe, relevant to all of us.

In the current climate, our religious liberty, a foundational tenet of our nation, faces an increasing number of challenges. These are especially concerning for those of us who hold to biblical and faith-based values. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo0bil7502f6spck5rjvik4523i7l6ftvj9qevk8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5gm1pj4s5h2bs)
With societal shifts and new legal precedents, including the recently passed Respect for Marriage Act, the ability to practice and express our faith openly may face unprecedented threats.

These changes may allow the federal government to exert pressure on schools, businesses, and organizations that adhere to their religious beliefs. I fear this might lead to intensified legal persecution against those wishing to live according to their faith.

As engaged citizens, it's crucial we understand this situation and its potential impact on our religious freedom.

Please take a moment to share your insights by completing this 2-minute survey: [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztle4i9p90jcldcscbmrcqa3kplphfefea7pf6a0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5gm1pj4s5h2bs)

Your contribution will guide our efforts to alert fellow Americans of the threats to our religious liberty and defend our First Amendment rights.

Let's uphold the integrity of our Constitution and protect the pillars that make our nation great: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Yours sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Moving forward is our greatest strength
body:
On this day 22 years ago...
Hi Derek,
22 years ago on this day, our country experienced one of its darkest moments. Over 3,000 Americans lost their lives on September 11, 2001. So many first responders rushed into harm's way to save lives, uncertain if they would make it out alive. Americans came together to protect the values that define us and make us the greatest country on earth.
The events of that day and the ensuing heroism had a profound impact on me as a senior in high school right here in Western PA. The feeling of unity, now so distant, was everywhere.
**I felt a duty to serve. So I did. I entered the Naval Academy the following year and went on to deploy three times as an officer.**
Today, we remember all those who we lost that harrowing day. I'm also reminded of all the servicemembers, including friends, who took the call to action to put on the uniform, ultimately giving so much to this country that we love. We must never forget the unimaginable toll of war.
I have dedicated my life to stepping up for our country, Derek, and I won't ever abandon my values and those who have served this country. That's why I ran for Congress in the first place. Moving forward is only possible when we all step up together.
Very respectfully,
Chris

name: Ashley
subject: What patriotism actually looks like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
I was in my 8th grade Reading class when terrorists hijacked planes and killed nearly 3,000 Americans. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69535059/426466525/-1962024584?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20230911_na_neverforget_cand_kw_30da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzViN2M2Mi05ZDUwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Svvc4srqW5kTgM8CT7ErFfqafPKjzN8_mvD-uMUsfnY=)
---
Team, I was in my 8th grade reading class when terrorists hijacked planes and killed nearly 3,000 Americans. I was only 13 at the time – I didn't know what terrorism was or why people had done this to our country. Even the adults around me couldn't seem to fully grasp what had happened. But I’ll never forget the countless heroes who stepped up to help others in need — firefighters, paramedics, doctors, law enforcement, and volunteers. People who flew to New York and DC, spending days on top of the rubble trying to find survivors. Folks held blood drives and fundraisers across the country to send aid. **Those acts of service and patriotism are a big part of why I enlisted in the Army just a few years later.** **And it’s why I’m running for office now.** We need leaders like those brave heroes — who love this country and its people more than themselves. Who would risk their own lives to find their fellow Americans under the rubble. Yet right now, we have elected leaders who won’t risk losing some campaign cash in order to stand up against far-right extremists who wish to tear down our democracy. We have leaders who fear Donald Trump more than they love our country. As you reflect on the tragic events of 22 years ago and what followed, I hope you’ll remember the courage so many people showed that day. And I hope you will wonder where we, as a country, will find that courage again. Respectfully, Ashley 🚁 | | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA.

name: American Update
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676146%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eDfgK2TCy8Iga4QrnM4fAw&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676147%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gdGSnW3xLI%2fLdBMNuKbOZg&sysid=1) [NO](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676148%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Lr5OArLpRy6ldBpoH8JGdA&sysid=1) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676149%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CmG8r5c7oL2QgTloQ4cXow&sysid=1)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676140%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BXM4hSuc9IpOC3C%2bRYb%2bXA&sysid=1)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

American Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: I'll Never Forget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | Peter, We all know where we were and what we were doing 22 years ago today America changed forever on that fateful day.

On September 11, 2001, almost 3,000 Americans lost their lives, and countless first responders are still suffering the effects of this tragic attack.

But, through the indomitable American spirit, our Country survived. Our first responders and military active duty and veterans are living proof of our resilience and “can do” attitude every day.

I believe that this spirit is woven into the fabric of who we are as people and as a country.

I’m proud to have served the greatest country on Earth, and I will never forget everyone who gave their lives for it.

I’m not afraid to say it: I’m honored to be an American.

Thank you, and God bless the United States of America. In Liberty,
---
---
CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET)
---

name: Senator Brad Pfaff
subject: Cancelling your vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pfaff for State Senate
body:
Wisconsin elected a new Supreme Court majority, and now Republicans want to throw our votes out? | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69535976/426468385/1529762909?emci=9fc913d0-21ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=%7B%7BContactsEmailID%7D%7D&refcode=em-9-9-2023&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGJmZjExZi1hMzUwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=85UdI7hdQbuaJtIBSansa90VJS5YUNHDHXcTaRWXVCI=) | You have been with me through elections we have won and lost. We all want to win, but when we lose, I was taught that you go home and work harder to get the job done. Now, Republicans lost an election for Wisconsin's Supreme Court this past spring. Instead of doing what all of us were taught when we were kids about losing, they are talking about throwing the votes of over a million Wisconsinites away and impeaching our new supreme court justice. All before she has heard a single case. [This is flat out wrong. We need you to step up and show them that this is not the Wisconsin way of doing things. Can you help me fight back with anything you can give?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69535979/426468388/-225449112?refcode=em-9-9-2023&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGJmZjExZi1hMzUwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=85UdI7hdQbuaJtIBSansa90VJS5YUNHDHXcTaRWXVCI=) I recently announced that I was running for re-election to the Wisconsin State Senate because we have so much we need to accomplish together. The other side knows this, and they are talking about throwing away your vote and the vote of so many others because they want abortion to stay illegal and they want to hold working men and women back in Wisconsin. [We can't let that happen and I need your help to hold them accountable. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69535982/426468391/-225449112?refcode=em-9-9-2023&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGJmZjExZi1hMzUwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=85UdI7hdQbuaJtIBSansa90VJS5YUNHDHXcTaRWXVCI=) We have the potential the bring real change to Wisconsin, and no matter where we are we need to all be in this together as Republicans try and cancel the last election. Thanks so much for your support. Brad Pfaff
---
* * *
Brad Pfaff represents Wisconsin State Senate District 32. As a proud son of the rolling hills, coulees, and valleys of northern La Crosse County where he was raised on his family's dairy farm, he's dedicated to finding commonsense solutions for our community's challenges. We can move Wisconsin forward, together. Thank you for being on our team, we really appreciate you, team! If you don't want to miss any of my hard-hitting reports and commentary, please subscribe today!_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ZCHBhxVissTzlch3ACthHfY2NrerSR8gnARWB9mF1yI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=136929837)
Today marks 22 years since the 9/11/01 Islamic Terrorist attacks that forever changed our country, effectively creating the launch pad for the creation of the modern day American police state, disguised as the "War on Terror".
If we look back in time, we see that the Patriot Act was nothing more than a template for how the US Government was going to make the people comfortable with a surveillance state and a weaponized DOJ.
Over these last 22 years, we have watched the US government befriend Islamic terrorists, work with them, celebrate them, while the White, Christian, American patriot is now viewed as the biggest terrorism threat in America, according to our own DOJ.
I was 8 years old when the towers fell. I, like many other Americans, was taught and raised during the War on Terror to view Islam as a threat to our national security. As a child, my thoughts on the world were still forming.
Before that day, I felt safe and at peace with our nation and never thought that something so horrible would be possible.
But on September 11, 2001, my world view changed forever.
And 22 years later, my world view has also changed as I now realize the American government poses a bigger threat to our freedoms and way of life than any Islamic terrorist organization ever could.
There is no denying that America has changed forever. While the world mourned and we still mourn for the 2,996 victims murdered on that day, those tasked with the future security of America geared up.
Young men and women enlisted in the military, willing to risk their lives to protect us - and many of them have lost their lives, their limbs or their loved ones.
And for what? A disastrous Afghanistan pullout? The failed experiment of trying to export Democracy and human rights to Islamic nations governed by Sharia Law? Or the shredding of our Constitutional Rights by our own elected officials?
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ZCHBhxVissTzlch3ACthHfY2NrerSR8gnARWB9mF1yI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=136929837)
On 9/11/01, Americans were encouraged to be excessively patriotic, and were celebrated and rewarded for being patriots. Now, being a patriot seems like the quickest way to be designated as a racist or a domestic terrorist by those in power in our own, self proclaimed "free" country.
That's why we can never forget the lives lost on 9/11 with every step we take to make sure terrorism at the hands of Islamic terrorists, as well as the many anti-American terrorists in our own federal government, never takes another American life.
So much has radically changed in our nation within the last 22 years.
Our vigilance has taken a step back while political correctness, toxic and Lethal diversity, and tolerance have moved to the foreground.
My world view remains the same as the 8 year-old girl who watched those planes hit the World Trade Towers that day in that I still view America as a nation under attack.
But this time, our biggest enemy isn't hiding in a cave in a far away land speaking Arabic. Our biggest enemy is sitting in a Building located at 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, plotting and planning the eternal destruction of the United States of America and American Patriots with the tools made available through the creation of the Patriot Act.
Or, perhaps the people operating behind the curtains in the big White building located at 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue have always been our enemy.
What was sold to us 22 years ago today as a response to keep us safe from terrorism has been viciously flipped on us to treat us as if we are the real terrorists.
I never thought that 22 years after 9/11 I'd be saying that the biggest terrorists are those within our own government and the top brass of the FBI and DOJ.
Perhaps many of us as children, growing up, became pawns for the US government's War on Terror propaganda machine.
But I see it. And 22 years later, I still feel profoundly affected by 9/11/01 and the horrific implications it has had on our country. I will never forget being a child of the War on Terror, groomed into being a patriot, only to be treated like a terrorist in my own country because I chose to live a life as an American Patriot.
I refuse to forget the thousands who lost their lives fighting to protect the idea of freedom. It is the idea of freedom, which our own elected officials aren't committed to protecting on the home front, while they simultaneously send American youth overseas to die in vain.
Freedom. It's what they say we are fighting to preserve. But, did we truly ever have it?
I refuse to forget.

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Peter, will you personally endorse Ruben Gallego?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
When you step up to say you’re with Ruben it makes a big impact.
#

**Ruben Gallego Personal Endorsement Tracker
September 2023
Supporter: Peter Willis
Your Endorsement: No Signature on Record
Action Requested: Add your name today!**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_endorse_ruben_sept23/?source=em230911-1-n&refcode2=1177.734936.z8uuMp&akid=1177%2E734936%2Ez8uuMp)
Peter -
Our FEC deadline is quickly approaching, and it’s crucial that we make sure Ruben has the support of a big — and growing — team behind him.
Why? Here are two reasons:
First, because our fundraising isn’t where it needs to be — especially ahead of this deadline. So we need to make sure that even if folks aren’t donating, they still have Ruben's back.
And second, because winning a race as important as this takes not only a lot of work but a lot of support. Not just from folks in Arizona, but across the country. And when you step up to say you’re with Ruben, it makes a big impact.
So, we need more people to personally endorse our campaign to help Ruben take this seat back from Kyrsten Sinema and defend it from Kari Lake. Close to 2000 people have endorsed Ruben so far this month. We want to get to 5000 by September 30th.
That’s why we’re reaching out to you. We haven’t seen you on our list of folks who proudly say they stand with Ruben this month.
[**Will you add your name to say you personally endorse Ruben Gallego’s re-election campaign? It’s important for Ruben and our team to know that we can count on you to fight by our side and win this race.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_endorse_ruben_sept23/?source=em230911-1-n&refcode2=1177.734936.z8uuMp&akid=1177%2E734936%2Ez8uuMp)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_endorse_ruben_sept23/?source=em230911-1-n&refcode2=1177.734936.z8uuMp&akid=1177%2E734936%2Ez8uuMp)
These personal endorsements might seem like a small act, but they’re important. They help us get to our ultimate goal: Electing Ruben to the Senate so he can fight for working families and defend our country from the conspiracy theorists and election-deniers in the GOP.
So, thank you in advance for adding your name,
Team Gallego

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=1177%2E734936%2Ez8uuMp). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1177_734936_z8uuMp&akid=1177%2E734936%2Ez8uuMp)

name: Tennessee Voter Project
subject: Endorsement Alert: Michalyn Easter-Thomas for Memphis City Council
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
September 11, 2023
Dear Friend,
TVP is pleased to Michalyn Easter-Thomas for Memphis City Council District 7.
Michalyn brings fresh energy and a grassroots perspective to the Council, with a background of fighting gentrification and promoting progressive partnerships in North Memphis.
Michalyn has translated her years of grassroots experience into real wins for her community. In her first term, she secured funding to build a grocery store in a food desert in her district, criminal justice reform, and transparency in the redistricting process.
HELP TVP SUPPORT MICHALYN EASTER-THOMAS FOR MEMPHIS CITY COUNCIL [https://bit.ly/tvpformichalyn]
Tennessee Voter Project is proud to support Michalyn Easter-Thomas for Memphis City Council District 7.
Election Day is October 5th. Early voting starts September 15 and ends September 30th.
You can learn more about Michalyn here [https://www.michalynformemphis.com/] . We hope you'll join TVP to rally behind Michalyn and the leadership District 7 deserves. [https://bit.ly/tvpformichalyn]
Thanks for your support,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff

name: American Update
subject: Hearing Aids Just Got Their Biggest Upgrade Yet..
body:
Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids.

| [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676257%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=w%2bNfHHJEP5Rt%2bfN50UxAaA&sysid=1)
---
| 2 Germans are crushing the market with these powerful hearing aids
---
[ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676258%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0t15HvP4LUYUIROJJZNZ3w&sysid=1)
Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius have been creating successful businesses since college. Now they lead [ hear.com](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676259%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f87iiygyDIVQ%2b2u5aViYXA&sysid=1), the fastest growing hearing aid company in the world. This is their story.

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they are still big and ugly. However, Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius wanted to change this perception with **a revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers** formerly from Siemens. After many years of research and development, this team of engineers came up with a game-changing hearing aid that's completely crushing the market with powerful German technology.

**The result:** A hearing device that packs cutting-edge technology in a design so small, it completely disappears inside the ear. It's called the Horizon Mini by [ hear.com](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676259%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f87iiygyDIVQ%2b2u5aViYXA&sysid=1).
[ Check if you qualify ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676250%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5Xfo5RyALmQ98cqhM%2bz4iA&sysid=1)
[ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676258%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0t15HvP4LUYUIROJJZNZ3w&sysid=1)
Horizon Mini comes with smartphone connectivity, allowing you to control the device with your iPhone or Android. In addition, this new device uses a unique algorithm that is clinically proven to deliver better than normal hearing. You will notice remarkable improvements in your ability to clearly understand speech, even in noisy environments like a busy restaurant.

Limited no-risk trials now available

It's really no surprise that this level of innovation is changing lives all over the world. People are experiencing the everyday benefits of this amazing device with [ hear.com](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676259%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f87iiygyDIVQ%2b2u5aViYXA&sysid=1)'s **45-day no-risk trial.**
[ Check if you qualify ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676250%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5Xfo5RyALmQ98cqhM%2bz4iA&sysid=1)

American Update

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
I’m reaching out today about an important issue that's close to my heart

|
---
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zchkekk37gle33fltsud2modrqb7r0eebhvs2mng_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5im2oj0cph2bs)
---
| Dear Fellow Patriot,

I hope this message finds you well. I'm reaching out today about an important issue that's close to my heart and, I believe, relevant to all of us.

In the current climate, our religious liberty, a foundational tenet of our nation, faces an increasing number of challenges. These are especially concerning for those of us who hold to biblical and faith-based values. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zusr0j6iqacaa0h5p3va5c1rdimppv0f4j40ut0o_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5im2oj0cph2bs)
With societal shifts and new legal precedents, including the recently passed Respect for Marriage Act, the ability to practice and express our faith openly may face unprecedented threats.

These changes may allow the federal government to exert pressure on schools, businesses, and organizations that adhere to their religious beliefs. I fear this might lead to intensified legal persecution against those wishing to live according to their faith.

As engaged citizens, it's crucial we understand this situation and its potential impact on our religious freedom.

Please take a moment to share your insights by completing this 2-minute survey: [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsk233nbmqriodftqn874fitqb23h5aql9gqrscg_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5im2oj0cph2bs)

Your contribution will guide our efforts to alert fellow Americans of the threats to our religious liberty and defend our First Amendment rights.

Let's uphold the integrity of our Constitution and protect the pillars that make our nation great: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Yours sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

Deroy Murdock
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Matt Hoskins
subject: The Post-McConnell Era
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
Fellow Conservative:

| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Senator Mitch McConnell (R-KY) had another scary episode during a recent press conference in Kentucky.

It’s the second event of this kind within weeks and has many asking whether it’s time for the Senate Republican Leader to step down.
---
---
_Senator Mitch McConnell in Covington, KY._
---
One thing is becoming clear: **the Mitch McConnell era is quickly coming to an end.**

The big question is what kind of Senate will exist when he is gone.

_Will it be more of the same where the leadership plots ways to undermine our principles and “crush” our candidates?_

_Or will new leadership rise up that represents the voters and truly fights for less government and more freedom for all Americans?_

It is up to us to determine the answer.

Rather than leaving the outcome to chance, we must lock arms and work harder than ever to elect principled leaders who have proven their willingness to fight for our values.

**[Please take action now and support the Senate Conservatives Fund and our priority candidates before the end of the month.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zklcnesg2epjn8a0l3jshai6u2q6n0to84k465tg_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5im2oj3clh2bs)** _SCF will pay all process fees and transfer 100% of your candidate contributions directly to their campaigns._
---
---
We have been working with grassroots conservatives for years to stop Mitch McConnell Republicans from destroying our country, and now our efforts are needed more than ever.

Together, we can shape the Post-McConnell Senate into something that makes a lasting impact on the lives of Americans.

Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to help build a conservative Senate. Sincerely,
---
---
Matt Hoskins Senior Advisor Senate Conservatives Fund P.S. We are trying to raise $100,000 for our candidates in September. **[Check our progress](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh4bldmpibrkqg3sujat33cpn0k5n02otchq0r7g_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5im2oj3clh2bs) **and chip in to help us reach our goal!
---
|
---
**END OF THE MONTH** **COUNTDOWN**

|
---

name: Zak Malamed
subject: Choosing hope over fear
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
Twenty-two years ago today, the world changed forever.

Although I was in second grade, I remember that day like it was yesterday.

When you’re young you remember the small things: My father holding me as we hurried home from school, SportsCenter canceling its broadcast, my mother telling me the next day that she did not want me leaving the house.

But I will never forget the feeling I had seeing my parents' worried faces or watching my hometown disappear into a cloud of smoke.

From sleepless nights to “terror threat level” tickers on the right-hand corner of each news channel, it seemed that fear had taken over.

But there was something else, too.

As the days went by, friends and family would share stories – like how my uncle narrowly escaped from midtown or how our cousins went to Ground Zero to help clear the rubble each day.

Those visits felt different. I felt closer to my neighbors and loved ones than I ever have, as if the walls we had put up over time had come down on that fateful day.

People hugged each other a little longer. At baseball games we didn’t cheer for our team, but instead the entire stadium would erupt in boisterous chants of “USA! USA!”

Petty differences were put aside and people of all races, creeds, identities, financial means all came together to rebuild.

We all felt the pull of patriotism and the promise of hope.

So today, I’m going to hug my parents a little tighter, reach out to my loved ones, and remember the sense of pride I felt to be a New Yorker – and an American.

I want to thank the brave firefighters, police officers, and first responders of our incredible community and offer my sincerest condolences to everybody who lost someone special on that day.

Today, I pray that we all have the strength to choose hope over fear.

With gratitude,
Zak
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

name: Emilia Sykes
subject: Reaching out to you on the 22nd anniversary of 9/11
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69548526/426498518/-1657784636?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWY2MTAwMC1hZDUwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S6Ug7wzOXn3ksp1pkuAY8e_rCFV2Pfv6SdwdGLg-C1M=&emci=24272824-a950-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=29f61000-ad50-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=11703046) Dear Peter,

I’m sure as many of us awoke this morning, the first thing in our minds was remembering where we were or what we were doing when the twin towers fell twenty-two years ago today, on September 11, 2001.

I will never forget the feelings of pain, shock, and loss that gripped our nation. But I will also never forget how, in the face of this unimaginable pain, **Americans came together in support of one another.**

In New York City, brave first responders risked their own lives to save the lives of others. Outside of New York, communities united to lean on one another through seemingly insurmountable pain and fear. **And across the country, we united through patriotism and resilience, vowing to never forget while we stepped forward into an uncertain future.**

Now 22 years later, I hope you’ll join me in honoring the bravery and heroism of first responders and men and women in uniform across the country – some of whom made the ultimate sacrifice on September 11, 2001. _We are forever indebted to their service, and their memory reminds us that freedom isn’t free._

In remembrance,

Emilia
---

| Emilia Sykes is running for re-election in Ohio's 13th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit [EmiliaSykesForCongress.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69548527/426498519/-1657784636?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWY2MTAwMC1hZDUwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S6Ug7wzOXn3ksp1pkuAY8e_rCFV2Pfv6SdwdGLg-C1M=&emci=24272824-a950-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=29f61000-ad50-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=11703046)

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69548729/426499359/1169064008?refcode=230911_SAP_DMP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2ExZjhlMi1hYzUwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=axgeA0akYpYpsvNtuOqUjfy9MC61lDi5_f3tr6AIzLI=) Hi, there, it's Debbie. I just had a meeting with my campaign team, and I wanted to get a note out to you about where things stand right now. It’s important. At the end of this month, our campaign will face its first public FEC reporting deadline. Everybody from Rick Scott to Mitch McConnell to political pundits will be looking to see what we’ve raised. **They’ll use it to judge the strength of our campaign.** Unfortunately, we’re pacing about $6,112 short of where we should be at this point in the month. [**I simply cannot fall short on the first big test of our campaign, so will you split $20 between my campaign and Serve America to help get us back on track so we can defeat Rick Scott?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69548731/426499361/1377474255?refcode=230911_SAP_DMP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2ExZjhlMi1hYzUwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=axgeA0akYpYpsvNtuOqUjfy9MC61lDi5_f3tr6AIzLI=) We cannot afford to fall behind so early on in the election cycle. My opponent Rick Scott is one of the richest senators in the country, so he's more than capable of self-funding his campaign. In fact, he’s already poured millions into his campaign, and last time around, he spent $64 MILLION of his own fortune to buy this seat. Look, team, I’ve already fought opponents like Rick Scott and beat them. I’m not afraid to face him or anybody that doesn’t put Florida first — especially as he continues to get rich while taking away our rights, abusing our government, and raising costs for families. No más. We’re going to do something about it. We’re going to win. But winning will take staying ahead of our grassroots goals, especially when Rick Scott can cut himself a massive check at any moment. [**That’s why I’m asking, friends: Please help me make up this gap by splitting $20 or whatever you can between Serve America and me to fight back against Rick Scott, win in Florida, and expand our Senate majority.** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69548732/426499363/1377474255?refcode=230911_SAP_DMP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2ExZjhlMi1hYzUwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=axgeA0akYpYpsvNtuOqUjfy9MC61lDi5_f3tr6AIzLI=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69548733/426499365/1169064008?refcode=230911_SAP_DMP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2ExZjhlMi1hYzUwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=axgeA0akYpYpsvNtuOqUjfy9MC61lDi5_f3tr6AIzLI=)
Thank you so much for your support,
Debbie Mucarsel-Powell

subject: At 10:07 am ET today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Greg Wheeler]( "Paid for by Vote Greg Wheeler")
body:
May we be inspired with courage | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/dd1484afe157/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-6146349?e=d6699466fe)
---
| | [ ](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=4c7e372022&e=d6699466fe)
---
| Peter,
---
| | Flight 93 went down at 10:07 am ET twenty-two years ago today.

The United Airlines flight plummeted 700 feet over the skies of Eastern Ohio before crashing in Pennsylvania.

There were 40 passengers covering a range of ages between 20 and 79. After hijackers forced them to the back of the plane, they reached out to loved ones on every device possible and learned that the Twin Towers at the World Trade Center had been hit.

They held a vote, and resolved to retake the plane. Their determined efforts to do so led to the cowardly act of terrorists deciding to crash the plane before it reached their planned target.

We will never forget those that lost their lives on September 11, 2001. We will never forget the terrorist acts that led to carnage in New York City, New York, Arlington, Virginia and Shanksville, Pennsylvania.
---
|
---
| When the unexpected disasters, government corruption, and societal upheaval of today dishearten us, may we be inspired by the courage of passengers on Flight 93 and the selflessness of every patriot who rushed to give aid at the World Trade Center.

On this Patriot Day our memory of them emboldens us to exercise the American Spirit with unity and goodwill for truth and justice.
---
|
---
| For America,
---
| [ ](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=9fae4f6434&e=d6699466fe)

name: Biden Poll
subject: Your Biden Rating
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | We’re conducting a nationwide poll of top Democrats to verify strong support for President Biden before the next election -- and we’ve selected you to represent Pennsylvania. ****Please answer to the best of your ability and do not include input from others.****

Thank you for participating,

Team DSCC

name: Andrei Cherny
subject: I was asleep when the phone rang
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrei for Arizona
body:
Following the 9/11 attacks, I enlisted to serve

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69550649/426505849/1272516037?refcode=em_XX_XXXX.XX.XX_XX_XX_header_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzZmZGM0YWItYjA1MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YxyTPcBWjr7TUm7rIDFMCYAT0EoaKU8XWs0-kQninPM=) Peter –

In those days, before I had kids, I was fast asleep when the phone rang at 6:30. It was my dad calling. Planes had flown into the World Trade Center. America was being attacked. I experienced the day—the fall of one tower and then the other, the attack on the Pentagon, the confusion, the rumors, the terror—the way most people did: watching television in stunned silence. The world changed before our eyes, and we knew we would always remember where we were when we heard the news.

As the shock and horror settled in, I felt a profound call to serve and protect the ideals and values that make our nation exceptional. In the apartment building I grew up in, neighbors from around the world had come together, embodying the strength of America's pluralism and unity.

My parents, both children of concentration camp survivors who themselves grew up in a dictatorship, had sought refuge in America, where they found democracy, freedom, opportunity, and the chance to build a better future. I knew what America meant to me, and I was ready to defend it.

So, following the 9/11 attacks, I made the decision to enlist to serve in the military to protect the freedoms and values that America represents. **As a U.S. Navy reserve Intelligence Officer, I witnessed firsthand the dedication and determination of my fellow service members.**

I served alongside incredible men and women who put their lives on the line. They asked for nothing in return but deserve a country that does right by them. Last year, Congress finally passed the PACT Act, which provides health benefits to veterans who were exposed to toxic substances during their service.

**The PACT Act was passed with bipartisan support – even Ted Cruz and Matt Gaetz voted for it. But David Schweikert voted no.** Seeing him vote no was one of the moments that made me decide to run for Congress.

I believe our representatives should honor our veterans' sacrifices by ensuring they receive the care and support they deserve. David Schweikert can keep all his flowery tweets about 9/11 and solemn statements about veterans’ service. It's time for leaders who stand up for our veterans, not show off for them, and then vote against their interests.

Just as my decision to enlist was a call to service, my campaign for Congress is a call to action. Together, we can build a better future for our veterans and for our nation. [**If you’re with me, will you add your name to my PACT Act petition to support health benefits for our veterans?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69550650/426505850/-1233430019?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzZmZGM0YWItYjA1MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YxyTPcBWjr7TUm7rIDFMCYAT0EoaKU8XWs0-kQninPM=&emci=c19971c8-a650-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=c6fdc4ab-b050-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=13520922) [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69550651/426505851/-1233430019?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzZmZGM0YWItYjA1MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YxyTPcBWjr7TUm7rIDFMCYAT0EoaKU8XWs0-kQninPM=&emci=c19971c8-a650-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=c6fdc4ab-b050-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=13520922) In your service,

– Andrei

| To learn more about Andrei, visit [**AndreiForArizona.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69550652/426505852/-651367276?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzZmZGM0YWItYjA1MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YxyTPcBWjr7TUm7rIDFMCYAT0EoaKU8XWs0-kQninPM=&emci=c19971c8-a650-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=c6fdc4ab-b050-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=13520922) | Paid for by Andrei for Arizona

name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of best-selling survival food kits.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z18flkr7kshof7m5li6j92umppo4k573clfqkud8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5imeo32c5h2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can.
---

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: re: It’s notable that Katie is the only candidate who does this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
We’re in this fight to get big money out of politics, root corruption out of Washington, and make our government work for everyone
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230911-1?refcode=EMAL11_1_EWA_20230911_V1_F&refcode2=29679_3422442_EBGb9R&akid=29679%2E3422442%2EEBGb9R)
_Me and Katie Porter long before either of us imagined we would run for office._
Derek, it's Elizabeth Warren. When Katie Porter and I were studying consumer law, way before either of us got into politics, we kept coming back to one central question: **Why has the road to economic security gotten so steep and so rocky for hardworking people in America?**
Well, here was the answer: Washington was only working well for those with money and power — for those who could hire armies of lobbyists and lawyers. Corruption, pure and simple.
So we’ve been fighting back. Fighting to put our government on the side of working people. Fighting to make sure government officials are making decisions with only one factor in mind: the public interest. Not their own pocketbooks. Not their special interest donors.
That fight brought us to elected office. That fight drives us to build campaigns from the grassroots level on up. **And now that Katie is running to be California’s next U.S. senator (go Katie!), it’s notable that she’s the only candidate in the race who doesn’t take money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil, Big Pharma, and Wall Street banks.**
[**Neither do I. We both fundraise the same way: with grassroots support. So, Derek, can you please split a $5 contribution to support our campaigns today? Katie’s in a competitive primary, and we’re relying on grassroots support to keep up our fight for working families in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230911-1?refcode=EMAL11_1_EWA_20230911_V1_F&refcode2=29679_3422442_EBGb9R&akid=29679%2E3422442%2EEBGb9R)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230911-1?refcode=EMAL11_1_EWA_20230911_V1_F&refcode2=29679_3422442_EBGb9R&akid=29679%2E3422442%2EEBGb9R)
Katie and I have recently been working together in Washington to rein in Big Banks — introducing a bill to reinstate guardrails against collapses like the ones we saw earlier this year.
**We’re in this fight to get big money out of politics, root corruption out of Washington, and make our government work for everyone — not just the ultra-wealthy and well-connected. And there’s so much more we can get done together.**
I’m running for re-election to keep fighting for working people — and I get goosebumps thinking about what it’d be like to do this work alongside Katie in the Senate.
[**Can you split a donation of $5 or any amount between Katie Porter’s campaign and my re-election? The polls are tight in Katie’s race, so every donation, of any amount, truly makes a difference.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230911-1?refcode=EMAL11_1_EWA_20230911_V1_F&refcode2=29679_3422442_EBGb9R&akid=29679%2E3422442%2EEBGb9R)

Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

name: Giffords.org
subject: [HUGE NEWS] The ATF just released a new rule getting us closer to universal background checks
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is a big deal
#

We've got big news, friends.
**The Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) released a rule that would move us closer than ever to universal background checks.**
Before this rule can become law, the ATF is required to seek public comments on this critical gun safety measure. [**Please use this link to add your voice in support of this rule today.**](https://giffords.org/action/tell-atf-expand-background-checks/?source=em230911-1-30&refcode2=6508.3935704.N7gXe_)
Currently, only licensed gun dealers are required to conduct background checks, leaving a gaping loophole that allows unlicensed firearm dealers to sell guns without background checks online or at a gun show, for example.
The ATF’s new rule would address this loophole and clarify when individuals are required to get a license and conduct background checks.
We are so proud that the ATF has taken this important step. Make no mistake: it’s largely due to the work that we have all done together for the past decade to fight for universal background checks.
We know the gun lobby doesn’t want to close this loophole, so they’ll fight tooth and nail to oppose it. That’s why it’s critical we step up and make our voices heard.
[**So please, will you click this link to make a comment saying you support expanded background checks for gun buyers? The ATF takes every comment submitted into account, so your voice in this matter truly makes a difference.**](https://giffords.org/action/tell-atf-expand-background-checks/?source=em230911-1-30&refcode2=6508.3935704.N7gXe_)
**[ADD YOUR COMMENT](https://giffords.org/action/tell-atf-expand-background-checks/?source=em230911-1-30&refcode2=6508.3935704.N7gXe_)**
Thank you for using your voice. It’s critical the ATF knows that all of us in this community strongly support their rule that will make our country safer.
All our best,
The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=6508%2E3935704%2EN7gXe_) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Seth
subject: honoring the lives we lost
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=unLKhD5s%2BldBGKyQIlPV3sVgn79pfwMovKOT%2BNq7If7JnGs8FFkrR1ziAE4%2Faqy7%2FPSx7r3Pi7Zm3oXGIN4sCo1G5i1Hp%2BB7QEZ3VbGW%2FH5K8BU%2B6O2aD%2BW8F38uKmWr1lhqWRgFzcxhgTiXRs%2BkHVwh8eYcScKWADKE1eZNJkNXXDa7oIfEg9kForUP3phV1a0bdOR5AYBqDADjms5%2FOcxnEfrBlK1scs2nN22sDHWP8wvUrRTBArE2Is7cXyv6xtwoc6UJjAyYjMH%2FhA2GAbEi0LkfGsGWYFK9fTJtBz2pyWRsw%2B9d6WbNkrA39VclliJ8px0a%2BXV0%2Fh75mi0W9faDow4R3rlgYHihFFAitb80l3U2%2FoEdCoLn4DLe7iUdVZlyIeZFazvjWRq2kwfA3w4Bd1eoerZmk01ZmUQhdsh5azKWNs4m9Gb4qKDm8wjI]

# [#]
Peter,

Today marks 22 years since our country was shaken by an unthinkable act of terror on our people.September 11, 2001 is one of the darkest days I can remember. The acts of terror on this day aimed to divide us as we mourned those we lost that day. But in the immediate aftermath, we came together as Americans, putting aside our differences and uniting with resilience and compassion.

Today, we honor the memory of the men, women, and children we lost, and the first responders that fought to save others.

This day taught us to be strong, even in times of crisis. Now, we must continue to honor the lives lost and sacrifices made, putting our differences aside and ensuring that the country and our democracy remain strong.

Thank you,

Seth
PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
PO BOX 40993, PROVIDENCE, RI 02940

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: I’ll never forget
body:
| | | Today marks the anniversary of one of the darkest days in American history.

On this day 22 years ago we lost 2,996 lives, and we’ve lost countless more since then from the long-lasting effects of the terrorist attacks on 9/11.

What happened on that day was pure evil. And sadly, it’s an evil that’s still alive and well in the world today.

As a Green Beret, I saw terrorism in its rawest forms. I saw people fueled by nothing but their hatred for America and our freedom, democracy, and values.

We cannot take our nation for granted. Every day, we need to do what we can to protect and defend our democracy.

Today, I want to express my gratitude for the service members who have served since 9/11 past and present to make sure America NEVER experiences an attack on our own soil like that again.

I also want to thank the first responders from all around the globe who turned out to save lives and provide closure for families that day. Your service does not go unnoticed.

Even in times of tragedy, I’m grateful to live in the freest nation on Earth. And as your Congressman, I will do everything I can to make sure it stays that way.

name: Team Cassidy
subject: Remembering Sept. 11th
body:
| | | | 22 years later...
---
---
---
Today, on the 22nd anniversary of the most horrific attack ever delivered on American soil, let us take a moment to pause and reflect on the thousands of innocent lives lost.
---
---
---
---
To the first responders and their families, we thank you for your bravery and selflessness.
To our great nation, we will never forget.
-Team Cassidy
---
---
---

subject: On this Patriot Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carmen for Congress]( "Paid for by Carmen for Congress")
body:
May the memories fortify us | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3dbd6d3cb545/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-in-the-8th-congressional-district-13567947?e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=180a180031&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | Peter,
---
| Do you remember where you were on Sept. 11, 2001?

I was dropping my children off to school and heading into my office in downtown Seattle when the news of the first plane hitting the first tower was breaking. As the magnitude of the day became evident, I felt the weight of pending war. As a former military spouse and government employee stationed abroad, I knew there were friends and former colleagues that were rising up to meet the enemy that came to our shores. It was a strong reminder that Freedom isn’t free and standing for democracy has a high price.

Twenty-two years ago the tragedy planes crashing at the World Trade Center, at the Pentagon and a field in Pennsylvania shook us to our core.

The events tested our ability to unite in the spirit of giving aid to our fellow countrymen, grieve the loss of 2,977 lives and take stock of what had been enacted upon our nation.

We will never forget those who were lost that day. In honoring their memory today, we also give our respects to all the first responders, law enforcement and good samaritans who stepped up to demonstrate goodwill in the face of the terrorist monstrosity that came against us as a nation.
---
|
---
| As we face the challenges of the day, it’s our human nature to feel overwhelmed with despair over the destruction we see happening around us.

On this Patriot Day, our memory of a mourning nation dealing with the tragedy of Sept. 11, 2001 fortifies our resolve to work together in a spirit of goodwill for the virtues that unite us.
---
| For America,
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=cec15932ce&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| Carmen Goers
Candidate for U.S. Congress, WA-8
[CarmenForWashington.com](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=4053ddc205&e=0e51d1e991)

subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=9e6d21fbea274203b57febf87d13884b&_t=RIwuVweLq-iBTD9oH4qXYZBFiLnPMaGgJzXQaW-PpvnTcQFEOlaL5aQj-hheR6E6bqkYT20ITQwWK44KgqAEFxHuV0YN2iqSsNFmMuThcPg%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=9e6d21fbea274203b57febf87d13884b&_t=RIwuVweLq-iBTD9oH4qXYZBFiLnPMaGgJzXQaW-PpvnTcQFEOlaL5aQj-hheR6E6bqkYT20ITQwWK44KgqAEFxHuV0YN2iqSsNFmMuThcPg%3D)

|
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9e6d21fbea274203b57febf87d13884b&_e=UR2XqTv5pYQDOXT7TdmTt5p7vaMrBTszbtB5iBVKFcSnBpgv0Bd87ZWeFapxbkAMwtl_6dbmA6daCZe7bkssC7196gUkYxeRdiV9qU2oJJ_Yzxt5oDW_u810wzqY0QVvYtbXJGid5swmLBXpm7gihRAsLYGsHAqB5qrB7ObbpT84wZBfdZKFCP9wef-8Dx7UtvnEQiD42KuAksZTqsaK8ZS0iCuCjHtLkEIcH30LlTP7480bDsFKt2FrNL5tu7qjBMU0_Ms1lHVhdMWgBQ1pibsmy7O7pHUI1PHPwxMKvXLsx2IjUdV6Zc-70NnXpTRJTMqZbMdUsoAVSi0y0OErhQ6IuR0w7W1g6bCS8bq9AWUXpO8b33m70l-ePJ2H26Og "STAND WITH RYAN")
---

So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9e6d21fbea274203b57febf87d13884b&_e=UR2XqTv5pYQDOXT7TdmTt5p7vaMrBTszbtB5iBVKFcSnBpgv0Bd87ZWeFapxbkAMwtl_6dbmA6daCZe7bkssC7196gUkYxeRdiV9qU2oJJ_Yzxt5oDW_u810wzqY0QVvYtbXJGid5swmLBXpm7gihRAsLYGsHAqB5qrB7ObbpT84wZBfdZKFCP9wef-8Dx7UtvnEQiD42KuAksZTqsaK8ZS0iCuCjHtLkEIcH30LlTNeC70xNha0JLRy4A9ThwViAysHX3k6ylkfy9ZuKMuDdFTqa5YLp1v5mjq07X5U4pJydXDyBnMV1wvjFfya9y_WUfRamkowBJWe0XhxZPeWTEaBenlt1-ZMdeM-HY9tR7WIEVlPdE47KH9qdxBtF3IA "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9e6d21fbea274203b57febf87d13884b&_e=UR2XqTv5pYQDOXT7TdmTt5p7vaMrBTszbtB5iBVKFcSnBpgv0Bd87ZWeFapxbkAMwtl_6dbmA6daCZe7bkssC7196gUkYxeRdiV9qU2oJJ_Yzxt5oDW_u810wzqY0QVvYtbXJGid5swmLBXpm7gihRAsLYGsHAqB5qrB7ObbpT84wZBfdZKFCP9wef-8Dx7UtvnEQiD42KuAksZTqsaK8ZS0iCuCjHtLkEIcH30LlTOBwzT5kb9YZePcU5QLJvhJ2SH-HFB7BcyHp2pvQGwcXEvFy_c1XSgKkUm7t9e_rg_L1v6LZVjBtiNj2pevhxdym-t5QFlE_CezoTFrT1Yn7nzG9A2GP7WKf16ccAe_q3BgfBlSJx1__9FoYDRb0-QX "DONATE TODAY")

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

Tammy and Jacky are running for reelection in two of the toughest races of 2024, period. Republicans see both of these seats as major pick-up opportunities, and they will do everything in their power to unseat our rockstar senators — including hostile attacks and huge fundraising boosts.

Fortunately, we know that, with the support of the EMILYs List community, Tammy and Jacky have what it takes to win.

In 2012, Tammy Baldwin first ran for Senate in deep purple Wisconsin as the race's clear underdog, and when she won, she became the first openly gay person ever elected to the U.S. Senate. And in 2018, Jacky Rosen was the _only_ Democratic challenger in the country to unseat a Republican Senate incumbent.

These women are _very_ familiar with tough races — and they both know what it's like to fight hard and emerge victorious. We've been with these pro-choice champions through each of their previous runs, and this cycle we're ready to help them win again.
****Donate now to help elect and reelect women like Tammy Baldwin and Jacky Rosen in some of the toughest races of 2024:**

clean_body: They've got what it takes to win. | | | = Peter, If you're looking to support pro-choice Democrats in some of the toughest Senate races of 2024, look no further: Sens. Tammy Baldwin (WI) and Jacky Rosen (NV) are running to defend blue Senate seats in quintessential swing states this cycle. And, frankly, these are seats we can't afford to lose if we want to maintain control of the Senate. Donate now to help elect and reelect pro-choice champions like Tammy Baldwin and Jacky Rosen who can help protect our razor-thin Senate majority. If you have saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately. | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Tammy and Jacky are running for reelection in two of the toughest races of 2024, period. Republicans see both of these seats as major pick-up opportunities, and they will do everything in their power to unseat our rockstar senators — including hostile attacks and huge fundraising boosts. Fortunately, we know that, with the support of the EMILYs List community, Tammy and Jacky have what it takes to win. In 2012, Tammy Baldwin first ran for Senate in deep purple Wisconsin as the race's clear underdog, and when she won, she became the first openly gay person ever elected to the U.S. Senate. And in 2018, Jacky Rosen was the only Democratic challenger in the country to unseat a Republican Senate incumbent. These women are very familiar with tough races — and they both know what it's like to fight hard and emerge victorious. We've been with these pro-choice champions through each of their previous runs, and this cycle we're ready to help them win again. **Donate now to help elect and reelect women like Tammy Baldwin and Jacky Rosen in some of the toughest races of 2024: =** Thank you, the EMILYs List Campaigns team = = EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: Remembering
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Peter,

Today, we remember the 3,000 lives lost on 9/11, and those whose lives were changed in the aftermath.

Twenty two years later, the bravery and selflessness of the first responders who raced towards danger remains a beacon of hope and resilience in the face of unspeakable horror. We honor them, their families, and their continuing struggle.

Today and always, their memory and legacy makes me proud to be an American.

Regards,

Dr. Brian Williams

---
