name: Callie Barr
subject: Today and every day, we remember.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Callie Barr for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69554255/426518882/1742851123?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20230911_na_911_cand_sm_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWVjN2MzMTAtYjg1MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cd05c3qnqR3gJKqDCmLyjR4AwE1oDSPNQc3dLHyx0JQ=)
---
Dear Peter, Twenty-two years ago, our nation – and the world – changed forever. In trying to explain that day to our daughters, I've found it difficult to capture what we were all feeling: grief, fear, confusion, but also solidarity. For some people like my husband Matt, the course of action was clear: his first call was to a military recruiter to enlist as a Marine and fight for his country. For others, solidarity took a different shape: reaching out to friends and family in New York and D.C., passing the hat to support survivors, and proudly flying the American flag from every flagpole we could find. **The whole country was united.** We weren't red or blue – we were _Americans_. People put aside their differences in service of something bigger than themselves. _When we saw our nation under attack, we found a way to work together_. **It's that same spirit that inspired me to run for Congress.** On January 6th, I watched armed insurrectionists invade the U.S. Capitol in an attempt to subvert American democracy. And later that night, I watched Rep. Jack Bergman vote to overrule American democracy. I'm not running for Congress to play partisan politics or because I want to be a politician; **I'm running because our democracy is still under attack, and as an American, I feel a sense of duty to defend it**. The truth is, if we want to save our country, we need to re-learn how to identify as Americans over Republicans or Democrats. It's going to take all of us to keep this country together. We managed it twenty-two years ago. **Now, we need to do it again**. So today and every day, we remember the lives of those lost to us on September 11, 2001. We remember the sacrifices of first responders, everyday civilians, and our armed forces who gave everything to help their neighbors and defend this nation. And we remind ourselves of the hard work ahead – so that the American experiment can continue, even in the face of grave threats. Thank you, and Never Forget. Tuebor, -Callie Callie Barr
Candidate for Congress in Michigan's First District | **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69554256/426518889/55077635?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWVjN2MzMTAtYjg1MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cd05c3qnqR3gJKqDCmLyjR4AwE1oDSPNQc3dLHyx0JQ=&emci=2716b800-844e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=9ec7c310-b850-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=9697413)[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69554257/426518902/1799741492?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWVjN2MzMTAtYjg1MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cd05c3qnqR3gJKqDCmLyjR4AwE1oDSPNQc3dLHyx0JQ=&emci=2716b800-844e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=9ec7c310-b850-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=9697413) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69554263/426518918/-1590608891?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWVjN2MzMTAtYjg1MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cd05c3qnqR3gJKqDCmLyjR4AwE1oDSPNQc3dLHyx0JQ=&emci=2716b800-844e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=9ec7c310-b850-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=9697413)**

That’s why we’re working to gather momentum and support Democrats’ efforts to urge Speaker McCarthy to bring gun reform legislation to a vote ASAP.

Pro-Life Advocate,

I'm writing to you today as a passionate protector of vulnerable women and the unborn. I know that you share my belief that every human life is precious and should be protected.

I've been a pro-life activist for over 20 years, and I've seen firsthand the devastating effects of abortion on women, children, and families. I've met women who have had abortions and dealt with the pain and regret as they navigate a deeply felt loss in their lives. I've met children who were born after their mothers were denied an abortion and who are now thriving. And I've met families who have been torn apart by abortion.

I know that you're also aware of the recent Supreme Court decision to overturn Roe v. Wade. This is a historic victory for the pro-life movement, but this was just the beginning of the fight. **_We still have a long way to go to ensure that all unborn babies and their mothers are protected from abortion._**

The first step is for pro-life Americans to come together and state what we believe and what we will do in order to protect the unborn. [Will you join me in standing up for the rights of unborn children?](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjU0LWFiMDVlNTZhNjdkYzRhMjA4YzBkY2M1MGZmMTM5MDM1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2FjdGlvbi5zYmFwcm9saWZlLm9yZy9zdGFuZC1mb3ItbGlmZS1wbGVkZ2U_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXN0YW5kX2Zvcl9saWZlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZhcHBlYWxfaWQ9MTAxOCZwYWNrYWdlX2lkPTI0OTIwJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX0ZBTFI0Mjc4MiJ9/mAitntXOWstfqSVgNsYLyA)

When you sign the pledge, you'll be joining a growing movement of pro-life Americans who are working to make a difference. You'll also be receiving regular updates from SBA Pro-Life America about the latest pro-life news and events.

[SIGN THE PLEDGE »](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjU0LWFiMDVlNTZhNjdkYzRhMjA4YzBkY2M1MGZmMTM5MDM1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2FjdGlvbi5zYmFwcm9saWZlLm9yZy9zdGFuZC1mb3ItbGlmZS1wbGVkZ2U_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXN0YW5kX2Zvcl9saWZlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZhcHBlYWxfaWQ9MTAxOCZwYWNrYWdlX2lkPTI0OTIwJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX0ZBTFI0Mjc4MiJ9/498AIBeOtUF_sCQ9dWq4wA)

I hope you'll join me in signing the SBA Pro-Life America Pledge to Stand Up for the Unborn. Together, we can build a pro-life America where every child is welcomed and valued.**

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: September 11th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
Friend, today we commemorate the 22nd anniversary of the September 11th attacks and remember the nearly 3,000 Americans who lost their lives in these horrific acts of violence.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69554896/426521206/-1943795144?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2Y1NDJiZS1iOTUwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yu5G28vs1wLSyvbkWINW0mkPr2TZmAM7ULjaRpSzoLE=&emci=2e63d897-aa50-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=37f542be-b950-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=5643047)
---
Friend, today we commemorate the 22nd anniversary of the September 11th attacks and remember the nearly 3,000 Americans who lost their lives in these horrific acts of violence.

**The September 11th attacks forever changed our country.** Whether it’s marked by an empty seat at the dinner table, a vacant desk in a classroom, or a sense of intangible emptiness and loss left by those whose shoes are impossible to fill, many Americans still feel the pain of 9/11 every day. Because for some, no amount of time will ever heal these wounds.

However, today, we not only remember the insurmountable anguish caused by the September 11th attacks, **but we also remember the bravery of the American people and the resilience in our response.**

The way that our men and women in uniform ran into the flames to save their fellow Americans or the way that communities across the country came together to support each other exemplified the true strength and resilience that sit at the core of who we are as an American people.

So today, I hope you’ll join me in both mourning the nearly 3,000 lives we lost 22 years ago and remembering the strength of the American people.

In remembrance,

_Andrea_
** **
| | Andrea Salinas for Oregon
PO Box 230985
Tigard, OR 97281
---
Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon

subject: Back to school season: free breakfast and lunch for MI students
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**

It's back to school season, team! It is going to be the best one yet, **especially thanks to the bipartisan education budget that our Democratic majority passed and I signed in July — making the highest state per-student investment in Michigan history.** This budget puts Michigan’s students first, supports their families, and strengthens our schools, universities, and communities. We’re taking steps towards pre-K for all, providing free breakfast and lunch to all 1.4 million Michigan public school students, improving the campus experience at Michigan’s higher education institutions, and lowering costs for our educators and staff. **Our education budget will be a game changer, and it’s all possible thanks to support from this grassroots team. | | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=12300f604a294baf9c8676e28bf0bbe2&_e=mPQwAtf57oK24eQybIuf9R2DAuNaCsoYK7WfL_McnNPNhIZ7uPo4PciD7JKmD9ih3fMDueEn_1fGcZkr2NPPmuRy9jw_Z52S5EHh2F1Cqkp4KL15CJYGxNYikJbFcizxeuC6LEk2C8PX966yXA-bVTrGewITwF1FOQZJkLCgdRi4-9b5Z0XJhWz7sdEPyvoYn5c6QA9cJjXXBDt6OapGCwR0ugZeJdZjGZN2Q8KpjnQ7xfzE3jpJkrI4jdZ-MNmz0gSh6BW9gnoKvlU6JaulOkiEv-tjtSA_hxS4De3o_fHHLowHSTfWCnZTpSuTMeUWt9gEl21wXcIyguh1pBHUvwJnexUQIguDOTXPAJQi-IELmlQJx8C1JUTn5keuCkkWXvDTAiNVauqVrVmK71g17A%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=12300f604a294baf9c8676e28bf0bbe2&_e=mPQwAtf57oK24eQybIuf9R2DAuNaCsoYK7WfL_McnNPNhIZ7uPo4PciD7JKmD9ih3fMDueEn_1fGcZkr2NPPmuRy9jw_Z52S5EHh2F1Cqkp4KL15CJYGxNYikJbFcizxeuC6LEk2C8PX966yXA-bVTrGewITwF1FOQZJkLCgdRi4-9b5Z0XJhWz7sdEPyvoYn5c6QA9cJjXXBDt6OapGCwR0ugZeJdZjGZN2Q8KpjnQ7xfzE3jpJkrI4jdZ-MNmzEwDEogTpkeJqMcvYbWOAQ-9HfBP6hZMEDlFmA8FXIRe61sBUxbGxOjrUg6s9yWzlCn9aIROoBD_LloO1BBwU-GrsBtHCvVA9ZX8KRsSIOL2NDvaaS9afs-mrSiKliu4f2Mw6591_JWB4G2uh7PZSvA%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=12300f604a294baf9c8676e28bf0bbe2&_e=mPQwAtf57oK24eQybIuf9R2DAuNaCsoYK7WfL_McnNPNhIZ7uPo4PciD7JKmD9ih3fMDueEn_1fGcZkr2NPPmuRy9jw_Z52S5EHh2F1Cqkp4KL15CJYGxNYikJbFcizxeuC6LEk2C8PX966yXA-bVTrGewITwF1FOQZJkLCgdRi4-9b5Z0XJhWz7sdEPyvoYn5c6QA9cJjXXBDt6OapGCwR0ugZeJdZjGZN2Q8KpjnQ7xfzE3jpJkrI4jdZ-MNmzU0lnyscMxm7PmSQlvLWFhQ4BkO7yNlBPnn6Y3a_9ftrjtonlfHOzg4Fj37O5WO4E6N5xRWpytfMxXQofLgTxuc-qj9a-p7SmV4H0Z7Ua5wkJIELMcfnlsbukuCpF0vGfI3DFMkND1RdhOD-mufyj-Q%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=12300f604a294baf9c8676e28bf0bbe2&_e=mPQwAtf57oK24eQybIuf9R2DAuNaCsoYK7WfL_McnNPNhIZ7uPo4PciD7JKmD9ih3fMDueEn_1fGcZkr2NPPmuRy9jw_Z52S5EHh2F1Cqkp4KL15CJYGxNYikJbFcizxeuC6LEk2C8PX966yXA-bVTrGewITwF1FOQZJkLCgdRi4-9b5Z0XJhWz7sdEPyvoYn5c6QA9cJjXXBDt6OapGCwR0ugZeJdZjGZN2Q8KpjnQ7xfzE3jpJkrI4jdZ-MNmzpJJ1LKbfI63r9Kj7bJyqZwRzJGGZKnsnKk1iKljoef3FPbyyYlwqyUsAV2oexqWFKOXafMWJD29ofPQcEc_dkhCZXInbgqtjh9BFSQN8ZUWzh-4FfrWRwltmaUlBQM0C55VtGaS341mZWLn4DJKTCA%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: 22 years ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
In memory of those we lost

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69556991/426528745/-876189841?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjU4ZWFhNS1iZDUwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wkv8MDfFlYS9azNG3y_mFku0Fsr5goDGaY5Sg8wGlow=&emci=cb8dc03e-ae50-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=9f58eaa5-bd50-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=32654120) Today, I hope you will join me in remembering the thousands of men and women we lost on this day 22 years ago and honor their memories and the extraordinarily brave citizens and first responders who ran to aid them.

To everyone in our region affected by the terrible tragedy of September 11th, 2001, my thoughts are with you today. As long as I am able to cast my vote, I will continue to advocate for victims and survivors and support the 9/11 Victims Compensation Fund – the fund created to pay out claims for deaths, illnesses, and other ongoing impacts caused by that terrible day.

Let us remember that we are stronger together, and let us live each day by our uniquely American values of brotherhood, unity, and courage in the face of adversity.

In solidarity,

Jennifer
---

subject: We have some exciting news!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
We have some exciting news! We are proud to be endorsing Colonel Pamela Stevenson for Attorney General of Kentucky!
Colonel Pam is in this race to make history. When Colonel Pam is elected, she will not only be the first female Attorney General, but the first Black, female Attorney General of Kentucky. She is the Democratic nominee and her election is approaching quickly this November.
[**If you are ready to give her your support, please use this link to split a contribution between Colonel Pam’s campaign and The Long Run. Every donation will help her make history.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/3420?c0=longrunpac-em-ps-split.VZnf6F&t=1&akid=4827%2E196590%2E6eGIq0)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-ps-split.anPan9&refcode=em230911-1-t3&t=2&akid=4827%2E196590%2E6eGIq0)
Otherwise, let us share a bit about Colonel Pam and why she’s in this race.
Born and raised in Louisville, Colonel Pam’s family has lived in Kentucky for generations. She served 27 years in the military as a lawyer and retired as a Colonel. Now, she has returned home to Kentucky to run for Attorney General.
Colonel Pam Stevenson understands that the role of Attorney General isn’t to play politics, but to serve the people of Kentucky by defending our Constitution.
She vows to be _The People’s Lawyer_ , always putting the people of Kentucky first and protecting Kentucky’s families from big business, corrupt politicians, and scammers.
Colonel Pam’s experience is unbeatable. With 39 years of legal experience at the local, state, federal, and international levels, she is one of the most qualified candidates ever to seek the office of Attorney General.
She is in this fight for Kentuckuckians, so we want to help her cross the finish line.
[**Friend, can you please split a $5 contribution between Colonel Pam’s campaign for Attorney General and The Long Run? Together, we can help her make history.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/3420?c0=longrunpac-em-ps-split.VZnf6F&t=3&akid=4827%2E196590%2E6eGIq0)

[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-ps-split.Ny090Y&refcode=em230911-1-t3&t=23&akid=4827%2E196590%2E6eGIq0)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-ps-split.E1exP9&refcode=em230911-1-t3&t=24&akid=4827%2E196590%2E6eGIq0)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-ps-split.JbAeP0&refcode=em230911-1-t3&t=25&akid=4827%2E196590%2E6eGIq0)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-ps-split.L8zxe0&refcode=em230911-1-t3&t=26&akid=4827%2E196590%2E6eGIq0)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-ps-split.anPan9&refcode=em230911-1-t3&t=27&akid=4827%2E196590%2E6eGIq0)
Thank you in advance for supporting Colonel Pam and our fight for change.
The team at the Long Run

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=4827%2E196590%2E6eGIq0). ✔️ **Launch our first-ever NATIONWIDE ballot harvesting operation to bank GOP votes**
✔️ Activate our voters through neighbor-to-neighbor connections
✔️ Expand GOP access to early-voting locations across the country

I am proud to lead this effort and help turn out votes for Republicans. These efforts will not only allow us to directly confront bad actors and stop cheating but allow us to appeal to younger and important swing voters.

But there's a catch: these kinds of voter contact initiatives take money... Lots of it. It won't be cheap, **but it will be worth it when Republicans defend our House Majority, flip the Senate, and kick Joe Biden out of the White House once and for all!**

_**[With that in mind, I now humbly ask you to pitch in ten or twenty bucks to help jumpstart our voter contact efforts AND make history.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3c4580b5e4e1458aa5db54f3e944df55&_e=D00R_QtOFhcpuG13P55L4lc5UxrtoKqgsBC6BQUcZbqFvnXLwuNYjkgZO9gsAh8tWrqAakr2iZ3EQio1DKmwpZ97AAdjSTV6AoFe1JpDYDEot_vlcRPFJPeHuMg8ZMZWWtbmWXXfX3zYDv6t9iAA2vOMoKIuR7_Tgm90dzUu4Wjyz4m8bvpXLAqkEOTuHJc0MvXBhMLfDBsaugSt66FrJUEEJ3dsY2fKYlUg4vsyoz39QZWUG01tJOxfPv9oUWCpJj1oOTxpjJvqh64YmV-Zqo1eGskI9BJEfmRpYr6CwjlZOfj_xOTlWMNAO6kLkefNmJ6Zsb_qV-PuLE0AdhVpQDOZGGoMftjTKShbWgpORqjWl-TspXmOoeC8GkRQ1Qc_3xlztfez8YuRC-RX_eulGCynLcwpT2lvUtJ0i9zrrlH3uCkOlXdRVMan19A0u53_WToA-ItFU3zlC_-CV_7bOw%3D%3D "With that in mind, I now humbly ask you to pitch in ten or twenty bucks to help jumpstart our voter contact efforts AND make history.")**_

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8edba60882da49e099a5a90608dac68b&_e=hu-NpRFZAmYkT5xwF1hFY5SD_OWPRRDvNCkWB2j7anA__NYEqod8ZC6zR5M5K3ogq_NWKbaVfBuufwbIl0gxRhqanqbxsM8qXkMBz-HFXFJ-vLFPHgXpJboQHMV-IHOVoY5b93FButUC_i7WB0u4ki5wuXo_PnHqe5ANhtAiqIKBjuALX1Iugl2dNJ7VhZIWjLdl3jDPtL8ph8Sopp_n3VqiaquQsGx0E20l7h6Q5Z_FuJtLTXI2H1U42qqXtLSHH30jFCfAXwrs1xv1zQqIHO5okh75JKs7ijagwr_o1X1pCXTZ0jH1fbML3vAPmMWcBGcb7u2P3JBMHvDdClA7xPs5VoeHLvm2Vx8gYh_Un9zIpoX1qJBeIL4AVBzl2GRCNT6sdEbWuvCSbmDu7HwKtg%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8edba60882da49e099a5a90608dac68b&_e=hu-NpRFZAmYkT5xwF1hFY5SD_OWPRRDvNCkWB2j7anA__NYEqod8ZC6zR5M5K3ogq_NWKbaVfBuufwbIl0gxRhqanqbxsM8qXkMBz-HFXFJ-vLFPHgXpJboQHMV-IHOVoY5b93FButUC_i7WB0u4ki5wuXo_PnHqe5ANhtAiqIKBjuALX1Iugl2dNJ7VhZIWjLdl3jDPtL8ph8Sopp_n3VqiaquQsGx0E20l7h6Q5Z_FuJtLTXI2H1U42qqXtLSHGu4p2n3G5lggBw5ynet9suQ8cfkNtwtWhxefTphft-ZmVY5YGgEcutpM4AdF9s5EKYNX7rUlqZMY9aUaYN45-c3H-p8LCvFENSbTDqambGLplB3phPY1Pyx2iQ-DJThbowcxaMru3ejfj6r47XszmQ%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8edba60882da49e099a5a90608dac68b&_e=hu-NpRFZAmYkT5xwF1hFY5SD_OWPRRDvNCkWB2j7anA__NYEqod8ZC6zR5M5K3ogq_NWKbaVfBuufwbIl0gxRhqanqbxsM8qXkMBz-HFXFJ-vLFPHgXpJboQHMV-IHOVoY5b93FButUC_i7WB0u4ki5wuXo_PnHqe5ANhtAiqIKBjuALX1Iugl2dNJ7VhZIWjLdl3jDPtL8ph8Sopp_n3VqiaquQsGx0E20l7h6Q5Z_FuJtLTXI2H1U42qqXtLSH4i9ARzYfyNmXiubLdQqVh45VTqUGihb3ZqsKt1h2s1jJ5p--ynvvXpfXQMTaMD96wKDgCkDecuiHlSg6Nfc6TT4-jw7EyMj-qhVAFo3RIRWHgstXOu2bks7p7DtKox2ii8ZMHyHHKa_cikyLgqzqRA%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8edba60882da49e099a5a90608dac68b&_e=hu-NpRFZAmYkT5xwF1hFY5SD_OWPRRDvNCkWB2j7anA__NYEqod8ZC6zR5M5K3ogq_NWKbaVfBuufwbIl0gxRhqanqbxsM8qXkMBz-HFXFJ-vLFPHgXpJboQHMV-IHOVoY5b93FButUC_i7WB0u4ki5wuXo_PnHqe5ANhtAiqIKBjuALX1Iugl2dNJ7VhZIWjLdl3jDPtL8ph8Sopp_n3VqiaquQsGx0E20l7h6Q5Z_FuJtLTXI2H1U42qqXtLSHB6KTu88ItStOwOV5U-yJQS___dhjs2Y17YmT5s77Ev6qt-Gr3AhphY_0BhPfdwwubtP6TkeN-ZjHqnzgOaX2O2BI4zp_kr0v4Pp85sunxJCkLfZFfExawtGFR3Ndqaw8zl3tzL-J-S_wcEsnvuH4OQ%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8edba60882da49e099a5a90608dac68b&_e=hu-NpRFZAmYkT5xwF1hFY5SD_OWPRRDvNCkWB2j7anA__NYEqod8ZC6zR5M5K3ogq_NWKbaVfBuufwbIl0gxRhqanqbxsM8qXkMBz-HFXFJ-vLFPHgXpJboQHMV-IHOVoY5b93FButUC_i7WB0u4ki5wuXo_PnHqe5ANhtAiqIKBjuALX1Iugl2dNJ7VhZIWjLdl3jDPtL8ph8Sopp_n3VqiaquQsGx0E20l7h6Q5Z_FuJtLTXI2H1U42qqXtLSHPd_JvayRIkSB15hSK6IZiatnQ2qgkag1Shp72BomZ-itKppmXeKrfHX5-vhGQfbiiWI9-ocOuAF0nsRmjrfna5ByR4N07U3OoXMFC-EOdRhTPkcYO9qggv7vm8kYQW3kEfoNqPTFapu4icEWwrOIDg%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---

clean_body: Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested. | | | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested. Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America. The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution. But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench. Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda? Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda. As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats." What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic? Please share your thoughts with me using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away. Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench. You can easily complete your National Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link: And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to undermine the separation of powers at the heart of limited government. I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order. That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly reaching and teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours! These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America. Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court." Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty. Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America. Restoring excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum. We undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away--the link is below. Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

body:

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. ---
| Peter, I can’t wait to see my fellow patriots of Amargosa Valley and Pahrump on Monday, Sept 11th, as I make the first stops of my Nevada speaking tour! I’ll be hosting 3 events in the area so check out the _tour schedule below_ and come join us! At each stop, I'll be sharing my plans to **_fix the economy_** , _**strengthen national defense**_, and restore _**U.S energy independence**_. Fixing the disastrous policies of our far-left leaders won’t be easy, but I’m not afraid of a fight, and when I get to Congress **I will fight for you!** I’ve been on tour before... As a Senior USAF Officer, I've mobilized thousands under my command to fight for our country, and _**I will do the same for Nevada**_. Our state is under threat thanks to weak leadership by do-nothing-democrats, and now is the time to unite as one, and fight back for our future.

So come out and join the cause, as we fight together to **Flip Nevada Red!!**

Fledgling Republican candidate for President Ron DeSantis conducted a shameless and classless political stunt on Saturday at the highly anticipated Iowa vs Iowa State college football game. Obviously angered by the fact that he garnered no attention from attendees, as Trump stole the spotlight from thousands of sports fans, DeSantis's campaign staff passed out flyers attacking former First Lady Melania Trump.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8aa8fb2d-1f47-45de-baf5-b9ef37ceaa2f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The flyers showed a picture of Melania Trump with a large red heading that reads 'MISSING.' Underneath the photo of Melania Trump the flyer continues, "Have you seen this woman? Where is our First Lady? Why is Donald Trump hiding her? We miss her. Please call 561-832-2600 if found." See that flyer below...
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ecd88cd3-44d7-45d9-b624-30ef75263f84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The number shown on the flyer is the phone number for Mar-a-Lago, which is the residence of First Lady Melania Trump and President Trump. Encouraging fair-goers to harass the former First Lady of the United States is classless and disgusting.
Unfortunately for Ron DeSantis and his campaign staff, this classless move is par for the course.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4e53e2b1-19d1-4715-9e7c-37eab7cbcbd7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
DeSantis also harassed the former First Lady by flying a banner over the Iowa v Iowa State college football game which he and President Trump were both in attendance at that read "Where's Melania?" See a clip of that banner being flown above the stadium below...
[](https://substack.com/redirect/5af16f2c-43a1-4815-b8ea-68369e7854b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
When President Trump arrived for the game, he was greeted by thousands of adoring fans and supporters who cheered as he walked through the stadium and greeted Iowans. See a clip of Trump being cheered at the Iowa vs Iowa State football game below...
[](https://substack.com/redirect/cf4828fe-d4de-4cc0-b4d9-22499598abd9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7eb3c562-8821-4922-8819-9ca7895241a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
It's important to remember that Florida Governor Ron DeSantis currently trails former President Donald Trump in Iowa Republican primary polls by a substantial 37 points. Additionally, [51% of voters said Donald Trump ](https://substack.com/redirect/4410f082-c507-4dfc-b2ba-1ba99dfb0d65?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)would be their first pick among candidates in the crowded 2024 GOP primary, according to a survey [conducted by Iowa State University](https://substack.com/redirect/18d45a56-9fa9-4a58-acce-700c21099304?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and polling firm Civiqs.
Though Ron DeSantis may have large corporate donors, his campaign continues to bleed cash, and support. His lackluster, gutless, and weak performance at the first Republican debate only cemented his status as the Jeb Bush of 2024.
His latest attempt to harass and intimidate the former First Lady only shows how desperate Florida Governor Ron DeSantis has become in his quest to undermine the MAGA, America First movement. DeSantis has he abandoned the State of Florida, a state which is currently one massive hurricane away from a complete insurance market and housing collapse.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d1f0f7ab-8363-4650-b9aa-84ed218693f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
From the safety of the people of Florida, to the safety and privacy of former First Lady Melania Trump, Ron DeSantis has shown that he will do quite literally anything to become President. Unfortunately, for DeSanctimonious, all of the money in the world and all of Rupert Murdoch's men couldn't make Ron DeSantis likable again. He will never be able to afford the personality transplant he desperately needs, and he will never be able to regain the trust of the MAGA, pro-Trump base.
DeSantis destroyed his political career when he betrayed President Donald Trump, the man who is most responsible for DeSantis's nail biter 2018 Gubernatorial victory in Florida. As DeSantis continues to spiral downward, we can only expect more of the classlessness of DeSantis and his wife to be amplified through vicious and pointless attacks against those who DeSantis perceives to be 'in his way.'
In reality, DeSantis is standing in his own way. His unlikable character, coupled with his odd and awkward behavior and lack of social skills, and his willingness to compromise and flip flop on key policy issues for political power have created an incredibly unpopular Presidential candidate and a Governor worthy of national contempt and disdain.
While President Trump will continue to soar in national polls as our country succumbs to the chaos of the illegitimate Biden regime, DeSantis will be forced to learn the hard way...

name: Yadira Caraveo
subject: Never forget
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Peter, today marks the 22nd anniversary of 9/11.

I’m sure all of you remember where you were twenty-two years ago when our country was attacked and we lost countless innocent lives in a senseless act of violence.

Today and always, we must honor those who lost their lives and remember the sacrifices our service members made to protect our citizens, values, and security.

Just as we did in that horrific moment, today we can come together, carry on those heroes’ legacies, and remain committed to standing staunchly against terrorism and hate from enemies foreign and domestic. _Never forget._

Forward together,

_Yadira Caraveo_ |
---

name: Conservatives Give
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=82b5bfb9ef51478a9622d3bf72e74cb2&_e=5CbRyUKCRjEV3SVu-YSgsKLd2ZHz_e1zLqrkyXNeWORIN2D8zJXWgls05juB8LIEnJ9BWJ5_DjT-ME1tSrs_4_c_yVlDVBAqGDKZ0XA0YJqYn1UF802KZnk-2fhQZHkfMskHHFCkaQiw-9DGPIxsAPO_CfKOJWoWVTeZh5Y9ee-Vx-SeP4iW5qb177TgfoJTMKmNOODvh2_hXUKUN28RL51RK6g_qT2VT0S1cTgNcp9C_nNhd8GKZbMCpuM4Ehat1zwWkU8Mal8-mmjbqjEQC86tYeufWR7GHMFJUb5VjAsKE_Z83b5X4Lb0wYXUcubuQ5MsCHZIhD3rOZKfHMHyfWy40WYsLSZYwx-XJwPKJ2pri8PsCFTmLNO9uj0V0EbLddMPwC8dnaC0AciJoH3Glg%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=82b5bfb9ef51478a9622d3bf72e74cb2&_e=5CbRyUKCRjEV3SVu-YSgsKLd2ZHz_e1zLqrkyXNeWORIN2D8zJXWgls05juB8LIEnJ9BWJ5_DjT-ME1tSrs_4_c_yVlDVBAqGDKZ0XA0YJqYn1UF802KZnk-2fhQZHkfMskHHFCkaQiw-9DGPIxsAPO_CfKOJWoWVTeZh5Y9ee-Vx-SeP4iW5qb177TgfoJTMKmNOODvh2_hXUKUN28RL51RK6g_qT2VT0S1cTgNcp9C_nNhd8GKZbMCpuM4EhatzxeWqUUFlLlZGQSsZ2rzcSokZRHdC7aqdRWGVEg-H4bN1zaybc-K04V87nz2oroQNiKJO3SYtJ55Rgj1EXRbHicARgjV-QrCVOTelP5aP8OZoA3PQ7sGs_pzDj_HGiT3VYzRFiWhVAwgQ5TtAYHg4w%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=82b5bfb9ef51478a9622d3bf72e74cb2&_e=5CbRyUKCRjEV3SVu-YSgsKLd2ZHz_e1zLqrkyXNeWORIN2D8zJXWgls05juB8LIEnJ9BWJ5_DjT-ME1tSrs_4_c_yVlDVBAqGDKZ0XA0YJqYn1UF802KZnk-2fhQZHkfMskHHFCkaQiw-9DGPIxsAPO_CfKOJWoWVTeZh5Y9ee-Vx-SeP4iW5qb177TgfoJTMKmNOODvh2_hXUKUN28RL51RK6g_qT2VT0S1cTgNcp9C_nNhd8GKZbMCpuM4Ehatoj4GAyeK3qKC2CbfZf-31TuxNqovnjTb5UUfN8y9p5ctAmWUroOjXbQ-5mk8sp9vBB4KVqZRDo5GqEsLMo1YHbex73P8EYlmygDMYdIaNhrflHkyTvsbWGHo6VNFJjZkiltO6pceyVcSIPOdkWNogQ%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=82b5bfb9ef51478a9622d3bf72e74cb2&_e=5CbRyUKCRjEV3SVu-YSgsKLd2ZHz_e1zLqrkyXNeWORIN2D8zJXWgls05juB8LIEnJ9BWJ5_DjT-ME1tSrs_4_c_yVlDVBAqGDKZ0XA0YJqYn1UF802KZnk-2fhQZHkfMskHHFCkaQiw-9DGPIxsAPO_CfKOJWoWVTeZh5Y9ee-Vx-SeP4iW5qb177TgfoJTMKmNOODvh2_hXUKUN28RL51RK6g_qT2VT0S1cTgNcp9C_nNhd8GKZbMCpuM4EhatJRLewjKjbzlvGINd-Q0_Au5vnXmhYzSVdGTUf0wkVal759rxRjFqXQx0fEgKeiYenOeKUJq_iGlQ_gX0_W-SBP1xIDz17nL2Glh_DQhvAFZbXpAQOn-vZoTNK4I_ineS7zdHGt_qaSiUw5MfLtbBlQ%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=82b5bfb9ef51478a9622d3bf72e74cb2&_e=5CbRyUKCRjEV3SVu-YSgsKLd2ZHz_e1zLqrkyXNeWORIN2D8zJXWgls05juB8LIEnJ9BWJ5_DjT-ME1tSrs_4_c_yVlDVBAqGDKZ0XA0YJqYn1UF802KZnk-2fhQZHkfMskHHFCkaQiw-9DGPIxsAPO_CfKOJWoWVTeZh5Y9ee-Vx-SeP4iW5qb177TgfoJTMKmNOODvh2_hXUKUN28RL51RK6g_qT2VT0S1cTgNcp9C_nNhd8GKZbMCpuM4EhatqiF-iUEcIazMsMxikETOi4lP9N7enDU4vh3Y-vlFeTUJNK8oJ36YQPyO9OxGP8clAMQ4a_ARthCbxsbBOFyi9-oN-WpJ70DTExoueFoNKPr6oyRU1hK4LgNGjcxFkzj0s1OpjqUtXCxW3lkby1E-sQ%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Conservatives Give
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=82b5bfb9ef51478a9622d3bf72e74cb2&_t=xuq4JCbMGVI6VWEwx_ld3LsKHMgrtpGpih78BIrDo8kH57Of3D3OqPEo4y6Tpn94VIq4cM6ht_zRuu8WT0ZJHf2u4W30vdaHe6SvIUB7DEBx0j6qbxr9c0SX18PQSEyPK_Ll0b74yL0tWxPuU3A4WSAU_h4w1W3ZK-aaG1jCJz8%3D)

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Trump is on high alert after receiving this threat from a stalker
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 11, 2023

Trump is on high
alert after receiving this threat from a stalker
Being in the public eye can
put a target on your back. And Trump is learning that in the
worst way possible.

And Trump is on high alert after
receiving this threat from a stalker.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Trump prosecutors make a
huge mistake they will forever regret

The Trump indictment
case in Georgia is well underway. And we already have the first
major mistake.
➞ Continue Reading

Joe Biden fell seriously
ill when he heard what his enemies were about to do

President Biden just
got played. He has no idea what to do next.
➞ Continue Reading

Ron DeSantis went nuclear
after being hit with a heart-stopping ambush

Radical Leftists will
do anything to go after someone they view as a threat. That
includes attacking a prominent Republican presidential candidate.

➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

TheFederalistWire.com

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

today@thefederalistwire.com

name: Catherine Engelbrecht
subject: And now for some good news...
body:
Latest news from True the Vote
| | | September 11, 2023 | [Read Online](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/7lGnFEBV30RHklOg_mstw6N_-cQbeN93UNyrRA0hq11uYp775wBSJvhzU6NYkzh1ayYEytoBK-j5lyGBe6h4ocmVaVzDGM6PJ38fnN3AFUbUbB5vLElWThbYd1na6qaS-XCEd3p0Q4WhDSRwIpFT0ZHB0GlCY5FgD7UP1Rsf6OIcyC4n5YoleVG4beDKrNR8jzx2Ze7hm_9xWcjlM6eMCKQoNlAdhk8nfgWAHSAN_iVRinJSRvm0K5u88foQWqYeORRnvwkGTc0jWSUn0Qedm1cKjI4POuAFNJ6LEDOJc4BuupJuyAyeOoDKKPKseNpg14Bi6H-oUiwChALaJPYXVWl0hUNIUe_y2ayIoFyfr44Df3bPA6Mjk6keRUJyWV-WgUHcJ-kEpK6h1jwXlNWF23i5dgCWOjxjS5N7rMC9zIxUDSiBbtKnffTWIZERvyOYxJDkJiArTs3zLziFpCjuRZ6gYJCwiK5-i9FkRpol_5zv9HEoTrvtUXznvud_j7KqSNbzSMlGwUAXREu3TWKykKXOX0zDnsFn67bLnZ3mB7U/3zi/aZZD3XaDR_SEOKlgYke-Tg/h0/-LuYOi3TENe6G_rQrkcubn9UP0WcIuU1-2DqRPI9tCw)
---
| | | |
---
Hi Friend -
| | Straight out of the gate I want to thank everyone who read, forwarded, commented, prayed, or donated because of our last email. The response was tremendous! [Thank you for your support!](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/qOpxPyqH3iJyXA2JSR62HfjZt-BPNqgA3ijwg_5Jj_OlHnCTnA95yf3sUe8HbeyMcSJ-6s4zE6j7cXPO7LStuMPWP9ysirak2NstXCAaOEeFCApHadEg3osZTOLgU4YSrj7rsBOO-s7ojNnDJEaJkCfoKelJo8lkI20mPfKO5ggXSpYnfcyRQNTMNpBoDU6P/3zi/aZZD3XaDR_SEOKlgYke-Tg/h1/imPbPXz88H7aEjduRs7oMf7WAeeam3H1jpU3IJM2H-g)
---
And now for some good news ...
We are seeing courtroom victories, legislative leadership, investigation breakthroughs, partnership opportunities, and best of all, a steady rise in the number of faithful Americans who recognize our country is in peril and are speaking out and stepping up in new ways, translating their passions into actions, all for the good of the Republic. It’s exciting!
The last few years have been extremely difficult - and we all know the difficulties are far from over. But, there is no battle that cannot be won if Americans stand together. I’ll restrain myself from launching a full-on pep rally, but we have a lot to be positive about:
Arizona Superior Court in Yavapai County found that the state’s process for signature matching on mail-in ballots [was unlawful](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/qOpxPyqH3iJyXA2JSR62HVDSXU9KpU3Gr6UPfIJEonzHj8gKv9Sk9365OBmc4pNLQGVYFmTcI3u3zHoouam5jAiEcYSzlntIxn6kGUWCoJi_ELXBxd9wR_ooDZv6Q7Wc0jEkgDqN3d6SSjCvS9FLJTAF9Sb6pVVo_T8DaR4FXq9JxiJfPZu4vxHl7RlxaC7Dk6dniuV0-1A_Zux3vf3tx--q-gRTlRAW_QeKYdUWPbJT7-G-S2kiltrT00kkfsODkGbRGdW82KDkfeQIq3ibIjvgFFx3leqZABywWPchRnLVVoAkKPKlh65P9zXtgXM-IS0-gKvDJfbJJxvGVYmWbg/3zi/aZZD3XaDR_SEOKlgYke-Tg/h2/JSFaqA1tJFsY7zBJ6Dr_qAgt_tfND0gTT26HwCpeSIU). A Georgia Federal Court [affirmed protections ](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/WKx4S7EdNIFY8bzDS4quY91CLc-FJAw6ye1iLnzX751xc21HRn78Oc79Zj12t4rO7AMMXiXZXmbpSoUFaXxt3nyOFgaw9crs11VJ5VvxNcGlLNjDMsgz6pVYes-ySpAw2dVi0UNSrRJ8822eV2xZhRqGKrOxTicN5GYnE6gY8uYPekjolMJjA6YkJp4rzQe2LNA4RuPK4SBiLX-qwqi4oEEbV0ET6-xZVGZCKehhBI5KvBrB38jlR8J37uRDdEtyLp6vOxJ_DdvqF2utXeZhcBoklEolVBJ9Ovq-TCH_ln0/3zi/aZZD3XaDR_SEOKlgYke-Tg/h3/CB3kgwMfKH3JmnzmddD-lW5qhDEXgZFJbDw48vxlWdQ)against ballot harvesting and dropbox abuse. And in Florida Federal Court, a suit that attempted to prevent President Trump from running for reelection [was dismissed](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/Qvk83lMrxpyahZ2UDrJlseWdM-ceV-MaIaM-FER9kbcZPG8czRYKJ2aTwSSIYFgdr-pv6eMJ1Za092m_srf4xXQK8-bohE_so0yxdvaF_STQIyYxUz24HD1DtMQnaUr76LCpud2e4TIcp4qhvEbr-uJqdxi2inaoLAZn-ao9ha2AVquVaMx1I2gPeGpgP2ZMX55dfnEWF4ynz_mnOgp8gm-spaFdgBsVb_kbfnqCvbbZjc-0p2dA8yj5Qt7KriCHVMb8oemlY52cMO9guv6EsQ/3zi/aZZD3XaDR_SEOKlgYke-Tg/h4/Cz36nPXpAZcykjeaZio8qrdyCyTi7qCNxEFeLSegg7o).
Common-sense legislative reforms are happening all over the country. To give you a sense of the scale of battle, check out this tracker from Voting Rights Lab, currently following [1,894 election related bills](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/qOpxPyqH3iJyXA2JSR62HSK_67hWGLhbidNR3N8k0ws91YJQJLrrlaj5uNpqhN8hxSwLS4dqgZ7-z958vHGr5JAXUSgfiq-CLTtj2uvP-Ykmh8cDWBCiPSOmOX4M7BfXGWkWxebbmX3a6Ho_Mhra_4pzVU_Rdu6ZNreMVb9o1tGc5RpZxe3mYG2Ktq9h8CxJGEZiNHTmX04W8D2hHSdGbg/3zi/aZZD3XaDR_SEOKlgYke-Tg/h5/p4l99U42sgU2YnNmHAMQGd6bH8tYVJDbAbof1HB_aMA). _(Note: Voting Rights Lab is not a fan of ours, nor do we share their views, but I thought you would find their spreadsheet approach insightful)._
Researchers are making strides in uncovering ballot trafficking, machine manipulation, election finance abuse, noncitizen registration, and more. Evidence-backed announcements from [Kari Lake’s team](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/qOpxPyqH3iJyXA2JSR62HYEs0-ecvr_C0rxkB1fL9sVV3nM8fUesLjRnA-TJDP8O3F_HnJDT5oj1onQaRBpkilIgaG6IJbClz30CpTltI5gFyoImCA147OUdhlo-39o5_hAqqDYUCHEoL7dKneluuCStHGMdeGjbuwhRVzf4Gc08eKSPZVhCsYGuky10HL9UXP6TzjtZMW55u-nRoPJHx_UgpysPUUwRfUlKJv5uAk8/3zi/aZZD3XaDR_SEOKlgYke-Tg/h6/vY8wUXBr9pPUG_4siopOZyGZnS99zrLTMJ1kOTnUeF0) and [Gateway Pundit](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/Qvk83lMrxpyahZ2UDrJlsZD1io-QltjznbHQZuI9-PRlAiRjdwI-x8PkQ1L6GAk2zAdkwI2JWcZRGa69UijomaSFF8ICYHTUwLiFZvTfK40Cm7VptnJygd0UCPPCbTvOiqzY9MLdIJHBfUqk2ifGIcSKmpeZ0dY1JGJMr0Zs_xxsbb4lvhb5UCz0gRBJ7wPTgPBo6iQ2gnqx4kQ7rohQfsfpXpJ8L6S2fgSA5_capGxQUPyQps1FHZ-HmwVkOePDulDpnPMJwq--_yv3xwu-PA/3zi/aZZD3XaDR_SEOKlgYke-Tg/h7/ZLhE5KjN39T-WS2SqV8A3iKQivzZWFPe3NsBJsY7agE) are testaments to the value of perseverance - and there’s more to come! We are privileged to work with so many great teams, providing research, tech, and legal support when needed.
Last week I wrote about our three non-negotiable goals for 2024:
1. Election processes must follow the law.
2. Voter rolls must be accurate.
3. Citizens, sheriffs, and legislators must be equipped to participate.

While we continue to make great headway, last week we advanced exponentially; new tech, new collaborations, new opportunities - all good!
And finally, we are thrilled to see the growing numbers of people who recognize that America is worth saving; that we are not going to stand by silently and let WEF, WHO, and Marxist politicos define our future; and that engaging in elections, by voting, by serving, will unite us in ways we’ve never experienced, for the good.
Hard times are still ahead. We will continue to take massive incoming. [But we are over the target.](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/qOpxPyqH3iJyXA2JSR62HfjZt-BPNqgA3ijwg_5Jj_OlHnCTnA95yf3sUe8HbeyMcSJ-6s4zE6j7cXPO7LStuMPWP9ysirak2NstXCAaOEeFCApHadEg3osZTOLgU4YSrj7rsBOO-s7ojNnDJEaJkCfoKelJo8lkI20mPfKO5ggXSpYnfcyRQNTMNpBoDU6P/3zi/aZZD3XaDR_SEOKlgYke-Tg/h8/B4bQr0_iyF3IFBskJFm5m9BY92YbUSuINZq4r513CqE) And God’s people are awake and increasingly, rightfully, unafraid.
Keep the faith. Never quit.
Ever onward-

clean_body: Latest news from True the Vote | | | September 11, 2023 | | | | | Hi Friend - | | Straight out of the gate I want to thank everyone who read, forwarded, commented, prayed, or donated because of our last email. The response was tremendous! And now for some good news ... We are seeing courtroom victories, legislative leadership, investigation breakthroughs, partnership opportunities, and best of all, a steady rise in the number of faithful Americans who recognize our country is in peril and are speaking out and stepping up in new ways, translating their passions into actions, all for the good of the Republic. It’s exciting! The last few years have been extremely difficult - and we all know the difficulties are far from over. But, there is no battle that cannot be won if Americans stand together. I’ll restrain myself from launching a full-on pep rally, but we have a lot to be positive about: Arizona Superior Court in Yavapai County found that the state’s process for signature matching on mail-in ballots . A Georgia Federal Court ballot harvesting and dropbox abuse. And in Florida Federal Court, a suit that attempted to prevent President Trump from running for reelection . Common-sense legislative reforms are happening all over the country. To give you a sense of the scale of battle, check out this tracker from Voting Rights Lab, currently following . (Note: Voting Rights Lab is not a fan of ours, nor do we share their views, but I thought you would find their spreadsheet approach insightful). Researchers are making strides in uncovering ballot trafficking, machine manipulation, election finance abuse, noncitizen registration, and more. Evidence-backed announcements from and are testaments to the value of perseverance - and there’s more to come! We are privileged to work with so many great teams, providing research, tech, and legal support when needed. Last week I wrote about our three non-negotiable goals for 2024: 1. Election processes must follow the law. 2. Voter rolls must be accurate. 3. Citizens, sheriffs, and legislators must be equipped to participate. While we continue to make great headway, last week we advanced exponentially; new tech, new collaborations, new opportunities - all good! And finally, we are thrilled to see the growing numbers of people who recognize that America is worth saving; that we are not going to stand by silently and let WEF, WHO, and Marxist politicos define our future; and that engaging in elections, by voting, by serving, will unite us in ways we’ve never experienced, for the good. Hard times are still ahead. We will continue to take massive incoming. And God’s people are awake and increasingly, rightfully, unafraid. Keep the faith. Never quit. Ever onward- | PS - I’ll be back online tonight (Monday, 9/11 @ 7p et). | PPS - There’s much good work to be done! | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Update your email preferences or unsubscribe (C) True the Vote PO Box 3109 #19128 Houston, Texas 77253-3109, United States of America

name: =?utf-8?Q?Eric=20Underwood=2C=20NEGOP=20Chairman?=
subject: Patriot Day Reminds Us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
of our ability to unite | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12650448?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=6ecb841f17&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
| As we got ready for work and helped our children prepare for school on Tuesday morning 22 years ago, our lives as Americans were about to be changed forever.

We all have a story to tell about what was happening in our lives when we became aware of the tragedy that was unfolding as the terrorist acts led to destruction at the World Trade Center, Pentagon, and field in Shanksville, Pennsylvania.

It’s important to remember those we lost that day, how American history changed and how it changed us.
---
|
---
| We must also never forget the courage of Flight 93 passengers, and the bravery and selflessness of every patriot who acted to give aid and comfort.

Today, when the struggles, catastrophes and heartbreak are heavy burdens to bear, let us be inspired by the heroism of so many Americans who came together to help one another through the national devastation to endure.

On this Patriot Day, let our memory of them galvanize us to exercise the American Spirit with solidarity and good will for truth, justice and healing.
---
| For America,

Republican Party of Nebraska
---
| | [PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
---

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 First Constitutional Amendment vote on guns THIS WEEK 🇺🇸 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
As early as this week, the California legislature will vote on a resolution calling for a Constitutional amendment to make our communities safer from gun violence.

Friends -
As early as this week, the California legislature will vote on a resolution calling for a Constitutional Amendment to make our communities safer from gun violence.
Before they do, I want you to send a message to the California legislators who are going to cast a historic vote, and legislators we'll need all across the country to get this done.
This is a small and simple act, but it will speak VOLUMES about the desire in communities across the country for a Constitutional Amendment on guns.
[**Add your name as an official Citizen Co-Sponsor of our Right to Safety Constitutional Amendment to make our communities safer from gun violence.**](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/em-amdt-cosponsor/?source=em230911-1-f&refcode2=1566.4767699.IF02R2&akid=1566%2E4767699%2EIF02R2)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/em-amdt-cosponsor/?source=em230911-1-f&refcode2=1566.4767699.IF02R2&akid=1566%2E4767699%2EIF02R2)
The Right to Safety Constitutional Amendment will:
* Raise the federal minimum age to buy a firearm from 18 to 21.

* Mandate universal background checks.

* Institute a reasonable waiting period for all gun purchases.

* Ban civilian purchase of assault weapons.

**And here is my pledge to you: If and when this passes in California, I will put significant resources behind getting it introduced and passed in other states.**
Will finding 33 more states calling to amend the Constitution be easy? No, of course not, I am clear-eyed about that.
But it has to start somewhere. And it will... in California. But first:
[**Add your name as an official Citizen Co-Sponsor of our Right to Safety Constitutional Amendment to make our communities safer from gun violence.**](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/em-amdt-cosponsor/?source=em230911-1-f&refcode2=1566.4767699.IF02R2&akid=1566%2E4767699%2EIF02R2)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/em-amdt-cosponsor/?source=em230911-1-f&refcode2=1566.4767699.IF02R2&akid=1566%2E4767699%2EIF02R2)
If Congress and the courts will not take action to help make our communities safer from gun violence, then we — the people — must do it ourselves.
Thank you for making your voice heard,
Gavin Newsom
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/em-amdt-cosponsor/?source=em230911-1-f&refcode2=1566.4767699.IF02R2&akid=1566%2E4767699%2EIF02R2)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=1566%2E4767699%2EIF02R2).
PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
1787 Tribute Road, Suite K
Sacramento, CA 95815

name: Josh Gottheimer
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | Friend,

Today is the 22nd anniversary of the 9/11 terrorist attacks, a horrific day when nearly 3,000 Americans lost their lives, including more than 700 of our friends and family in New Jersey, and scores of our heroic first responders.

Since then, more than 2,000 others who were in and around the World Trade Center, including many first responders, have died from toxic 9/11 exposure.

September 11th brings up memories of tragedy and loss, but it also reminds us of the importance of American unity.

In the wake of 9/11, we came together as a country, determined to honor those who lost their lives and prevent anything like this from ever happening again. Regardless of party or region, we united to stand up for the greatest democracy in the world.

We must continue to honor those we lost by standing up to terror, putting American families and unity ahead of political divides, getting the backs of our veterans, active duty, and first responders, and working every day to protect our democracy — the greatest the world has ever seen.

I hope you will join me in taking a moment to remember the lives lost and commit to honoring their sacrifices and memories. God bless America.

Thank you,

Josh
---
|
---

name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of best-selling survival food kits.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dde19b92d32b440ab01f2021c9a0f921&_e=GLfUwoN6zv9Kweas7tDBpUhCY84Bj-R2zSZQYDkcnGrvbNxGHINuXLG0MaTimpNiTZywtJjjiA7xD1oJTdgoyWIfexaYTlqDDea91EXAKCr7EAjTyWfw_Hcnts__BhW7vjoRiqYyrfAXd_t_r9zu37JKBicziW5wa-yfyyk6-6X_3VCe9vJtVPlBxA3Gqyq_FCeeQNeYPLI38cDxqA0jv1j4ZFoynbkTE3QgiGoc9VjM4hHNVwfFjIzF7UcMGXR8tNHadvTJVieu6Wu1tVgOyEA6bh6SWwIhk0UfiFdmzeo%3D) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can.

According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: "Food shortages are coming." Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can. name: Georgia House Democrats
subject: Our Wish for All of Us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC
body:
Peter,

Today marks one of the saddest days in our nation’s history: September 11th, 2001, when we lost nearly 3,000 Americans in the most violent terrorist attack on our soil. As well as countless First Responders and volunteers lost to the aftereffects of their heroic rescue and rebuilding efforts.

September 11th is also remarkable as a reminder that, when challenged, Americans come together. Georgia House Democrats wish you a day of peace, hope and family. And of pride that, as Americans, we are resilient - and we stand strong together when the stakes are high.

Onwards,

Georgia House Democrats

The Georgia House Democratic Caucus is Georgia’s most diverse group of leaders working on the ground every day to secure a blue Georgia. [https://gahousedems.com/]

Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC

Georgia House Democratic Caucus
PO Box 18622
Atlanta, GA 31126
United States

# FROM THE DESK OF NEWT GINGRICH
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **I’m pleased to share with you that The New York Sun is now carrying my exclusive weekly column.**

In it, I'll weigh in on the most pressing matters facing our country – and there are many.

**Under the Biden administration, our nation has lost its way.** Many politicians and major institutions are corrupt. Leading corporations are following their lead.

But it’s the corruption of the media that has me most concerned. In my 70-year career in American politics, I’ve never seen it so bad. For this reason, I’ve chosen The New York Sun as a partner.

It’s a paper that shines like a beacon amid a sea of lies and misinformation. It has done so for nearly 200 years.

**It’s a patriotic paper that lives and breathes American values.** It places our Constitution front and center and has long been among its most valiant defenders.

It remains our nation’s most effective counterweight to The New York Times, which has bizarrely claimed the title of “paper of record” but speaks for so few of our fellow citizens.

Now more than ever, the battle for the future of our nation starts with the restoration of real American journalism, and The New York Sun is devoted to that mission. It truly "shines for all."

But I know what the Sun is up against. All the cards are stacked against us.

To win, we need you to join us. To join The New York Sun is to join the movement to save America.

**Membership starts at just 1 cent per day.**
---

Don’t wait – join today!

Thank you for reading The New York Sun.

name: John Padora
subject: 22 years later
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
| | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=5463553692ce4ac29f9a61a05f6cb214&_e=1yaU4MMnaKiZC6pzggzEaOh6mnorH8LjeN8aXs4WgshbOVDNoPB0rqwcdaKvQyGXJdtfbrr36LY6k7Q7gfZPq30hfE0cfjNkYB2birHHzCiUTCp0ksoRLoRN5xyczAvmLB-QB8X-AqbpammEG2kka8qgWbaO2eflX9AMyOCiGpIFTR6_gj7ng1We2zZA8ASXWD8KYeV9CnijfNwZAa51PA%3D%3D) Friends. September 11th, 2001 was a turning point for our country. Now, 22 years later, I want to take a moment to remember the innocent people who died that day – and in the years that followed – and the families devastated with a wound that will never fully heal. I also want to remember the first responders who risked their lives to help strangers in need, as well as those aboard flight 93, who made the decision to protect their country and their fellow Americans, even though they knew it would mean giving their lives. While millions of Americans will never understand the pain of those who lost loved ones that day, we do – and we will never forget. I will never forget. Thank you, John Paid for by Padora for Colorado

---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). Don't want to receive these emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_s=5463553692ce4ac29f9a61a05f6cb214&_t=_n0TkbH9b9pyoMnooGuzBRCFT4nN1hetzXwdVglNE83Rtv2tNGVh6Xm0dKFMgbKi9K8rd7N37nkr6WRNCGA4CDO2_l_Ta7-ilb3RxIcFUNs%3D)
---
John Padora , 1267 Wild Basin Road, Severance, CO 80550

name: =?utf-8?Q?Russ=20Vought?=
subject: Fighting on many fronts
body:
I want to give you a quick update on some critical projects my team has been working on. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10389704?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | | Friends,

Fall is here and it’s all hands on deck at the Center for Renewing America.

Congress is back in session this week and there are already murmurs of the **next big fight to fund the government**. But more on that later...

For now, I want to give you a _quick update on some critical projects_ my team has been working on.
---
|
---
| **Video series: Top Ten Systemic Issues Within the FBI **
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=fe8898e645&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| In our new [video series](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=e03d80e0f9&e=17913c7d6d), CRA Senior Fellow Steve Friend exposes systemic issues with the Federal Bureau of Investigation.

>From the FBI colluding with Big Tech to target Americans to militarizing the investigative processes, Friend, a former FBI agent, exposes negligence and corruption that plague the Agency.

If you recall, Steve was the _brave whistleblower_ who sacrificed his career to blow the whistle on the FBI’s mishandling of cases related to January 6th. I’m proud to have him on our team.
---
|
---
| **WATCH: Dan Caldwell Confronts the Foreign Policy Establishment in Washington**
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=8f3b53af9e&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| Over the weekend my colleague Dan Caldwell [joined](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=7afb268cec&e=17913c7d6d) the prestigious Washington Journal program on C-SPAN to discuss major problems associated with the Republican party and the Washington establishment’s decrepit foreign policy over the last few decades.

As Dan lays out, **a certain “hubris” set in by those in the establishment** after America became the lone superpower in the world in the post-Cold War era that led to nation-building in Iraq and Afghanistan, trillions of dollars in debt, and thousands of lives lost.

Dan has quickly _become a leader in the movement_ to end endless wars and make our foreign policy serve American interests first. Novel ideas, right?
---
|
---
| **CRA’s Adam Candeub SLAMS Big Tech for Opposing Age Verification to Protect Children From Porn**
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=59e43c50f8&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| CRA Senior Fellow Adam Candeub recently published an [op-ed](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=9ab220f403&e=17913c7d6d) in _The Hill_ slamming big tech for opposing laws that require age verification on porn websites and parental consent to open social media accounts.

Make no mistake. For Big Tech and these porn companies it’s all about the numbers of users, ad dollars, and their bottom line.

That’s why Adam and my CRA colleagues **have****been working behind the scenes for months** with state legislatures and activists to push for age verification laws and restrictions to limit access to porn by children.
---
|
---
| Finally, as I mentioned earlier, the government funding fight is looming in Washington, but the bottom line is: promises were made in Kevin McCarthy’s historic power-sharing agreement with conservatives to become Speaker, and **promises should be kept**.

As I like to tell the team here at the Center, **we have to be able to fight the battle on many fronts**. And as you can tell, we’re doing just that. Thanks for [your support](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=74d04c5303&e=17913c7d6d). We’re in this together.
---
| Sincerely,

Russ Vought
President, Center for Renewing America

**P.S.** A special thank you to all those who [stood by our friend](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=0b2488fb8c&e=17913c7d6d) and colleague Jeffrey Clark. I told Jeff he’s not alone. And so did you.****
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=08e326cca7&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=a5de73717a&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=77b11c4781&e=17913c7d6d)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Center for Renewing America, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
300 Independence Ave. SE
Washington, DC 20003

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=340a9f3c7d&e=17913c7d6d&c=7a1321a13a) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=340a9f3c7d&e=17913c7d6d&c=7a1321a13a).
---
