name: Jaiden (Gadsden Flag)
subject: I was kicked out of school. Here’s what’s next…
body:
I’m guessing you saw me in the news last week.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1p055pt3321un17hgfqtusbbbf2485c4r7pfoa8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5hm6p76c9h2bs "Tuttle Twins")

Dear Friend,

I'm guessing you saw me in the news last week. I'm the 12-year-old boy who was kicked out of class in my school in Colorado because I had a "Don't tread on me" Gadsden flag patch on my backpack.

The vice principal claimed that it was tied to slavery. (Totally false!) And they wouldn't let me come back to class until I removed the patch.

You might not know why this story got so many views -- over 40 million so far!

After I was kicked out of class, I talked with my mom about what to do. I remembered in one of the Tuttle Twins books how the kids got the media involved to fight against some corruption in the government.

[The Tuttle Twins helped me stand up for what I believe in. I want to help them ship their pro-American history books to schools and families. Can you chip in $25 or more today?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq8cthar85icqcoldc0988unk4kqpgupj8ssgis8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5hm6p76c9h2bs)

[Support Tuttle Twins >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl0jvnsc42tet4oms0mdge6fagiht2bfjvp27lq8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5hm6p76c9h2bs)

I asked my mom if we could drive over to the local TV station. She agreed, so I went up and rang the doorbell of their office. Here I am:

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z37h3ruh9qfgkit32tb8qifuk5mddodhvu0cbga0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5hm6p76c9h2bs)

Nobody would speak with me. I felt defeated -- this was a story that needed to be told! My 1st amendment rights were being violated. Why didn't other people care?

Then, my mom decided to reach out to Connor Boyack that night. He's the author of the Tuttle Twins books -- and I'm a huge fan. Connor agreed to share the video my mom had recorded of the vice principal, and now it seems like everyone has seen it!

I'm definitely a little more popular at school now, haha. Lots of other kids are now putting Gadsden flag stickers on their lockers.

I was interviewed by a lot of people afterward. When I talked with Ben Shapiro, he asked me why I knew so much about politics and American history. Here's what I told him:

_" I give it mainly to Connor Boyack with his Tuttle Twins books. I read those growing up, and that really, really helped me. And now I have a good understanding of America and all sorts of key concepts."_

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrbua537dd067ujr31cej9k3hfpk1u7nau86hleg_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5hm6p76c9h2bs)

I'm so happy that Connor shared my story. But what's next?

Well, one day, I want to run for governor of Colorado. I have to be 30 years old, so that will be in the future.

There is something I can do in the meantime. I can use this attention for good. I can pay it forward. I can get other kids to learn the same things I've learned so when the time comes up, they can stand up for themselves, too.

Connor, my mom, and I have been talking over the past few days about what we can do to use this moment for good. And this email is one of the ideas -- we can use my story to encourage people like you to help us.

**So here is what we are doing:**

Connor and his team have some new American history books that teach the ideas of freedom and the founding fathers. They're so much better than the textbooks we have to use in school that don't really teach history with any kind of depth.

**I want more kids to be able to read these history books. So we are launching a fundraiser to raise $25,000 this week, and we will use the money to ship history books to schools across the country -- with a heavy focus on my state, Colorado.** 😀

[Will you stand up with me and help me? I'm super excited by this. Please donate here -- every $25 donation covers the cost of the book and shipping to a library or classroom.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgan0oivki3dcv9d6qqqfu7ntmnmfj2levu07qr0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5hm6p76c9h2bs)

[Donate $25 = 1 Book Distributed >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztlpp8vfl1cejfogb1qthtn8r5pebmo8ej414fa8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5hm6p76c9h2bs)

[Donate $50 = 2 Books Distributed >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh25u850kn0c17ggrlcnje0h0nbh8mgcvpmps5j8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5hm6p76c9h2bs)

[Donate $100 = 4 Books Distributed >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi5h5d84c16rq9tljpbodfva2rf8qggj7rlt2j48_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5hm6p76c9h2bs)

[Donate $200 = 8 Books Distributed >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4al2legaaa4f60ciorqda8mfo35crbunsekoi50_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5hm6p76c9h2bs)

[Donate $500 = 20 Books Distributed >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg1d9e5von56s6hkvtdbm067drlv9mhftljml1pg_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5hm6p76c9h2bs)

[Donate $1,000 = 40 Books Distributed >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zteki33gvtmi21u2tnkvph3kpo7r4cpijdn3cgl0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5hm6p76c9h2bs)

**What 's super cool about this is Connor has a big donor who is passionate about this, and they agreed to double everyone's donations!** So, let's say you want to sponsor 5 books for students. That means you'll actually do 10 books when your donation is matched!

I knew how to act when my school tried to shut me down because I'd been learning these ideas for years. Because of the Tuttle Twins, I know what my rights are and how to stand up for them. People like Connor and you have been part of my story, and I'm grateful.

Now, we have to use this moment for good, and I hope you'll stand with me to make a difference. So many other kids need to learn what I have. It's education -- real, true, good education -- that will make sure other kids don't get tread on, too:

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgo4utln6ipg8nrmuuej6jeqeospv842lsb776b0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5hm6p76c9h2bs)

Let's use this momentum to find more Jaidens -- and get them learning today! I'm pumped to work with the author of my favorite books to help even more kids learn what I have.

[So please support our project today! Donate here:](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuru2nop37ckcoh0351v334jk2arfvgjf1q3eo2g_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5hm6p76c9h2bs)

[Donate $25 = 1 Book Distributed >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6h1f19sgg90i8bd0d8nk9ljruq0ofuu8st7ul78_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5hm6p76c9h2bs)

[Donate $50 = 2 Books Distributed >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu1pt4jk7oeerljf6r612muugvmtndvv84kklqpg_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5hm6p76c9h2bs)

[Donate $100 = 4 Books Distributed >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq21u6nv6lj8c5bmlmpdp2kqdpke0q7seirklk00_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5hm6p76c9h2bs)

[Donate $200 = 8 Books Distributed >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z53u6p8kf1octaqtg3ujlkf140igv2v5la4ibpo0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5hm6p76c9h2bs)

[Donate $500 = 20 Books Distributed >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlq3k9criu3a2ov8o030p19dcdl5vohat2latpv0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5hm6p76c9h2bs)

[Donate $1,000 = 40 Books Distributed >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3pdt2s14i6i8hqfeq0knlu0gjugmiderge2of20_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5hm6p76c9h2bs)

I'm just a 12-year-old kid. I have to focus on my school work and my family, but this is a great opportunity for me to make a difference while I get ready for my gubernatorial campaign 18 years from now.

I hope you can support us! In the meantime, stay free and stay strong!

Jaiden (Gadsden Flag)

Trump Train News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsb7q1d3g0gmd3jrciddi64hinokhq2m0jhqbsio_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8p33c5hm6o3246h22sh2s8i66p71c5hm6p76c9h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za6rflq5mbl7bpohrkpie8d2mhqn7q4g8f7raehg_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5hm6p76c9h2bs)_

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqktckens00nt6d2ritjaablqgr17kg6loajv098_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5hm6p76c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Team Greta
subject: Doing better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greta Martin for AG
body:
Greta’s opponent talks about empowering women. Greta’s actually about it.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69561014/426544062/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_FR_230911EW_B_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTRlMjM0OTYtYzc1MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=B6V_-v41Tb4lRubaAVRVOO60yVd3SDNAo-Uny4gIYl8=) Peter,

After leading the charge to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , Greta’s opponent has talked a lot about empowering women. Unfortunately, her idea of “empowerment” has left millions without the freedom to make their own healthcare decisions, including a 12-year-old girl who was forced to give birth after being raped.

[Greta’s running to restore the Mississippi Attorney General’s office to the people, including the right to make our own choices about healthcare. name: Morgan McGarvey via Blue Amp Action
subject: I’m no stranger to taking on tough fights against the GOP
body:
did you know?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40971cf0-3c8c-45b7-b156-7441d5fa74b4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Hi, Peter. Did you know that I’m the only Democrat representing Kentucky in Congress? This means that the Republican Party will waste no effort in their mission to flip my seat. Every dollar the GOP spends against me will go to mobilization and advertising efforts across my district. [It’s you, me, and our campaign versus the GOP’s multi-million dollar war-chest. If you’re able, I’d be grateful if you made a contribution of $5, $25, or more to help keep our campaign going strong:](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcecfd0e3-7546-4eb7-8f91-6be14cf9ebe4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9dc24c92-dc7b-4cca-9a68-800a865f6951/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| I’m no stranger to taking on tough fights against the GOP, so I can assure you that they want nothing more than to unseat me and turn our commonwealth fully red. We have no choice but to do what we can to compete with the GOP’s message they’ll be spreading across KY-03 from now through Election Day. The only way we’re going to stop this seat from falling into the hands of the Republican Party is if my team of supporters steps up. Grassroots contributions – whether they’re $5 or $50 – are what helped me win my last election, and I know it’s what will help us win our next. [Can I count on you to chip in any amount to help my campaign combat the GOP’s millions they have on reserve to unseat must-hold seats like mine?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0f259160-427f-40e9-965c-5a723fb2703e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3fd48b84-efd0-49de-bdcb-d499d8bc4620/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Sincerely, Morgan McGarvey
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|

So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: Team Bennet
subject: Big Pharma
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_091123_DrugCosts_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_091123_DrugCosts_act]
Hi team,
People in the United States currently pay more for prescription drugs than in any other major economy. Big Pharma — and all the Republicans they write checks for — want to keep it that way.
Americans deserve better.
That’s why last year, Michael fought hard to pass the Inflation Reduction Act, which capped the out-of-pocket cost of insulin for seniors at $35 and gave Medicare the power to negotiate drug prices with pharmaceutical companies. All told, it will save our seniors billions of dollars.
It’s a great start — but Michael won’t stop fighting until we lower the cost of prescription drugs for everyone, Medicare or not.
These are the sort of common-sense policies Michael is dedicated to fighting for in the Senate. But he can’t do it alone.
Michael is working hard to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. By taking back the House and flipping key seats blue, we can make a real difference in the lives of Americans. Will you help him keep up this fight by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_091123_DrugCosts_act]
SUPPORT OUR CAMPAIGN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_091123_DrugCosts_act]
SUPPORT OUR CAMPAIGN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_091123_DrugCosts_act]
Thank you, friend, for being part of this.
Team Bennet
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Michael Bennet <info@michaelbennet.com>
Date: Wed, Sep 6, 2023 at 1:22 PM
Subject: Negotiating drug costs
One year ago, we took on Big Pharma and Republican obstruction to pass the Inflation Reduction Act.
One of the key provisions I fought for required Medicare to negotiate the cost of medication with pharmaceutical companies on behalf of America’s seniors. I was thrilled to see it become law.
The Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services just announced the first ten drugs they have selected for price negotiations. These medications treat cancer, diabetes, heart failure, and more — and in 2022, they cost seniors $3.4 billion in out-of-pocket costs.
This is a big step forward and our progress won't stop here. Over the next four years, Medicare will be empowered to negotiate the cost of up to 60 medications, and another 20 every year after that.
We’re putting the interests of Americans over corporate greed. It won’t just save our seniors billions of dollars — it will save lives.
Now, I’m fighting to ensure we can extend these medication price caps to all Americans.
No one should have to choose between food on the table or life-saving medication. You can join the coalition of Coloradans fighting to lower prescription drug costs by signing my petition here >> [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_090523_prescriptiondrugcosts]

Thank you!

subject: Hearing Aids Just Got Their Biggest Upgrade Yet..
body:
Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids.

| [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56a6ba580dff4d14b1d397e194b9f55c&_e=Enrr6p24kMJAQB4tnvr3C0DMBA08EPiBKuBu1RAPNSsFYrHlZUWcLRvEkdIvWDN3VHwkGVWOX8BuRZfjU8AvpMU1qtSSF8Xj038JV2jxaen-nWufEF0y_i-vcqzwqHPInWtW7vjQQE_bydN-HhaFCvIDL4qAimM7QNaON8DFvoXm0hYu5GGP-6Goe5lADrxSqSbtcww9Zfz7rqoIvEwdt5QHtC4JRpC7JuncOpdC89be3uz9VJNNUUlfIGT9LCxiwku0acG1NjnF8hvvFmkVGrHKbinXInu5un-fwyou1lgIm-_pklCyGJoLcWIrb0xt-oi0teC7XhWy2RkwYpPmgiucmBfmq62f6wBnHCFiHre2M7juYnt1L0GjOoBzl2CcXqFQH3pBWnsSKqZfiT71U_SBULgEKoY1eSTXvvBJsQHFcZ1Fj1EfRbvfRfRiGfwCGQjfMiQLRbpmNLnjXaP0wLshlitaNC99AravTTLud8U%3D)

| 2 Germans are crushing the market with these powerful hearing aids
---
[ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56a6ba580dff4d14b1d397e194b9f55c&_e=Enrr6p24kMJAQB4tnvr3C0DMBA08EPiBKuBu1RAPNSsFYrHlZUWcLRvEkdIvWDN3VHwkGVWOX8BuRZfjU8AvpMU1qtSSF8Xj038JV2jxaen-nWufEF0y_i-vcqzwqHPInWtW7vjQQE_bydN-HhaFCvIDL4qAimM7QNaON8DFvoXm0hYu5GGP-6Goe5lADrxSqSbtcww9Zfz7rqoIvEwdt5QHtC4JRpC7JuncOpdC89be3uz9VJNNUUlfIGT9LCxiwku0acG1NjnF8hvvFmkVGrHKbinXInu5un-fwyou1lgIm-_pklCyGJoLcWIrb0xt-oi0teC7XhWy2RkwYpPmglZt7LyY0Tup7Hm-_o8P586wlnHRohDORa6w2K1o2IkaAVYwoutfwkyiOXmWyoiLMcCJiLd9054564prAl1bIZnZ4zmFRlk6Sw09QWd9-fk23KkL3l8QwoBxVIf7tS41BvCLTHiWxHqKhxQQbHhSQIA%3D)
Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius have been creating successful businesses since college. Now they lead [ hear.com](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56a6ba580dff4d14b1d397e194b9f55c&_e=Enrr6p24kMJAQB4tnvr3C0DMBA08EPiBKuBu1RAPNSsFYrHlZUWcLRvEkdIvWDN3VHwkGVWOX8BuRZfjU8AvpMU1qtSSF8Xj038JV2jxaen-nWufEF0y_i-vcqzwqHPInWtW7vjQQE_bydN-HhaFCvIDL4qAimM7QNaON8DFvoXm0hYu5GGP-6Goe5lADrxSqSbtcww9Zfz7rqoIvEwdt5QHtC4JRpC7JuncOpdC89be3uz9VJNNUUlfIGT9LCxiwku0acG1NjnF8hvvFmkVGrHKbinXInu5un-fwyou1lgIm-_pklCyGJoLcWIrb0xt-oi0teC7XhWy2RkwYpPmgmmR-_0ct5Kg83OmFWZ1Rmg8hYX4Ib3_8ZUEQTeCeGlmwUU2W6QP3h0qbeObB8XciIvxCWkdgQIvx9mOr10MMy1Kt3LfMHwiqfJnLig8uAzHD6ihl3m3HCA8P6b-G6XANZ6Nl8OwcdXkg0AzltpFoB4%3D), the fastest growing hearing aid company in the world. This is their story.

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they are still big and ugly. However, Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius wanted to change this perception with **a revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers** formerly from Siemens. After many years of research and development, this team of engineers came up with a game-changing hearing aid that's completely crushing the market with powerful German technology.

**The result:** A hearing device that packs cutting-edge technology in a design so small, it completely disappears inside the ear. clean_body: Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. | | 2 Germans are crushing the market with these powerful hearing aids Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius have been creating successful businesses since college. Now they lead , the fastest growing hearing aid company in the world. This is their story. Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they are still big and ugly. However, Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius wanted to change this perception with a revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers formerly from Siemens. After many years of research and development, this team of engineers came up with a game-changing hearing aid that's completely crushing the market with powerful German technology. The result: A hearing device that packs cutting-edge technology in a design so small, it completely disappears inside the ear. It's called the Horizon Mini by . Horizon Mini comes with smartphone connectivity, allowing you to control the device with your iPhone or Android. In addition, this new device uses a unique algorithm that is clinically proven to deliver better than normal hearing. You will notice remarkable improvements in your ability to clearly understand speech, even in noisy environments like a busy restaurant. name: Pro Life Update
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2hfsd8bs3d3u2q0diftr186rb589hoqorn6in38_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5hmeo72cph2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmi23aeks0aph8u96fa06fohk06plattes0cnb48_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5hmeo72cph2bs) [NO](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2prmpk5st93jir56efromj0tkrct631sd44r0vg_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5hmeo72cph2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvgvnvauom5jnuqcskfkbqbn96rpnrur20aqlrc0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5hmeo72cph2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1c19l8fc1m5rh8j4kv4hps971ck8c9le6f7n0b0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c5hmeo72cph2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Pro Life Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Today we honor the heroes and the fallen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
In the face of tragedy, we found unity. In the face of despair, we found renewed hope.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=314915caa691473097fdabe71359bbab&_t=7hS357V7A9A8_LMpa7BtyD7ZjZVcow9RHu6QfUaRtNLvI-M347jXcszzq_nqIM8sfwFaqzwKLWiQ19FYOUQU-ZNnyD4v-Sb1qY_xwPAZkP0%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=314915caa691473097fdabe71359bbab&_t=7hS357V7A9A8_LMpa7BtyD7ZjZVcow9RHu6QfUaRtNLvI-M347jXcszzq_nqIM8sfwFaqzwKLWiQ19FYOUQU-ZNnyD4v-Sb1qY_xwPAZkP0%3D)

| [](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=314915caa691473097fdabe71359bbab&_e=RaqvwgjrgvIVlG9dHGX-vC-rtWh0ITJH7KVUh4JneQ5GT_h7BZ7sQPR7BJDZ2PGvx5XTSfRQNRTerP7-UnfjpzkCurLFVAwgZ2_b7lak5Q_qpukI-ACe47dSa2RGddPrKr9CoLE7A-YXKn7pTSYXf2Pn_AVb6QmocpV9MIBIvTpD8VHL6ji9i2M96l96bfzmmcVfzFxLyknl3u6wHj8pr4kbbVeu6uT5sRZKAuiEp9nQpxYn8hTz5cm_dBfArtKK)
I was in U.S. history class in 11th grade on 9/11. We didn't just learn history, we watched it unfold as we watched the aftermath of the catastrophe. I remember to this day watching the heroism of the firefighters, police officers, and first responders who ran not from Ground Zero, but toward it, to help their fellow Americans in need. We honor those brave Americans today - and those who lost their lives as well as their families.

In the weeks that followed, we weren't black or white; gay or straight; Democrat or Republican. We were all American. In the face of tragedy, we found unity. In the face of despair, we found renewed hope. Even as we pray that no calamity like it ever happens again, we can still long to be reunited once again as one nation under God.

Now 22 years later, we have a growing generation of young adults who weren't yet born on that infamous day. We have an opportunity to ask how we commemorate our national identity on this day. We should celebrate our ability to gradually heal even our deepest wounds. We will forever continue to pursue our more perfect Union.

We will honor the heroes and the fallen at the 9/11 Memorial tonight at FDNY 10 House. 🇺🇸

Never Forget,

Vivek Ramaswamy

| | [](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=314915caa691473097fdabe71359bbab&_e=RaqvwgjrgvIVlG9dHGX-vCvsB7XESrRZygcEI8w9wNQoQc5BtZrVoZFdaPcsJwTsNVe3qkrilQlT6BLpKsDyGVLkcZP7PJQDVNyZF8iP0cUJMx35JiF1UV0-6XRoxA4-DMKCMnidngB47GCEvxZBGC2I6HEtoG1f_l2blRBOAhiO8Z_nbGSNwdRnivTwgQJJZiWS5nPPaowRA_uJyBZ9_uZzJy8QavLLILExgm7B8Fc%3D)| [](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=314915caa691473097fdabe71359bbab&_e=RaqvwgjrgvIVlG9dHGX-vJ9g0QWiL-SW8Cz1YoSlElTe8965znGymKECsUIbMk5XQvs__O9ZOD1_rIV0a-zpfGl8E5FQkHvUwU3szeCsS_R03qfeVy4QrTgpW8Prm3VHuol2oT97hKfbCLFPAlC6DmH7dMS0FdTcNoIsw4f9NlAvMKIc2GkU6ADK8FEYyrLPAPpoFhc4zEWOf7oqHdD9Iw%3D%3D)| [](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=314915caa691473097fdabe71359bbab&_e=RaqvwgjrgvIVlG9dHGX-vAxzqCeKBI3A6tpTU0oJytOdsinfb23TwmpwoxvdpHdUfFKM16ancX1jQcf_7z4vjGrqgyg6qF3ds-VukTR5PsWE_YmQKf1LA6BOl1kR2MGsbdA1LtuWxEfb48eb4Sm_XPwXb-2Ypa2NDtbquqZrHt3fqJJ2D2IGrvi5E-z5BT-HNO26Ax6W-vTn9NTkPLyFOT01VSL5bKqPBUY8oh-k75I%3D)

# FROM THE DESK OF NEWT GINGRICH
---
| | Dear Peter, **I’m pleased to share with you that The New York Sun is now carrying my exclusive weekly column.**

In it, I'll weigh in on the most pressing matters facing our country – and there are many.

**Under the Biden administration, our nation has lost its way.** Many politicians and major institutions are corrupt. Leading corporations are following their lead.

But it’s the corruption of the media that has me most concerned. In my 70-year career in American politics, I’ve never seen it so bad. For this reason, I’ve chosen The New York Sun as a partner.

It’s a paper that shines like a beacon amid a sea of lies and misinformation. It has done so for nearly 200 years.

**It’s a patriotic paper that lives and breathes American values.** It places our Constitution front and center and has long been among its most valiant defenders.

It remains our nation’s most effective counterweight to The New York Times, which has bizarrely claimed the title of “paper of record” but speaks for so few of our fellow citizens.

Now more than ever, the battle for the future of our nation starts with the restoration of real American journalism, and The New York Sun is devoted to that mission. It truly "shines for all."

But I know what the Sun is up against. All the cards are stacked against us.

To win, we need you to join us. To join The New York Sun is to join the movement to save America.

**Membership starts at just 1 cent per day.**

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: 🇺🇸 never forget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=451%2E52803%2EzTa9Qh)

| | Peter, It’s been 22 years since the unforgivable attack against our nation on Sept. 11, 2001. It was a dark, dark day in American history—one that I’ll never forget and a day I still think about often. **Today, I hope you’ll take a moment to join me in remembering those we lost and hold a special place in your hearts for the families, friends and loved ones who are still with us today.** Let’s remember not only those who died in the tragic violence, but also the brave first responders and service members who stepped up in the aftermath to protect our great nation. So many courageous men and women made the ultimate sacrifice to defend our freedom, and we owe it to them to recommit ourselves to building a safe, peaceful and prosperous future for every single American. I know today brings so much pain for so many people. But let’s also remember that those who tried to attack and undermine our democracy did not succeed. Instead, in the face of an indescribable tragedy, the American people showed unforgettable strength and resilience. Thank you, Peter, for joining me in honoring the lost, the fallen, and all of our American heroes today. We must never forget, and we will always remember. Sincerely, Angela Alsobrooks
---

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Today We Remember Those We Lost
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]()
body:
| | | | May we Never Forget.
---
---
My Fellow American,
On 9/11/2001, the world changed forever. On that day, extremists launched the deadliest terrorist attack in American history, killing nearly 3,000 innocent men, women, and children in New York, Pennsylvania, and Virginia.
Today, we reflect on the lives lost and extend our support to the grieving friends and families who were left behind. May the happy memories those loved ones share bring comfort and solace to them as we remember those who lost their lives on that fateful day.
Let us also remember the heroism of the first responders and emergency personnel who showcased such extraordinary valor on that day. Our admiration for those first responders, whose exemplary strength and bravery astounds to this day, knows no bounds.
In honor of their dedication and commitment to duty, let us resolve to continue to defend our democracy and bring peace, security, and liberty to all the people and nations across the planet.
---
Thank you and may God bless America,
---
| |
---
Rep. Kat Cammack
Congresswoman FL-3
---
---
---

clean_body: | | | | May we Never Forget. My Fellow American, On 9/11/2001, the world changed forever. On that day, extremists launched the deadliest terrorist attack in American history, killing nearly 3,000 innocent men, women, and children in New York, Pennsylvania, and Virginia. Today, we reflect on the lives lost and extend our support to the grieving friends and families who were left behind. May the happy memories those loved ones share bring comfort and solace to them as we remember those who lost their lives on that fateful day. Let us also remember the heroism of the first responders and emergency personnel who showcased such extraordinary valor on that day. Our admiration for those first responders, whose exemplary strength and bravery astounds to this day, knows no bounds. In honor of their dedication and commitment to duty, let us resolve to continue to defend our democracy and bring peace, security, and liberty to all the people and nations across the planet. Thank you and may God bless America, | | Rep. Kat Cammack Congresswoman FL-3 | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- | | [PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]() Kat Cammack 5200 NW 43rd st, suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 = \- ==

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Lara Trump & Kash Patel In Tulsarusalem!
body:
Lara Trump & Kash Patel @Sheridan.Church Last night was the kickoff to IGNITE 2023 at Sheridan.Church in Tulsa, OK. We were honored to have State Su
| | |
---
## Lara Trump & Kash Patel @Sheridan.Church
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1306764.522.1.15fdd92bb2ad06050b94a1775b37cf61)
---
Last night was the kickoff to [IGNITE 2023](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1306764.523.1.a293941797a6c16b73f88112d5a7e340) at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1306764.524.1.a3f59c83e86da155955662bd9a9a2a68) in Tulsa, OK.
We were honored to have **State Superintendent Ryan Walters** , **Tulsa County Sheriff Vic Regalado** and **Tulsa City Councilor Jayme Fowler** share a few remarks about what is happening locally.
We also heard from **Kash Patel** & **Lara Trump** about what is taking place throughout our country.
One of the highlights was when **Lara Trump** called her _father-in-law_ , **President Donald Trump**!
**President Trump** spoke to the audience for several minutes and the atmosphere was electric.
ICYMI, watch Night 1 here: [https://rumble.com/v3ge5k3-lara-trump-and-kash-patel-live-from-tulsarusalem.html](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1306764.525.1.8af8067bd8571dd03ef85760360ea8a2)
Tonight is Night 2 and we have Evangelist David Ring (born with cerebral palsy) preaching at 7pm.
| | [ Watch: Lara Trump & Kash Patel LIVE ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1306764.526.1.83c134459c98b2984bcafd46721bf597)
---
---
## IGNITE 2023 | Sheridan.Church
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1306764.527.1.187bb3676b551f86cd0992793f94b348)
---
We are less than 10 days away from [Sheridan.Church's](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1306764.528.1.f9dd4ef8e699d5b71e9504eab512a68d) annual conference in Tulsa, OK called [IGNITE 2023](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1306764.529.1.177a90f2060762aa356bdc921b09bb73)!
[IGNITE](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1306764.530.1.a68c0124f7adb17371a17878586e01de) at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1306764.531.1.0cb84a6b336dcf424f65022512f67a5c) is a 4 days of _powerful worship_ , _dynamic speakers_ and a _community of believers on fire for God_.
**Dates** : September 10-13
**Speakers** :
-Lara Trump
-Kash Patel
-Dr. Randy Caldwell
-Bishop Darrell Hines
-David Ring
**Location** : [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1306764.532.1.a1682cece6e036dd70cda1c5c7933c39) | 7901 E 41st Tulsa, OK 74145
**Cost** : FREE
**RSVP** : [www.sheridan.church/ignite23](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1306764.533.1.3570cc165741f0c315b12dec7dc026e0)
| | [ RSVP: IGNITE 2023 ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1306764.534.1.2de1ed422b08631fde7d4967a6231902)
---
---
## Special Guest Speaker Coming To Sheridan In October
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1306764.535.1.4568a6daf35fe4a8f32521b9a021496e)
---
I have always been a _major_ sports fan.
Recently, I watched a documentary on the great **New York Mets** baseball player **Darryl Strawberry**.
I knew of **Darryl Strawberry's** tremendous career and his unfortunate downfall to drugs later in his career.
What I did not know was how God restored him and called Darryl to the ministry.
Shortly after learning this, I began following **Darryl Strawberry** and his ministry and have been amazed at the preacher he is.
This is why I am excited to invite you to join me at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1306764.536.1.7b84950508106b60a57c724fbc97b82a) Tulsa on **Sunday, October 8** to hear **Darryl Strawberry** preach the Gospel!
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1306764.537.1.03c0d0b4e119a2878cbf846cf39005ae), GAB, [Facebook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1306764.538.1.ae99be7466eb2aec9ba33aefd6ce8407), [Instagram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1306764.539.1.13247d40a6a6f38603a99c6c8941480d), [Twitter](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1306764.540.1.36a442394ff7bba674249110dae06ba1), [Telegram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1306764.541.1.52945f809dece9a23439596f5e555d85), GETTR & [YouTube](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=1306764.542.1.3d8913dafb54fefbe048dde9642e6b56)).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Joe=20Jaworski?=
subject: "Do right and risk the consequences."- Sam Houston
disclaimer_text: paid for by Jaworski for Texas
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas/elpasowithbetoandjoe-13864065?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=b04f10edb2&e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | ,

“ _Do right and risk the consequences._ ” - Sam Houston.

Judge Susan Criss of the 212th District Court of the State of Texas in Galveston posted Sam Houston’s admonition on her courtroom doors, and for the many years I practiced in her court, I’d daily contemplate the wisdom of those words.

As Mayor of Galveston after Hurricane Ike I put Governor Houston’s instruction into practice when I led the rebuilding of Galveston’s storm-damaged public housing. In the coming days the Texas Senate - composed of 30 jurors (Angela Paxton is recused) - will decide whether to find Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton unfit for office. Specifically, with 21 votes required to convict him, will 9 or more Republican senators join 12 senate democrats to remove Paxton from office?

If the Republican senators vote to convict they will receive withering criticism from far right actors in their party and face robust primaries. If they acquit they could find themselves forever on the wrong side of Texas history.

_"Do right and risk the consequences." _
####

_Catch me on the Texas In Focus Podcast today._

I’m attending the impeachment trial in-person today, but you can watch [the livestream](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=c77efbb276&e=5d8d80652b) on the [Texas Senate website](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=43258128bd&e=5d8d80652b). I’ll keep reporting to concerned voters daily with trial updates on social media, and we'll continue to have community conversations about “Ken Paxton’s Hot Summer of Impeachment.” Our next stop will be with the [Meyerland Area Democrats Club this Thursday on Zoom](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=90e153ccdb&e=5d8d80652b) at 7 PM.

I look forward to considering this essential moment in Texas history and its impact on our immediate politics. A conviction means a 2024 special election for Texas Attorney General. I look forward to discussing that and its consequences.

Onward!
####

Joe Jaworski
---
| | | | | | | [](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=aa4bdb9681&e=5d8d80652b)

name: Rick Coplen
subject: Honoring courageous Americans lost
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen
body:
|
---
9/11 was the deadliest single attack on America in our history, with nearly 3,000 lives lost. Today, we honor our fellow Americans who died on 9/11, including our brave NYC emergency responders and the courageous passengers of Flight 93. For a fleeting moment 22 years ago, Americans were united in our grief and determination to never let such an attack happen again.

Unfortunately, the unity didn’t last. The United States foolishly rushed into the invasion of Iraq and waged an ultimately ineffective campaign in Afghanistan, except for the killing of 9/11 mastermind Bin Laden in nearby Pakistan. American efforts in Iraq and Afghanistan gained us little and cost the lives of more Americans than Pearl Harbor and 9/11 _combined_ , plus thousands of Iraqi and Afghan civilians. And it created division where none should have occurred.

Later, the chaos of the “divide and conquer” tactics of the worst President in American history culminated in his efforts to overthrow our democracy on January 6, aided and abetted by Scott Perry and others.

**Scott Perry hates democracy.** He proved it on January 6 when he conspired to overthrow the duly elected government of the United States.

**When that failed,** Scott Perry tried to throw out the votes of 6.8 million Pennsylvania voters. Our votes.

**When that failed,** Scott Perry decided to hold America’s economy hostage over the debt ceiling. America’s bond rating fell because of the governmental dysfunction Perry created, potentially costing taxpayers billions for years to come.

**Now, unable to learn from failure and in defiance of democracy,** Scott Perry and his Chaos Caucus are again trying to hold America hostage for their radical agenda that the American people do not support.

Pearl Harbor and 9/11 were **EXTERNAL** threats; today, we face dangerous **INTERNAL** threats.

**I will ALWAYS** uphold my oath of office to our Constitution. _Scott Perry betrayed his oath and our trust._

**I will ALWAYS** support our Democracy, Elections, and the sacred right of Americans to vote. _Scott Perry undermines all three._

**I will ALWAYS** work to guarantee reproductive freedom for all women. _Scott Perry is determined to take that freedom away._

**I will ALWAYS** work to protect our children and us by reducing gun violence, improving gun safety, and reducing crime.

**I will ALWAYS** stand solid behind our pledge of “liberty and justice for all.” If Scott Perry wants to call that “woke,” so be it. I would much rather be awake than blind to history and injustice like Scott Perry.

**In America, all means all, and everyone counts. Help me rebuild the commUNITY we need.**

Scott Perry’s Chaos Caucus represents less than 7% of the Congress. That’s a fact. His and their arrogance in thinking they know better than everyone else is more proof that Scott Perry hates democracy.

**Scott Perry has to go. It's time to send him packing.**

Thanks,
Rick

clean_body: | 9/11 was the deadliest single attack on America in our history, with nearly 3,000 lives lost. Today, we honor our fellow Americans who died on 9/11, including our brave NYC emergency responders and the courageous passengers of Flight 93. For a fleeting moment 22 years ago, Americans were united in our grief and determination to never let such an attack happen again. Unfortunately, the unity didn’t last. The United States foolishly rushed into the invasion of Iraq and waged an ultimately ineffective campaign in Afghanistan, except for the killing of 9/11 mastermind Bin Laden in nearby Pakistan. American efforts in Iraq and Afghanistan gained us little and cost the lives of more Americans than Pearl Harbor and 9/11 combined , plus thousands of Iraqi and Afghan civilians. And it created division where none should have occurred. Later, the chaos of the “divide and conquer” tactics of the worst President in American history culminated in his efforts to overthrow our democracy on January 6, aided and abetted by Scott Perry and others. Scott Perry hates democracy. He proved it on January 6 when he conspired to overthrow the duly elected government of the United States. When that failed, Scott Perry tried to throw out the votes of 6.8 million Pennsylvania voters. Our votes. When that failed, Scott Perry decided to hold America’s economy hostage over the debt ceiling. America’s bond rating fell because of the governmental dysfunction Perry created, potentially costing taxpayers billions for years to come. Now, unable to learn from failure and in defiance of democracy, Scott Perry and his Chaos Caucus are again trying to hold America hostage for their radical agenda that the American people do not support. Pearl Harbor and 9/11 were EXTERNAL threats; today, we face dangerous INTERNAL threats. I will ALWAYS uphold my oath of office to our Constitution. Scott Perry betrayed his oath and our trust. I will ALWAYS support our Democracy, Elections, and the sacred right of Americans to vote. Scott Perry undermines all three. I will ALWAYS work to guarantee reproductive freedom for all women. Scott Perry is determined to take that freedom away. I will ALWAYS work to protect our children and us by reducing gun violence, improving gun safety, and reducing crime. I will ALWAYS stand solid behind our pledge of “liberty and justice for all.” If Scott Perry wants to call that “woke,” so be it. I would much rather be awake than blind to history and injustice like Scott Perry. In America, all means all, and everyone counts. Help me rebuild the commUNITY we need. Scott Perry’s Chaos Caucus represents less than 7% of the Congress. That’s a fact. His and their arrogance in thinking they know better than everyone else is more proof that Scott Perry hates democracy. Scott Perry has to go. It's time to send him packing. Thanks, Rick | | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen | =

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michigan=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Remembering 9/11
body:
Can you recall your location on that particular day? | | |
---
| |
---
| |
# Party of the Constitution
---
It has been 22 years since September 11th, a day that feels more distant with each passing year. We now remember it through history books rather than the raw emotions we felt that day.
It's frightening how time seems to move so quickly; someone could be graduating college this year and not have even been born yet on September 11th, 2001.

* Do you have a clear memory of that fateful day that left a deep impact on all of us who went through it?
* Can you recall your location on that particular day?
* Do you recall the first instance you witnessed the frightening sight of a plane colliding with the North Tower?
* Do you recall the overwhelming emotions you experienced upon witnessing the collapse of the towers?
* Can you recall the first time you heard the name **Osama bin Laden,** and that **America was under attack?**

Recall the unwavering fortitude and tenacity exhibited by Americans in the aftermath of 9/11.

* Do you recall those heartwarming moments when complete strangers set aside their political differences and simply provided comfort to one another?
* Did you know that on the night of 9/11, Congress went outside and sang God Bless America?
* Do you remember when it was considered trendy to proudly display the American flag after 9/11?

**Is there any hope for bright moments like those of the past today, that don't occur in response to tragedy.**
The 9/11 attack was intended to humble America and make it more like the rest of the world. Whether the attack was a success or failure is debatable, but it is undeniable that it marked a significant turning point in our lives and our nation.
Currently, it appears that we are more divided than ever before. Would Congress ever unite and publicly acknowledge God, asking for his blessings on America again? Will displaying the American flag ever be considered cool again, or will it forever be seen as a symbol of hate?
Today, whether you are a Democrat or Republican, let's admit that our country has changed, and not for the better. Let's set aside our political differences for a day and focus on what unites the vast majority of Americans.
**Let us remember the 3,000 people who died on 9/11.**
Let us pray for their families so that they can find peace and comfort on this day as they seek to find new directions in their lives.
Let us honor the heroism of police, firefighters, and emergency personnel on that day who risked everything to put others first. They embody the best of the American experience.
THANK YOU AND NEVER FORGET!!
### PRESERVE, PROTECT and DEFEND the Constitution of the United States,
### SO HELP ME GOD.

clean_body: Can you recall your location on that particular day? | | | | | | | Party of the Constitution It has been 22 years since September 11th, a day that feels more distant with each passing year. We now remember it through history books rather than the raw emotions we felt that day. It's frightening how time seems to move so quickly; someone could be graduating college this year and not have even been born yet on September 11th, 2001. Do you have a clear memory of that fateful day that left a deep impact on all of us who went through it? Can you recall your location on that particular day? Do you recall the first instance you witnessed the frightening sight of a plane colliding with the North Tower? Do you recall the overwhelming emotions you experienced upon witnessing the collapse of the towers? Can you recall the first time you heard the name Osama bin Laden, and that America was under attack? Recall the unwavering fortitude and tenacity exhibited by Americans in the aftermath of 9/11. Do you recall those heartwarming moments when complete strangers set aside their political differences and simply provided comfort to one another? Did you know that on the night of 9/11, Congress went outside and sang God Bless America? Do you remember when it was considered trendy to proudly display the American flag after 9/11? Is there any hope for bright moments like those of the past today, that don't occur in response to tragedy. The 9/11 attack was intended to humble America and make it more like the rest of the world. Whether the attack was a success or failure is debatable, but it is undeniable that it marked a significant turning point in our lives and our nation. Currently, it appears that we are more divided than ever before. Would Congress ever unite and publicly acknowledge God, asking for his blessings on America again? Will displaying the American flag ever be considered cool again, or will it forever be seen as a symbol of hate? Today, whether you are a Democrat or Republican, let's admit that our country has changed, and not for the better. Let's set aside our political differences for a day and focus on what unites the vast majority of Americans. Let us remember the 3,000 people who died on 9/11. Let us pray for their families so that they can find peace and comfort on this day as they seek to find new directions in their lives. | | | A Grand Jury in Fulton County, Georgia [recommended](https://default.salsalabs.org/T239ccde5-aacc-4cfc-98ae-a7ed19803179/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) that Sen. Lindsey Graham be charged as part of the case against Trump involving interference in the 2020 election. And he deserves it. Graham was caught plotting election fraud for Trump and played a big role in trying to overturn the 2020 election. He infamously called a top Georgia official after the 2020 election and suggested that ballots could be thrown out in targeted areas. Despite all of this Graham hasn’t been charged – yet. We need to raise our voices and demand Lindsey Graham be charged for election interference. He tried to undermine our democracy as one of Trump’s lackeys and he cannot be allowed to get off scot-free. [Add your name: Prosecute Lindsey Graham for election interference! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2a5df6e3-c540-4d0b-8a16-6028f8dc9365/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

subject: Honoring Patriot Day and
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark]( "Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark")
body:
Our Commitment to America's Safety | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/735f47f71972/im-announcing-my-run-for-congress-12650848?e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=ec05927d9b&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | Dear Peter,
---
| Today, we come together to commemorate Patriot Day, a solemn occasion when we reflect on one of the darkest moments in our nation's history, the tragic events of 9/11. On this day, we remember the innocent lives lost and the profound impact it had on our country.

As we look back on that fateful day, we must never forget the incredible heroism displayed by Americans rushing to help one another as we faced the monstrous attacks on our homeland.
---
|
---
| This day of tragedy did not defeat us. Instead, it united us, and we resolved to make America safe once more.

Today, as we remember the sacrifices made by countless individuals, it is our duty to honor their memory by upholding the values they held dear. We must recognize the same bravery and resilience that our nation displayed in its darkest hour. Just as we faced the threats of 9/11 head-on, we must stand together today to confront the challenges that continue to test our great nation.

Patriot Day serves as a solemn reminder of the strength and unity that defines America. It is a testament to our ability to overcome adversity, no matter how daunting the circumstances may be and work together with resilience of the American spirit.

Together, we can face the challenges of today and tomorrow with the same unwavering determination that has defined us since that fateful day in 2001. As your Congressional candidate, I pledge to work tirelessly to ensure the safety and prosperity of our great state and country.

Thank you for joining me in remembrance on this Patriot Day. God bless you, and God bless the United States of America.

---
| For God & Country,

Julie Clark
Former Medina County Republican Chair
Candidate for U.S. Congress, TX-23
[ClarkForCongress.com](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=c76e47af3b&e=c982eb7ad4)

body:
| | | | Today we remember those we lost.
---
---
Peter,
22 years ago today, I was a freshman in high school. I remember vividly where I was that day - in Suffern High School. Our country was shaken to its core. Yet, in the days that followed, our state and our nation united around our flag, around our firefighters, law enforcement officers, and military, and around New York City.
Today, we remember the nearly 3,000 people, friends, family, neighbors, and members of our community whose lives were tragically cut short. We extend our hearts and our prayers to their loved ones as we continue to mourn and share in their grief.
Amidst the horror of that day, we witnessed unparalleled bravery. Heroes emerged out of that smoke and chaos, and their courage and selflessness continues to be a model for us all to aspire and serve as pillars of strength even to this day.
May we Never Forget 9/11, the heroes we lost that day and since, and may God Bless the United States of America.
---
| | Sincerely,
Congressman Mike Lawler U.S. Representative NY-17

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: Remembering September 11th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/ [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/]
Friends,
Today marks 22 years since the 9/11 attacks that changed our country forever.
I remember where I was on 9/11 and every moment of that day as I watched the searing images on my television. I’ll never forget that feeling of fear, uncertainty, and eventually devastation once we realized what happened.
But I’ll also never forget the way our country came together in the days, weeks and months that followed.
We should never forget what happened on 9/11. We should also use this day to recommit to the ideal that we’re stronger as a nation when we stick together. Whenever we let small differences tear us apart, we must come back to the principals of strength and unity that have gotten us through the darkest times as a nation.
Please join me in honoring the memories of the lives that were lost and sending strength to their loved ones on this dark anniversary.
– Wiley Nickel
Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
Wiley Nickel for Congress
PO Box 563
Raleigh, NC 27602
United States

Peter,

This year alone, the pro-choice movement defended abortion access in Michigan, elected a pro-choice judge to the Wisconsin Supreme Court, and got a pro-choice amendment on the ballot in Ohio.

**Our supporters — that's you! — have fueled this critical work, and now it's time to strategize for 2024. As conservative-majority courts and anti-choice Republicans continue to threaten reproductive freedom, we need your input at the forefront of our strategy.**

[**Peter, I am personally inviting you to participate in our focus group survey. Will you take a moment to weigh in on our strategy for the next year?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69574086/426563992/-1905437203?sourceid=1051918&refcode=20230911_FocusGroupSurvey_v1s2&refcode2=WTENE913&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGJkMmY1Zi1kYzUwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hkGuW5RL0q1PaVQKReIGyljbs83PgeVgFd_DXOFnJlA=&emci=9bbd2f5f-dc50-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=9dbd2f5f-dc50-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=5177934)
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69574088/426563994/-1905437203?sourceid=1051918&refcode=20230911_FocusGroupSurvey_v1s2&refcode2=WTENE913&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGJkMmY1Zi1kYzUwLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hkGuW5RL0q1PaVQKReIGyljbs83PgeVgFd_DXOFnJlA=&emci=9bbd2f5f-dc50-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=9dbd2f5f-dc50-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=5177934)
---
Recent pro-choice victories like these were only possible thanks to the dedicated members of this community, and we need to know your priorities as we continue our fight to protect reproductive freedom.

Thank you,

Laphonza Butler
President, EMILYs List

name: Jared Moskowitz
subject: remembering 9/11
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P
body:
|
---
Team, on September 11, 2001, our country underwent an act of terrorism never before seen within our borders. Twenty two years ago, our country emerged from tragedy and showed the world our strength and resilience.

Today, I want to take a moment to remember those we lost that day and to honor the families whose loved ones were taken from them, and to thank our brave first responders who keep us safe.

That day, we came together as a country to collectively grieve and bring our communities together. We opened our hearts and helped our neighbors. We come together when our friends and neighbors are hurting. The blind partisanship and damaging rhetoric we see today makes it hard to believe we can still come together.

So today, on the 22nd anniversary of 9/11, let us remember why we’re proud to be Americans. In the midst of the current challenges our nation is facing, we must come together once again.

Thank you,

_Jared Moskowitz_
| | Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P.O. Box 8784, Coral Springs, FL 33065

clean_body: | Team, on September 11, 2001, our country underwent an act of terrorism never before seen within our borders. Twenty two years ago, our country emerged from tragedy and showed the world our strength and resilience. Today, I want to take a moment to remember those we lost that day and to honor the families whose loved ones were taken from them, and to thank our brave first responders who keep us safe. That day, we came together as a country to collectively grieve and bring our communities together. We opened our hearts and helped our neighbors. We come together when our friends and neighbors are hurting. The blind partisanship and damaging rhetoric we see today makes it hard to believe we can still come together. So today, on the 22nd anniversary of 9/11, let us remember why we’re proud to be Americans. In the midst of the current challenges our nation is facing, we must come together once again. Thank you, Jared Moskowitz | | Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P.O. Box 8784, Coral Springs, FL 33065 www.jaredforflorida.com/ to receive fewer emails. to update your information. Peter,
I want to take a moment to reflect on how this day 22 years ago forever changed our nation. It is a day that will always be etched in our collective memory, a day when the world watched in shock and disbelief as the United States faced an unprecedented act of terrorism.

On that fateful day, thousands of innocent lives were lost, heroes emerged, and our nation came together in a remarkable display of resilience, compassion, and unity. It is important that we pause to remember the victims, honor the first responders and the brave men and women who sacrificed their lives, and reflect on the enduring impact of those events.

As your Congresswoman, I am committed to ensuring that the lessons learned from 9/11 continue to guide our efforts to protect our nation and its values. We must remain vigilant in the face of threats to our security, while also upholding our principles of freedom and democracy.

This anniversary serves as a reminder of the strength of our nation when we stand together. Let us come together to remember, honor, and strengthen our determination to build a safer future for all Americans.

Thank you,

clean_body: | | | | \- - -| Peter, I want to take a moment to reflect on how this day 22 years ago forever changed our nation. It is a day that will always be etched in our collective memory, a day when the world watched in shock and disbelief as the United States faced an unprecedented act of terrorism. On that fateful day, thousands of innocent lives were lost, heroes emerged, and our nation came together in a remarkable display of resilience, compassion, and unity. It is important that we pause to remember the victims, honor the first responders and the brave men and women who sacrificed their lives, and reflect on the enduring impact of those events. As your Congresswoman, I am committed to ensuring that the lessons learned from 9/11 continue to guide our efforts to protect our nation and its values. We must remain vigilant in the face of threats to our security, while also upholding our principles of freedom and democracy. This anniversary serves as a reminder of the strength of our nation when we stand together. Let us come together to remember, honor, and strengthen our determination to build a safer future for all Americans. Thank you, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 = \- =

name: DLCC Special Elections Team
subject: The Pennsylvania House is TIED...
body:
A critical special election will take place in Pennsylvania in less than two weeks. Will you join us as we stand against extreme Republicans? | | |
---
| | **In _less than_ two weeks, one vacant legislative seat in Pennsylvania will determine which party will control the state House.** Since Democrats flipped the Pennsylvania House last year and broke the GOP’s grip on the state legislature, we’ve defended our narrow majority in _four_ special elections. But now, the Pennsylvania House is TIED once again, and we need to fend off a right-wing power grab in _another_ special election THIS MONTH. That’s why Senator John Fetterman called on grassroots Democrats to act: [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xT87Do081Peey8mbiuSK7m06iLNAd-MSsCN8QIrrkMfEYi5-ynOf5hkpbxXsowvAhMHojg4PK96O6WfnDDVw2ZvPJQdAICfHKzBNOCrNSI6vnKySot6b3NbAFLxmITympp7kxb0IGIfSKfPI64iGLkgEBmKovYVVy7EZ7e15yTRfJSXsKzzk8hhBNz7H-Kw0U3iEBHYXy0J_ViMyju_UuZcGy7gG5xU6iHeniJqOF9IFnnKN518idTEQhtsPBoXLVTPzLQdqaMBvq6rvE0h64ZYfKEkkpKL_-w5ULR_Dj1dZHEOkO438L6MS8Zoywfbmr6Na0-ToUMQpUyIM5fhMa7cYRkPMHg6-5iRq9KUnU3JoydLWKFKB0-BGjpBMaFFEnPBuDs4CCgwTD8dHRZb9gm/3zi/WAeCpCqTQqeMxJIa09Ok9A/h0/1tGwOLm54v_IIknPR2F3enwmU-SpE1Xaj6z5fS6QwD0)

clean_body: A critical special election will take place in Pennsylvania in less than two weeks. Will you join us as we stand against extreme Republicans? | | | | | In less than two weeks, one vacant legislative seat in Pennsylvania will determine which party will control the state House. Since Democrats flipped the Pennsylvania House last year and broke the GOP’s grip on the state legislature, we’ve defended our narrow majority in four special elections. But now, the Pennsylvania House is TIED once again, and we need to fend off a right-wing power grab in another special election THIS MONTH. That’s why Senator John Fetterman called on grassroots Democrats to act: Pennsylvania has been at the top of the Republican Party’s target list, and they're hellbent on rolling back gun safety measures, cutting public education spending, and advancing a constitutional amendment that would pave the way for future abortion restrictions. This election is about more than just one seat; it's about securing our fundamental rights in states like Pennsylvania. Losing this seat not only cedes chamber control back to the GOP, but it also means giving a QAnon conspiracy theorist and Jan. 6th insurrectionist a voice in PA’s legislature. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We’re at a pivotal moment, and we cannot let Republicans enact their right-wing agenda in a critical swing state. What we do now will determine the future of states like Pennsylvania – and it all starts with defending our razor-thin majority with this special election. We’re counting on you, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates. We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states. name: =?utf-8?Q?Lt.=20Col.=20David=20Flippo?=
subject: Their Sacrifice for Our Victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee To Elect David Flippo]( "Paid for by The Committee To Elect David Flippo")
body:
Remembering those who gave everything | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/74ccf642b11a/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-9605677?e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=a7912a7fdb&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| Peter, Today marks the anniversary of one of our nation’s darkest days. And I join all my fellow Americans in mourning the victims we lost on that fateful day. But as we mourn, we must never forget those who stood up among the flames and sacrificed everything in duty to their country, to their neighbors, to their fellow Americans. It is in their sacrifice that we are able to recover a shred of hope from that tragic day. We honor today those brave New York police officers, the firefighters, and service-members, who have put everything on the line for their country. It is their courage we remember today. I’ve been honored to experience such bravery firsthand, I was proud to lead the bravest of airmen and women overseas and couldn’t help but be struck by their dedication to the American values we fought for. When facing enemies that wanted only to destroy our country, we fought victoriously to preserve the American dream for our people. Upon returning home, I felt inspired by their sacrifice to continue fighting for the American people in any way possible, that is why I want to represent them today. My hope today is that we don’t just remember those brave heroes, but honor their sacrifice by coming together and following their example to preserve the American dream. Our country faces threats today, and we must stand up together and face those threats. We have been given a gift by the heroes on that day, and I want to make certain we do not waste it now.

For our Heroes,
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=d78a2fcd76&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| David Flippo, Lt. Col. (USAF Ret.)
Candidate for U.S. Congress, NV-4

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: 9/11 and the American spirit
body:
Honoring the lives lost in 2001 and holding our memories close. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69575340/426568795/1649708063?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGM4Mjk4NDgtZTI1MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gMGaoaEzE3L4tPqooFYRq4TmMCzX-arzy-v6iUVDNuk=)
---
Friend, Last month, Today is September 11, and it is so important to remember and honor the lives that were lost that sad day in 2001. Few events have tested the soul and spirit of our nation more than the attack on the Twin Towers and the Pentagon, as well as the loss of the passengers aboard Flight 93. Like most people old enough to comprehend what was happening on September 11, 2001, I remember where I was and what I was feeling when I heard about the plane flying into the first tower. I was in Boston - the location where the hijackers flew out of. I recall distinctly feeling a sense of dread and dark uncertainty upon learning that what we had witnessed was a deliberate attack. Were places like New York and Boston being targeted? Were we next? What was the motive for the attacks? It is easy to forget the feelings that persisted after 9/11 as well—the widespread fear and panic, not knowing what was safe, or how we could even begin picking up the pieces after the destructive evil we had just witnessed. **Understanding just how resilient and remarkable the American spirit truly is requires looking at the terrible events of 9/11 and their aftermath with fresh eyes.** Unprecedented and world-changing events shake up expectations, rattle the foundations of society, and present completely novel challenges no one could have predicted, or prepared for. In time, after the towers fell and the wreckage was surveyed from the Pentagon, it became clear that the people would not break—we hardened our resolve. We learned that passengers on Flight 93 courageously rose up against their captors and made the ultimate sacrifice to prevent it from reaching its target: Washington, D.C. Since that day, we have faced more unprecedented challenges including a violent insurrection directed at the seat of democratic power, the U.S. Congress. Defeating all forms of terrorism, foreign and domestic, is beyond important to my campaign which is why I have met with some of the nations foremost national security experts to formulate my policy on counter-terrorism and protecting America from attacks like the one that occured 22 years ago today and the one that occured on January 6 2021. And even now, I am moved by how Americans tend to come together during these times rather than split apart. Reflecting on the legacy of 9/11 makes me proud to be an American and to play my own small part in our incredible democratic experiment. We can withstand anything if we stand together. In Solidarity, Tamie
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| **Tamie Wilson**

Candidate for Congress (OH-4)
---
| | |
---
[**Donate**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69575342/426568797/1649708063?refcode=sept11_footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGM4Mjk4NDgtZTI1MC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gMGaoaEzE3L4tPqooFYRq4TmMCzX-arzy-v6iUVDNuk=)
